title: Digital Systems, Automation & SMM VA: Google Suite, Zapier, Wordpress, Canva & AI Tools
description:
We are a boutique mortgage brokerage based in Sydney, Australia seeking a high-performing Systems & Automation Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to support our growing business



This role is designed for a proactive, highly organised operator who enjoys building automations, improving systems, and helping a business run efficiently



We work best with VAs who enjoy solving problems, improving workflows and taking ownership of tasks rather than waiting to be told what to do



This is not a basic VA role. We are specifically looking for someone capable of building automations, managing digital platforms, and improving business processes independently



We are seeking someone in the top tier of VAs — organised, assertive, detail-oriented and trusted to get things done.

________________________________________

ROLE DETAILS

Location: Philippines (Remote)

Hours: Approximately 5–10 hours per week (hours may vary depending on workload)

Industry: Australian Mortgage & Finance

________________________________________

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Build and maintain workflow automations using Zapier

• Develop automation scripts using Google Apps Script

• Assist with Broker Engine system management

• Manage and organise Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail, Calendar)

• Maintain and update the company website (WordPress)

• Manage social media marketing, scheduling and engagement

• Create social media content using Canva and CapCut

• Implement AI-assisted workflows and productivity tools

• Assist with CRM management and workflow optimisation

• Provide general digital operations and VA support

________________________________________

ESSENTIAL SKILLS & ATTRIBUTES

• Highly organised with excellent attention to detail

• Proactive and able to work independently

• Strong systems thinking and problem-solving ability

• Comfortable building automations and improving processes

• Efficient, reliable and trustworthy

• Strong written and verbal English communication skills

• Able to manage multiple tools and digital systems

________________________________________

TECHNICAL SKILLS (MUST HAVE)

Candidates must have experience with the following tools and skills:

• Zapier – building automation workflows (not just using them)

• Google Apps Script – building automation scripts

• Google Workspace – Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail, Calendar

• Google AI tools – Gemini, NanoBanana or similar

• AI productivity tools such as Perplexity

• WordPress – website updates and content management

• Social Media Marketing experience

• Canva – graphics and social media design

• CapCut – short-form video editing

________________________________________

HIGHLY DESIRABLE

• Experience with HubSpot or CRM systems

• Experience with Broker Engine or ApplyOnline

• Experience integrating systems and building automation workflows

________________________________________

WHAT WE OFFER

• Competitive hourly rate

• Flexible working hours

• Remote work with a professional Australian finance business

• Opportunity to build a long-term working relationship

• Exposure to the Australian mortgage industry

• We value long-term working relationships and treat our VAs as trusted operational partners in the business

________________________________________

APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY)

To confirm that you have read this advertisement carefully, please begin your application message with the words:

“Systems create freedom.”



Applications that do not include this phrase will not be considered.



Please also include the word Sydney in the subject line of your application



Please include the following in your application:

• A short introduction about yourself

• Your experience as a Digital Systems Virtual Assistant

• Examples of automation workflows you built using Zapier or Google Apps Script

• Examples of social media content created using Canva or CapCut

• Your experience with Google Workspace, AI tools and automation systems

• Your hourly rate and availability

________________________________________

APPLICATION QUESTIONS

1. Describe a Zapier automation you personally built. Include the apps connected, trigger, action and what manual task it replaced.

2. Describe a Google Apps Script automation you created and what it improved.

3. Provide examples or links to social media content you created using Canva or CapCut



If you possess these skills and want to work with a friendly team and be part of something special, we would love to hear from you!

title: Technical Support Representative
description:
We are seeking a customer-focused and empathetic Technical Support Representative to provide exceptional support to our users. In this role, you will manage high-volume inquiries from customers, organizers, and donors, helping resolve account issues, platform questions, and basic technical concerns. The ideal candidate is an excellent communicator who can remain calm and professional while assisting customers through sensitive or complex situations.



While the primary focus of this role is delivering outstanding customer service, candidates should also be comfortable performing basic technical troubleshooting and working with internal tools to investigate user issues. You will collaborate closely with internal teams to ensure customer concerns are addressed efficiently and effectively.



Key Responsibilities



Provide professional and empathetic support to customers via
 and phone in a high-volume environment.



Assist users with account inquiries, platform navigation, transaction questions, and general troubleshooting.



Investigate and resolve customer issues using internal tools and available data.



Perform basic technical troubleshooting for platform-related concerns and escalate complex technical issues when necessary.



Document customer interactions clearly and maintain accurate records in the ticketing system.



Identify and report potential product issues or unexpected platform behavior to internal teams.



Create clear escalation notes including steps taken, issue details, and supporting information for technical teams.



Work collaboratively with Product and Engineering teams to ensure timely resolution of customer concerns.



Maintain a high standard of written and verbal communication when assisting both technical and non-technical users.



Meet performance metrics including customer satisfaction (CSAT), response times, and resolution targets.



Continuously contribute to improving internal documentation and customer self-service resources.



Required Qualifications



2–5 years of experience in customer service, customer support, or help desk roles in a fast-paced environment.



Strong written and verbal communication skills with the ability to clearly explain solutions to customers.



Experience working with ticketing or case management systems.



Ability to troubleshoot basic technical or platform-related issues.



Strong attention to detail and ability to document customer interactions accurately.



Comfortable working with internal tools and learning new systems quickly.



Preferred Qualifications



Experience supporting software platforms or online services.



Basic familiarity with technical concepts such as APIs, data queries, or system integrations.



Experience collaborating with technical teams such as Engineering or Product.



Core Competencies



Excellent communication skills and a strong customer-first mindset.



Empathy and emotional intelligence when assisting customers in sensitive situations.



Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to remain calm under pressure.



Effective time management and the ability to handle multiple support requests simultaneously.



Adaptability and willingness to learn new tools and processes.



Benefits:**

Fully remote

Salary - Based on Experience x 40 hours per week - Salary every Friday.

Opportunities for professional development and growth.

Dynamic and supportive work environment.

Full time, Monday - Friday 9AM-5PM EST

Job Security and Stability

PTO

Inclusive Culture

Upskilling Opportunities

100% Work-From-Home

Exceptionally Supportive Team

Opportunities for Career Growth

USB Headset with Noise Cancellation feature

Working Webcam

Computer with at least 1.8 GHz processor and at least 4GB RAM

Main Internet Service Speed: at least 25 Mbps cable connection

Backup Internet Service Speed: at least 10 Mbps

title: Senior Shopify & WordPress Developer – Full Time
description:
We’re looking for a senior developer with strong experience in both Shopify and WordPress custom builds to join our team full-time.



This role requires someone who can build serious ecommerce and custom websites, not someone who installs themes or works with page builders.



BFJ Digital is a Brisbane-based digital marketing and transformation agency with strong technical capability across Shopify, WordPress, and modern marketing technology stacks.  



The role is full time, with a requirement of you working for no other employers. We’re looking for a senior dev with at least 5 years Shopify experience. 



Please provide a portfolio of your work. Our existing team is 5 developers, so you’ll be joining a very skilled performative team. Realisable internet, and power supplies is important. Most of our devs are in  manila. 







The Role



You will be responsible for building and maintaining custom Shopify stores and custom WordPress websites for our clients.



You’ll work closely with our internal team including:

 • Designers

 • Project managers

 • Developers working across integrations and platforms



The focus is on clean builds, performance, and scalable architecture.







Mandatory Experience



If you do not meet these requirements, this role is not suitable.

 • Strong Shopify development experience

 • Custom Shopify builds

 • Strong WordPress development experience

 • Custom WordPress builds using ACF

 • Ability to build without page builders



We do not hire page-builder developers.







Technical Skills



You should be comfortable with:

 • Shopify Liquid

 • Shopify APIs and integrations

 • Custom Shopify theme development

 • WordPress custom themes

 • ACF (Advanced Custom Fields)

 • Git workflows

 • Performance optimisation



Bonus if you also understand:

 • Headless architectures

 • CRM / marketing integrations







How We Work



Our team focuses on technical excellence and real business outcomes.

 • Structured development processes

 • Clear project management

 • Designers and devs working closely together

 • Long-term client relationships



We build serious digital infrastructure, not brochure websites.







Important



This role is not suitable for:

title: SaaS Product Builder — Help Us Launch SpeakerAgent.AI | Full-Time | Path to CTO
description:
We're Launching a SaaS. We Need a Builder Who's Ready to Move.



SpeakerAgent.AI is an AI-powered platform for authors, speakers, and thought leaders. It scouts conferences, finds decision-makers, and generates personalized pitches — all on autopilot. Think of it as an AI talent agent that does the work most speakers waste thousands of hours doing manually.



The foundation is built. The tech stack is live. We are days away from Alpha. We have an immediate opening on our build team and we need someone who can step in, get up to speed quickly, and help us cross the finish line.



Here's what makes this different from every other dev job you'll see today — you won't be writing code by hand.

We build with Claude Code by Anthropic. The AI handles 90%+ of the actual coding. Your job is to manage the process, direct the tools, review what comes out, test it, fix what's broken, and keep the project moving. Think of it as being a technical project manager who also gets their hands dirty.



If you've ever wanted to build something real — this is it.



What You'll Be Doing

Right now (Launch Phase):



Get into our existing codebase and get familiar fast — Next.js frontend, Python/FastAPI backend, Airtable CRM, Claude AI integration

Work directly with the founder to finish the remaining features and fixes before launch

Test, debug, and polish the platform for real paying users

Help manage deployments on Vercel



After launch (Growth Phase):



Build new features from our product roadmap

Own the stability of the platform — performance, bugs, integrations

Take on more of the technical decision-making as you grow



Long-term (Leadership Phase):



Step into the CTO role — this is the first and only hire on this track

Own the technical vision and architecture

Earn a compensation package and equity/partnership opportunity that reflects what you've built





Who We're Looking For

We're being intentionally open because the AI tools do the heavy lifting. That said, here's what matters:



Some development experience — JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, React/Next.js preferred. Self-taught counts. Show us what you've built.

Open to using AI coding tools — Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, anything

You can move fast without being hand-held

You communicate clearly and consistently — no disappearing acts

You want to grow with a company, not just collect a paycheck



What doesn't matter as much: a perfect resume. Mindset and ability to execute with AI tools matters more than years of traditional experience.



What We Offer



$10/hour USD to start — raise at 30 days, additional increases based on performance. Tony, our owner, said it best: "Quality is never cheap anywhere." We pay for the right person.

All AI tools provided — full access to Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and everything you need. Unlimited budget.

Real processes and playbooks — we don't throw you in blind

1-on-1 mentorship from a founder who has advised the President of the United States

Path to CTO — prove yourself over 6–12 months and step into the executive role

Partnership opportunity — the right person earns a stake in the business

A real product with real customers — this isn't a side project. We're launching.





How It Works

A test is required — and it's actually the most important part of our process.



Reply to this post ? send an
 to 
 with subject line "SpeakerAgent.AI"

You'll get an automatic reply with a technical assessment and a link to book your interview

Complete the assessment before your interview — if you show up without it, the interview is canceled. No exceptions.

Interview — we walk through your work, talk about the product, and see if it's a fit

Move fast — we're onboarding by Wednesday



The assessment tells us everything. It's not about being perfect — it's about whether you follow through, pay attention, and actually engage. That matters more than your resume.



Ready?

If you're technical, motivated, and hungry to build something real from the ground floor — send us that
.

???? 

???? Subject: SpeakerAgent.AI



We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for someone hungry to build. Let's go.

title: Project Coordinator
description:
Role Overview:

Our client is looking for a highly organised and proactive Project Coordinator responsible for supporting the delivery of projects through disciplined administration, documentation, and coordination across all project phases. This role ensures that Project Managers can focus on high-value activities by maintaining the systems, processes, and records that keep commercial and industrial projects on track. The coordinator manages information flow, tracks actions and risks, and ensures nothing falls through the cracks from initiation to completion.



Core Accountabilities

- Scope, Time, Cost & Quality: Coordinate and maintain project scope documentation and schedules while tracking project costs, including claims and variations.

- Commercial & Business Administration: Maintain accurate oversight of the commercial position of each project, ensuring invoicing is current and escalating overdue or at-risk items promptly.

- Project 
ntum: Maintain a current and accurate picture of project status and critical paths, ensuring the team never operates on outdated information.

- Risk & Quality Management: Proactively identify, capture, and report risks early with suggested mitigations, while maintaining defect and quality registers through to resolution.



Key Responsibilities

- Project Coordination & Administration: Record and issue meeting minutes, maintain action registers, and follow up with responsible parties to ensure timely completion.

- Scope & Budget Management: Develop project scope statements and maintain project budgets, processing updates arising from payment claims and approved variations.

- Procurement & Commercial: Prepare and coordinate Requests for Quotation (RFQ) and Tender (RFT), and manage the - - Request for Information (RFI) process.

- Financial Administration: Administer the payment claims process, coordinate monthly invoicing in accordance with milestones, and pursue overdue payments.

- Document & Drawing Management: Manage all project drawings, including filing, version control, and mark-ups, while organizing project photography for reporting purposes.

- HSE Tracking: Administratively track the submission and approval status of Construction Management Plans and HSE communication plans.



Qualifications & Experience

MUST-HAVE Experience

- Proven 4-5 years experience in project coordination or administration specifically within commercial or industrial construction.

- Strong proficiency in the Microsoft 365 environment (Excel, Word, and Outlook).

- Experience with Bluebeam or a comparable PDF editing and markup tool for drawing coordination.

- Demonstrated ability in written communication, specifically in producing meeting minutes, status reports, and scope of works.



Additional Experience

- Experience with project management platforms (experience in MS Project, AutoCAD, Procore, or Aconex is highly regarded).

- Familiarity with payment claim administration and procurement processes (RFI, RFQ, RFT).

- Ability to create and maintain project registers, risk matrices, and schedules.



Please send your resume and portfolio to

title: Conveyancing Compliance Officer
description:
PropZap — Help Build the Compliance Backbone of a Company Scaling Across North America



PropZap is building a next-generation real estate platform designed to expand across North America.



We’re not building just another brokerage.



We’re building a modern real estate company powered by strong systems, disciplined operations, intelligent workflows, and long-term vision.



Every real estate transaction carries legal, financial, and regulatory responsibility.



Behind every successful closing is a file that is complete, organized, and defensible.



As we scale, maintaining that level of operational integrity becomes even more important.



That’s why we’re looking for someone who takes pride in building order, protecting compliance, and ensuring every transaction file stands up to scrutiny.



This role helps protect the integrity of the entire brokerage.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Conveyancing & Compliance Officer

Location: Remote

Role Type: Full-Time / Long-Term

Compensation: TBD



We believe exceptional operators deserve exceptional compensation. As PropZap grows, we are willing to pay premium for people who consistently deliver high-quality work, protect compliance standards, and help strengthen the systems that allow the company to scale confidently.



Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



--------------------------------------------------------------



Why This Role Is Important



Every real estate transaction produces a complex set of documents, approvals, and compliance requirements.



If those records are incomplete, inconsistent, or poorly documented, the brokerage is exposed to unnecessary risk.



This role ensures our transaction files are clean, complete, and defensible from acceptance through closing — particularly during the critical firm-to-close conveyancing phase.



You will also support brokerage compliance operations by ensuring documentation standards are followed and potential risks are identified early.



This role sits at the center of:



• Conveyancing readiness

• Compliance oversight

• Documentation integrity

• Operational coordination



If you enjoy bringing clarity and structure to complex documentation, this role will feel meaningful and impactful.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities



Transaction File Compliance Review



You will review buyer and seller transaction files to ensure they are complete, accurate, and audit-ready.



This includes:



• Reviewing transaction files in SkySlope (system of record)

• Ensuring required documents are present

• Confirming documents are legible and properly executed

• Verifying files are named and stored correctly

• Ensuring amendments, waivers, and supporting documents match the executed contract set

• Checking deposits, dates, and contract details for consistency



Your goal is to ensure each file clearly reflects what occurred during the transaction and maintains a clean documentation trail.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Pre-Close Conveyancing Readiness



You will conduct pre-close readiness checks to ensure files are properly prepared before entering the final stages of conveyancing.



This includes:



• Identifying missing or inconsistent documents early

• Creating clear lists of outstanding items and responsible parties

• Re-checking files once corrections are submitted

• Monitoring for late-stage issues such as:

Missing signatures

Name mismatches

Missing waivers

Incomplete deposit documentation

Missing lawyer details

Conflicting dates



Your work helps prevent last-minute issues that could delay closing.



--------------------------------------------------------------



FINTRAC Oversight (AML / Client Identification)



You will enforce PropZap’s FINTRAC standards with a strict compliance approach.



Responsibilities include:



• Verifying identification requirements for all parties

• Confirming ID documents are clear and valid

• Ensuring names on ID match contract names exactly

• Confirming required information such as occupation and employer

• Ensuring FINTRAC references are properly recorded internally



You will also manage complex cases such as:



• Corporate parties

• Foreign buyers or sellers

• Name discrepancies

• Missing or unclear identification

• Time-sensitive transactions



Any suspicious or high-risk information must be escalated promptly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



External Law Office Coordination (When Required)



You may assist with coordination related to the conveyancing phase, including:



• Confirming lawyer contact information is recorded correctly

• Ensuring the correct contract set is available for closing

• Verifying key transaction information is consistent

• Assisting internal teams in resolving missing documentation requested by lawyers



Exact interaction with law offices may vary depending on internal workflow.



--------------------------------------------------------------



MLS & Listing Compliance (When Applicable)



You may also assist with brokerage compliance checks related to listings and marketing documentation.



This may include:



• Confirming listing documentation is properly stored

• Reviewing listing records for completeness

• Supporting brokerage documentation standards tied to listings

• Identifying potential compliance issues related to listing or marketing records



The scope of MLS or advertising compliance responsibilities may evolve as the brokerage grows.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Documentation Standards & File Hygiene



At PropZap, documentation matters.



If something affects:



• money

• deadlines

• conditions

• approvals

• compliance obligations



…it must be clearly documented in the system of record.



You will:



• Provide clear feedback when documentation standards are not met

• Request corrections when necessary

• Follow up to ensure gaps are resolved



Clean files allow teams to understand transaction status and risk quickly.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Escalations & Risk Monitoring



You will identify scenarios that require escalation, including:



• Missing FINTRAC documentation

• Money or trust-related ambiguity

• Potential misrepresentation or conflicting information

• Situations requiring legal interpretation

• Clients threatening complaints or legal action



Escalations should include a clear summary of the issue and supporting documentation.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Compliance Audits & Quality Assurance



You may periodically review files to maintain compliance standards.



This may include:



• Performing internal file audits

• Identifying recurring documentation issues

• Monitoring patterns of missing information

• Flagging operational risks early



These reviews help keep the brokerage compliant and defensible.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Process Improvement



You will also help strengthen operational systems by identifying patterns and inefficiencies.



This includes:



• Tracking recurring compliance gaps

• Suggesting improvements to checklists and templates

• Supporting updates to internal SOPs

• Helping teams maintain consistent documentation standards



Your insights help the company improve how transactions are handled as we scale.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who This Role Is Great For



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys structure, detail, and keeping complex documentation organized.



Strong candidates often have experience in:



• Real estate conveyancing

• Transaction coordination

• Brokerage compliance

• Legal or documentation-heavy administrative roles



Key strengths include:



• Exceptional attention to detail

• Strong organizational skills

• Clear written communication

• Comfort working with sensitive personal information

• Good judgment when escalating regulated issues



--------------------------------------------------------------



Tools & Systems



You will primarily work with:



• SkySlope (transaction file system)

• Slack (internal communication)

• Notion (Task tracking, SOPs and documentation)



--------------------------------------------------------------



What You Gain



• Long-term role inside a growing real estate platform

• Direct collaboration with operations and brokerage leadership

• Opportunity to strengthen systems that support company growth

• A role where your work protects the integrity of real estate transactions



As the company expands across markets, the importance of strong compliance and documentation systems grows — and the people who build those systems grow with it.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to: 



• Resume

• Portfolio (if applicable — examples of conveyancing, compliance, or documentation work)

• Summary of relevant conveyancing or compliance experience

• Expected monthly compensation

• Internet speed test link

• Any DISC test result (if available)

• Intro video (optional but strongly preferred)



Subject Line: Conveyancing Compliance Officer – Your Name



--------------------------------------------------------------



If you want to help build the compliance backbone of a real estate platform that is scaling across North America — and grow with a company that values operational excellence — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Performance Marketing Manager
description:
PropZap — We’re Building a Dream Team to Shape the Future of Real Estate in North America.



We are not building just another brokerage.



We are building a scalable real estate platform designed to modernize how homes are bought and sold — through systems, technology, disciplined execution, and long-term vision.



Our ambition is not incremental growth.

It is structured, North American scale.



And we are intentionally building a high-caliber team aligned with that mission.



If you are driven by measurable impact.

If you believe performance marketing should compound over time.

If you want to build infrastructure, not just campaigns.



We want you to take the helm of our growth engine.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Role: Performance Marketing Manager

Location: Remote

Shift: Aligned with Canada MST

Role Type: Any

Compensation: 50,000 PHP+

Company: PropZap — Building the next-generation real estate platform for North America



This is a revenue-accountable growth leadership role.



You are directly responsible for building and scaling the paid acquisition engine that fuels expansion.



You will not simply execute instructions.



You will lead marketing performance strategy.



Your performance will be measured by qualified lead volume, conversion efficiency, disciplined optimization, and the strength of the systems you build.



You are expected to be the internal expert for marketing matters — the person leadership turns to for strategic insight, innovative ideas, and informed recommendations.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Your Core Responsibilities:



Meta Ads Leadership (Most Critical)

• Manage and scale large-budget Meta Ads campaigns

• Architect structured campaign systems designed for scale

• Plan ad angles, hooks, positioning, and creative strategy

• Write high-converting direct-response copy

• Produce graphic and video ad creatives (for ads)

• Execute disciplined A/B testing frameworks

• Optimize based on cost per qualified lead and full-funnel data



You must have proven, hands-on experience managing significant ad budgets.



Landing Page Optimization (Squarespace)

• Optimize and improve our existing landing page (
)

• Increase conversion rates through structured experimentation

• Refine messaging clarity and CTA effectiveness

• Improve user journey and reduce friction

• Ensure advanced tracking accuracy



Future scope may include additional landing pages and funnel expansion as we scale.



 Marketing & Lead Management (HubSpot)

• Build and optimize structured
 nurture systems

• Segment and organize both new and existing leads

• Implement disciplined tagging and CRM organization

• Improve engagement and conversion rates

• Maintain clean, scalable list architecture

• Ensure seamless handoff of qualified leads



Analytics, Tracking & Attribution

• Implement advanced tracking systems (Pixel, CAPI, UTM strategy)

• Maintain CRM attribution clarity from click to handoff

• Analyze full-funnel performance, not surface metrics

• Identify bottlenecks and propose structured improvements

• Document A/B tests and build repeatable optimization frameworks



Marketing Leadership & Innovation

• Proactively propose innovative growth strategies

• Stay current with emerging trends, tools, platforms, and advertising strategies

• Evaluate new opportunities and recommend adoption when appropriate

• Serve as the internal authority on paid growth and performance marketing

• Guide leadership decisions with data and informed insight



You are not just executing campaigns.



You are setting direction.



--------------------------------------------------------------



Who You Are:



You are driven by growth, ownership, and long-term impact.

• Proven, hands-on experience managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Deep understanding of direct-response marketing and buyer psychology

• Ability to independently plan creative angles and performance strategy

• Strong copywriting and positioning skills

• Comfortable producing ad creatives when required

• Strong analytical thinking and disciplined testing mindset

• Structured in documentation and optimization

• Accountable for measurable outcomes

• Continuously learning and staying ahead of platform changes and trends



Highly Ideal:

• Real estate marketing experience

• Experience promoting brokerages to attract agents

• Experience generating buyer and seller leads

• Understanding how to position real estate services competitively



Requirements:

• Demonstrated success managing large Meta Ads budgets

• Strong landing page optimization experience

• Advanced analytics and tracking knowledge

• Experience using HubSpot for segmentation and
 marketing

• Experience implementing structured A/B testing systems

• Reliable remote setup



Bonus If You Have:

• SEO experience

• Google Ads experience

• AI tools and automation knowledge

• Zapier or workflow automation experience

• Advanced CRM tagging and list organization skills



--------------------------------------------------------------



What We Offer:

• A long-term opportunity inside a scaling North American proptech platform

• Direct collaboration with founders

• Meaningful ownership of paid acquisition performance

• The opportunity to architect and refine the company’s growth engine

• Clear path toward future Head of Marketing

• Real influence on continental expansion



We are building a team designed to scale.



The platform is expanding.

The systems are strengthening.

The ambition is long-term.



We are looking for someone who sees themselves not just as a marketing manager — but as the growth leader who helps steer the direction of a North American real estate platform.



--------------------------------------------------------------



How to Apply



Send the following to:

• Portfolio (required)

• Intro video (preferred)

Subject Line: Performance Marketing Manager – Your Name



NOTE: Failure to follow the application instructions exactly will result in disqualification. Attention to detail matters, and the application process reflects the level of discipline we value.



If you are ready to take the helm of our growth engine and help build the future of real estate in North America, we want to hear from you.

title: Executive Assistant to Chief Marketing Officer (Part-Time | Remote)
description:

title: Remote Solar Appointment Setter
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We're a growing solar sales company looking for a motivated appointment setter to join our remote team. You'll be making outbound calls and sending texts to homeowners in the US to set appointments for our solar consultants. This is a real opportunity to grow with a small, fast-moving team — top performers earn well above base pay.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Call and text homeowners in the US using provided lead lists

Qualify homeowners using a simple script (we provide full training)

Schedule consultations and confirm appointments using a shared calendar

Log activity in a simple daily tracker (calls made, contacts reached, appointments set)

Attend short daily check-ins via Zoom or messaging



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Clear, confident English — you must be comfortable talking on the phone with Americans

Previous experience in outbound sales, telemarketing, or appointment setting is a strong plus — but not required if you're coachable and hungry

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

Able to work US business hours (PST or EST preferred)

Self-starter who can follow a script but also thinks on their feet



PAY & BONUSES



Base pay

$4–$5 / hr

Per qualified appointment

Bonus — TBD

Payment method

Weekly via Wise

Top setters can realistically earn significantly above base through bonuses. This is a performance-first role — we reward results.

TOOLS PROVIDED



TextNow (calling & texting)

Google Sheets (tracking)

Google Calendar (scheduling)

Zoom (team check-ins)

Full script & training



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, please send a short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you'd be a great fit for this role. Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.



Also include: your resume or a brief work history, your available hours, and your internet speed (attach a Speedtest screenshot).

title: Customer Service Representative / Client Relationship Manager
description:
Job description: We are a Disability and Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing workplace!



The Company: We are a Disability Tax Credit / Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC, Canada. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing work environment! Swift Disability Services assists Canadians in applying for and obtaining approval of the Disability Tax Credit. We work closely with Canadians and their medical professionals to ensure the highest chances of success in what could result in over $45,000 in payments from the CRA to deserving Canadians. We have helped Canadians collect more than $35,000,000 in tax refunds within the last 3 years!



Our mission is to make a meaningful impact on the lives of as many Canadians as possible. We have a built a reputation of unparalleled customer service, leveraging technology and automation to create a more enjoyable experience for our customers and make lives easier for our staff. At Swift, we understand that our people are our most important asset!





The Position:

We are dedicated to building a team of high-performing individuals. We are looking for individuals to join our team in the role of Client Relationship Manager. This position is similar to that of a call-center agent. We are looking for individuals who have a proven ability to go above and beyond in order to excel in their position and drive value for a business. We are looking for individuals who are reliable, can handle 100+ calls per day, and can provide exceptional customer service to our clients.



We’re looking to add multiple Client Relationship Managers (sales staff) to our team.



The position will include:

• $5 CAD per hour (dependent on experience), paid bi-weekly via Paypal

• Target Based Commission / Additional Incentives

• Extensive Training and Support

• 40 hours/week required (Mon – Fri, 8AM – 4:30PM, PST)

• Business casual dress code





Position Requirements:

• High-Volume Call Management: High-performing individual with a proven ability to exceed targets and expectations, with comfortability handling 100+ inbound/outbound calls per.

• Clear and Effective Communication: Exceptionally proficient in both written and verbal English communication to convey information clearly and effectively.

• Versatility and Proactive Mindset: Eagerness to tackle diverse tasks with a can-do attitude and a willingness to assist wherever needed. Is okay with "repetitive" work.

• Compassionate Client Support: Passion for supporting individuals in need and contributing to meaningful change in their lives.

• Self-Initiated Learning: Demonstrated ability to swiftly grasp new concepts in a multi-faceted role and self-motivate for continuous learning.

• Masterful Organization: Strong organizational skills to efficiently manage multiple tasks and responsibilities simultaneously.

• Proficiency in Administrative Tasks: Aptitude in data entry, filing, and performing tasks with a high level of accuracy.

• Meticulous Attention to Detail: Exceptional ability to maintain accuracy and precision in all tasks. In your application, please let us know your favourite summer activity – aside from getting to know you better, this will tell us if you have read the ad carefully!

• Proficiency in Office 365 Suite: Advanced understanding and utilization of Office 365 applications including Word, Excel (advanced skills), Outlook, and Sharepoint.

• Administrative Experience: Prior experience in an office/call center/sales or virual assistant role is required.

• Medical Industry Knowledge (Preferred): Experience or familiarity with medical terminology or healthcare environments is an asset.





Basic Technical Requirements:

• Effective Work Environment: Ensure a dedicated, organized, and ergonomically suitable workstation conducive to productivity and free of distractions. This includes having your own reliable laptop/desktop computer with 8GB RAM and Chrome installed.

• Hardware Capacity: Adequate space on your laptop/desktop computer to efficiently download and run various software required for the job.

• Internet Connection: Maintain a consistent and stable internet connection of at least 10MBPS, along with a backup internet option.

• Equipment: An ideal setup includes the availability of a dual monitor configuration and noise-canceling headset/headphones for an optimal working experience.





Main Responsibilities:

Reporting to the General Manager, the CRM/DTC Specialist is responsible for (1) Making outbound calls to identify individuals who meet the criteria and (2) sending and collecting completed onboarding forms required in order for us to move forward with their claim. Some of the key activities involved in this role are:



• Answering phones and making outbound calls

• Onboarding new clients based on qualification criteria

• Following up on new customer leads via phone, text, and

• Following up on e-documents sent to prospective clients

• Effectively moving clients through each step of the DTC process

• Striving to beat daily, weekly, and monthly targets





Why Should You Apply?

• You want to be part of a fast-growing and fast-paced business, with opportunities for advancement and a long-term career

• You are a high-performing individual with strong attention to detail

• You want a stable job with a competitive wage

• You want to make meaningful impact on the lives of Canadian individuals and families

• You are a positive person who wants to join a fun and friendly work environment





Job Type: Full-time

How to Apply: Attach resume and cover letter

Salary: $5 CAD per hour (dependent on experience)

Schedule: 8 hour shift

Supplemental pay types: Bonus pay

Education: Bachelor's Degree (preferred)

Experience: Administrative, minimum 1 year (required)

Experience: Medical/Health, minimum 1 year (required)

title: Part-Time Video Editor - Interview & Storytelling (Real Estate / Local Business Content)
description:
I run a real estate media company in Kansas City called Carlson Home Photography. One of our content series is called Business Highlights - short 90-120 second videos where a local real estate agent sits down with business owners at restaurants, coffee shops, and local spots around the city.

These are not B-roll montages. The conversation is the story.

Your job is to watch raw interview footage, find the best 
nts from a real unscripted conversation, weave them together with supporting B-roll, and deliver something that feels genuine and engaging - not like an ad.

The finished videos live on Instagram and need to hold attention from the first second to the last.

This is a part-time, per-video position.



Busy season (March-October): roughly 1-2 videos per month

Slow season (November-February): roughly 1 per month

Pay: $65 per video

Delivery expectation: first cut within 5 business days of receiving footage



What you'll be editing:



Conversational interview footage (two people talking, unscripted)

B-roll of the location, food, atmosphere, and customers

Occasional drone footage of the surrounding area

Real, authentic footage - nothing staged



What the finished video needs to feel like:



Warm and authentic, not corporate or commercial

Quick-paced but thoughtful - every cut should earn its place

The host stays present throughout, not buried under B-roll

Music that fits the mood without overpowering the dialogue

Captions/subtitles included



Who I'm looking for:



Fluent English speaker who can follow a natural conversation and find the best 
nts

Experience editing interview-style, documentary-style, or talking-head content

Strong instincts for pacing, music selection, and storytelling

Comfortable watching reference videos and matching an established tone

Reliable, communicative, and takes ownership of the edit



Who this is NOT a good fit for:



Editors whose work is mostly montages, slideshows, or music-driven clips with no dialogue

Editors who need a script or detailed instructions to make editorial decisions

Editors who are not highly fluent in conversational English



To apply:

Please include a link to at least one sample video that features real interview or conversational footage - not just B-roll. If you don't have a sample like that, this role probably isn't the right fit.

To show that you've read this post in full, please include the phrase "Kansas City" somewhere in your application message.

I do offer a small paid test project before committing long-term, so strong applicants who don't have a perfect sample are still welcome to reach out.

title: Remote Operations & Accounting Manager (Retail Inventory & Bookkeeping)
description:
Company: Confidential

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time 



About Us & What We're Seeking:



We're a is a fast-growing jewelry retail brand with kiosk locations in major shopping malls. We currently operate multiple locations and plan to expand to several dozen stores across the United States within the next 12 months.



As we scale, we are building strong operational systems behind the scenes. We’re looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Full-Time Remote Operations & Accounting Manager to oversee bookkeeping, inventory systems, and back-of-house operations. This is a critical role supporting the CEO, COO, and store managers to ensure our financials, inventory, and reporting stay accurate as the business grows.



This is a full-time position, 40 hours per week. This position will require your full undivided attention during working hours. 



Key Responsibilities



Accounting & Financial Management:

- Maintain and reconcile company financials in QuickBooks

- Perform weekly bank and credit card reconciliations

- Allocate expenses and revenue correctly across multiple store locations

- Track and manage inventory value and cost of goods sold

- Maintain clean books and prepare reports for leadership

- Support payroll processing through Gusto

- Assist with monthly financial reporting and P&L review by location



Inventory Management

- Maintain accurate inventory tracking across all retail locations using Square Retail

- Monitor low stock alerts and generate weekly restock reports using Square Retail 

- Create location-specific inventory reports for store managers

- Prepare pick & pack inventory sheets for headquarters shipments

- Track inventory transfers between locations

- Ensure inventory costs are properly recorded in QuickBooks



Operations Support

- Coordinate communication between HQ and store managers

- Assist with supplier relations and purchase orders

- Place inventory orders with vendors when stock levels require

- Maintain operational spreadsheets and dashboards

- Help develop and improve internal systems as the company scales



Team Coordination

- Communicate with store managers regarding inventory needs

- Support the CEO, COO, and leadership team with operational tasks

- Help maintain organized documentation and SOPs

- Identify operational inefficiencies and suggest improvements



Our Ideal Candidate: 



- You are extremely organized, proactive, and comfortable managing both numbers and operational systems.

- You thrive in fast-growing companies where processes are still being built.



Required Experience: 



- Strong experience with QuickBooks

- Experience with bank reconciliation and bookkeeping

- Experience managing inventory in retail or ecommerce

- Experience with Square Retail or comparable POS software

- Strong Google Sheets / Excel skills

- Excellent written and verbal communication

- Highly organized and detail oriented



Preferred Experience



- Experience supporting multi-location retail businesses

- Familiarity with Gusto payroll

- Experience with inventory systems or POS integrations

- Experience working with U.S.-based companies

- Experience supporting fast-growing startups



Compensation: 

Competitive compensation based on experience. Long-term opportunity with a rapidly growing retail brand.



To Apply - Please include:

- A brief introduction about your experience

- Your experience with QuickBooks and inventory management

- What are you looking for and what is your current work situation?

- Your availability and hourly rate

title: Real Estate Marketing & Project Coordinator
description:
Real Estate Marketing & Project Coordinator



We’re a dynamic real estate company based in Atlanta with over 20 years of experience — and we’re growing fast. Our ecosystem of businesses spans real estate brokerage, investment, property management, and renovations. We’re a small, ambitious team that works hard, moves fast, and celebrates wins together.



We’re looking for a creative, organized, and growth-minded Real Estate Marketing & Project Coordinator to help turn our projects and daily operations into powerful marketing that brings in new business. If you love connecting ideas to results, building brand visibility online, and using smart marketing to generate real leads, we’d love to meet you.



What You’ll Do

- Social & Content: Build and grow our presence across
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and LinkedIn. Design eye-catching content in Canva, edit short-form videos (Reels/TikTok-style), and write engaging captions that reflect our voice and brand across multiple companies.

- Lead Generation: Be proactive in turning online conversations into opportunities. Connect with people in
 groups, reply to inquiries, and follow up on social leads to help grow our business.

- Project Execution: Work closely with our CEO and Operations Manager to bring marketing ideas to life. From concept to completion, help transform strategy into action and measurable results.

- Leverage AI & Tools: We believe in working smarter. Use AI tools for research, copywriting, and efficiency — blending technology with creativity to get things done efficiently.



Who You Are

- Smart & Curious: You love learning and are always looking for better, faster, or more creative ways to do things.

- Autonomous & Accountable: You take ownership, follow through without needing constant direction, and manage multiple projects like a pro.

- Resourceful Problem Solver: When tech or workflow challenges pop up, you find solutions and keep things moving.

- Design-Minded: You care about clean, modern design and know how to present our brands as high-end and trustworthy.

- Strong Communicator: You write clearly, speak confidently, and can turn complex ideas into clear, engaging communication.



The Details

Pay: Starting at $4/hour, paid biweekly

Growth: This is a long-term position with room to grow in both responsibility and pay as we scale



To Apply

Please follow the steps below carefully:

- Briefly describe your experience with social media content creation, graphic design, and lead generation.

title: Pay-per-click (PPC) Specialist
description:
We are a US based digital marketing agency specializing in dental and healthcare marketing. We manage marketing for dozens of healthcare practices across the United States and are seeking a highly experienced Google Ads specialist to manage campaigns at scale.



Most of our accounts have ad budgets between $1,000 and $5,000 per month, with the average around $2,000–$2,500.



This role requires someone with expert-level PPC and tracking experience. Our goal is not clicks or impressions. Our goal is qualified patient leads for our clients.



Responsibilities



Manage and optimize campaigns inside a Google Ads Manager Account (MCC)



Manage approximately40- 50+ accounts efficiently



Implement and manage advanced conversion tracking

title: Service Desk Dispatcher
description:
About Koine Ventures



Koine Ventures Inc. is a technology holding company that owns and supports multiple Managed Service Providers (MSPs). Our portfolio companies deliver managed IT and cybersecurity services to organizations that rely on secure and reliable technology infrastructure.



We are building a centralized operations team to help streamline service delivery across our MSP portfolio. We are seeking an experienced Service Desk Dispatcher who understands MSP workflows and can help coordinate incoming support requests, technician assignments, and service desk operations.



Role Overview



The Service Desk Dispatcher serves as the coordination hub for incoming support requests across our MSP service desks. This role is responsible for ticket intake, triage, and dispatching work to the appropriate technical teams while ensuring service requests are documented accurately and handled within SLA expectations.



This role is ideal for someone with prior MSP service desk or dispatcher experience who is comfortable managing ticket queues, coordinating technicians, and keeping service operations running smoothly in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities

1. Ticket Intake & Dispatch

- Serve as the first point of contact for inbound helpdesk requests via phone,
, and ticketing system.

- Create and document support tickets with clear and accurate technical details.

- Triage and prioritize tickets based on urgency, impact, and SLA requirements.

- Dispatch tickets to the appropriate technicians based on expertise, availability, and workload.



2. Service Desk Queue Management

- Monitor the PSA ticket queue to ensure tickets are assigned and progressing toward resolution.

- Track SLA response and resolution timelines and escalate issues when needed.

- Maintain clean and organized ticket documentation within the PSA system.



3. Technician Coordination

- Coordinate technician schedules for remote sessions and onsite visits.

- Balance ticket distribution to maintain technician productivity and service efficiency.

- Assist service desk leadership with workload management and dispatch coordination.



4. Client Communication

- Provide clients with clear and professional updates regarding ticket status.

- Ensure all communication and updates are properly documented within the PSA platform.



Qualifications

- Required

> Experience working in an MSP or IT service desk environment

> 1–3 years of service desk coordination, dispatcher, or helpdesk operations experience

> Experience with PSA tools such as Autotask, or similar platforms

> Strong understanding of ticket triage, queue management, and SLA prioritization

> Excellent communication and organizational skills



- Preferred

> Experience supporting multi-client MSP environments

> Familiarity with remote support operations and technician dispatch workflows

> Understanding of common IT service desk issues and terminology



What Success Looks Like



First 30 Days: Confidently managing helpdesk intake and understanding service desk workflows across MSP operations.

First 60 Days: Independently triaging and dispatching tickets while maintaining an organized service queue.

First 90 Days: Fully owning dispatch coordination and helping maintain efficient service delivery across the MSP service desk.



When applying, please submit your video introduction, resume, and answer the following questions:



1. Please describe your experience working in a Managed Service Provider (MSP) environment. Include the company type, your role, and how long you worked there.



2. Which PSA or ticketing platforms have you used to manage service desk tickets and queues? Please list the systems and briefly describe your experience with them.



3. Have you been responsible for monitoring and dispatching a live helpdesk queue?

If yes, describe how many technicians you supported and how you balanced workload and SLA priorities.



4. This is a full-time remote position requiring availability during U.S. business hours, a wired internet connection, and a quiet workspace. Can you confirm you meet these requirements?

Conversion rate improvement



Launch success rate

title: Visual/Motion Graphics Editor ($1,100 - $1,600+ DOE)
description:
I have a pickleball coaching company called The Pickleball Lab: pickleballlab.co - and I am looking for a new editor, visual graphics editor and junior level graphic designer. My old editor had to resign due to personal reasons.



Our main revenue focus is on our coaching platform - 
 (look at it in desktop, mobile is a work in progress). It's a place where people who want to get better at pickleball can come and take our online courses, get direct coaching fro
, and participate in a community of other pickleball players all trying to get better.



This is where you pick up.



My editor has 4 main roles:



1) Edit instructional videos for the The Pickleball Lab platform

2) Edit videos for YouTube/Social (and create any graphic design elements needing to be animated) - things like instructional videos, our podcast, etc.

3) Odd and end editing work like - put together b roll segments so when we need b roll we can go through and pick out what we need, edit social video ads I create and shoot for you, put together b roll of pro film to help me get better as a pickleball player, etc. (basically all the skills needed for 1 and 2 above, just different use cases)

4) Odd and end graphic design like editing photos, creating basic thumbnails, creating different logo color schemes of our already existing logo, AI photo generation, etc. Basically any junior level graphic design work, any senior level graphic design work like logo creation, t shirt design creation, etc. I hire out to a senior level graphic designer. This work is relatively uncommon compared to the editing work but it does happen so you need to be prepared to be a team player on this.



And while the main revenue focus is the platform, editing videos is pretty easy. There's hardly any visual graphic work necessary. It's literally just simple video editing ie cutting the video together, and adding the intro.



YouTube is where you're really going to flex your editing skills, because our YT channel is where the main visual graphic work comes in. If you can't do visual graphic work in AE, this is not the job for you, as mentioned. Your base proficiency in editing should be the ability create this entire video on your own:







Our YT videos are heavy visual graphic editing as you can tell. If you can't do all of this visual graphic work, do not apply.



If you can, continue to read below:



I've been doing this for 2 years now and we've had to make some pivots long the way. Our first goal was to just get our youtube channel up and running. Then we deviated from that for me to start doing local coaching. That went well and we grew into the online platform. This online platform took a lot of time to get up and running. We have (if I remember correctly) over 40 videos in there now. The platform has essentially no paying members yet, which is to be expected. We've just started more or less. But we do have around 20 members, most are not active. We're a work in progress.



So, your job will be a mix of helping edit the content I shoot for the platform and then helping me build the brand via YT and social video marketing, with that heavy emphasis on visual graphic work.



If you play pickleball or even tennis or ping pong, that is an added bonus. It will make the edits that much better. You'll understand more and know what to do to make the video a high quality video. But if you don't, that's certainly not required. A good visual graphics editor is a good visual graphics editor.

 

Full time starting at $1,100 - $1,600 USD a month and can go up based on experience.

 

Again, I have to stress this, if you do not have extensive experience in adobe after effects or a similar motion graphic creator, please do not apply. I keep getting applications from people who can't do this high level of editing. I am looking for good visuals that will need to be done in AE or similar. Also, you will need great graphic design to create a lot of these assets. So, if you can't do this as well, please do not apply.

 

When you apply send me:



1. Monthly fee you require for full time



2. How many hours does "full time" mean to you? 40, 60, etc.?



3. At full time, how many YouTube videos (with heavy graphic work like the example I gave you) can you edit a month? (each video will be 5 - 12 minutes on average as well as a thumbnail created)



4. Are you open to doing a 1 minute test project so I can see your skills? You may watermark the video.

 

5. Do you play pickleball, tennis, ping pong or any other sports?

 

6. Look at our video again: 
 - can you do this type of visual graphic work?

 

7. Do you have extensive experience in Adobe After Effects or motion graphics software? If so, detail your experience here. If not, please do not apply.

 

8. Send me 1-2 videos with your best motion graphic work in AE or similar.

 

9. Why do you think you'd be a good fit for this project?

 

10. Any other information you think would be helpful

 

Looking forward to speaking with you!

title: Dental insurance verification/Dental assistant
description:
The Dental Insurance Verification Specialist is responsible for verifying patients’ dental insurance eligibility, benefits, and coverage prior to scheduled appointments. This role ensures accurate financial estimates are provided to patients and supports the front office and billing team in reducing claim denials and delays.





Key Responsibilities

 • Verify patient dental insurance eligibility and benefits before appointments.

 • Contact insurance companies via online portals or phone to confirm:

 • Coverage start and end dates

 • Deductibles and remaining benefits

 • Annual maximums

 • Waiting periods

 • Frequency limitations (cleanings, exams, X-rays)

 • Coverage percentages for procedures

 • Enter verified insurance information into the practice management system.

 • Prepare treatment cost estimates for patients based on verified benefits.

 • Identify procedures that require pre-authorizations or pre-determinations.

 • Communicate insurance details and financial responsibility to front desk and treatment coordinators.

 • Follow up on incomplete or unclear insurance information.

 • Maintain accurate documentation of verification notes.

 • Assist with insurance questions from patients and staff.



Qualifications

 • Experience in a dental office or medical billing environment preferred.

 • Knowledge of dental insurance terminology such as:

 • PPO plans

 • Deductibles

 • Annual maximums

 • Frequency limitations

 • Downgrades

 • Familiarity with dental practice software such as:

 • Dentrix

 • Open Dental

 • Eaglesoft

 • Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

 • Excellent communication and phone skills.

 • Ability to multitask in a fast-paced dental office.



Will also help with patient reactivation by calling patients to get them back on the schedule.

title: $8,000 From ONE Partnership - Need Crypto Network, Not Experience (Remote BD)

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.

 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

title: Guest Experience Agent
description:
Location: Fully Remote-Friendly (must have reliable internet and computer)

Type: Full-Time | Part-Time 

Department: Guest Experience 



About the Role:

We are a short-term rental hospitality company managing a portfolio of properties in the Nashville, TN area! Our Guest Experience team is the heartbeat of our operation — the first point of contact for guests from the 
nt they book through the 
nt they check out.

We're looking for someone who is organized, communicative, and calm under pressure. You don't need to have all the answers — you need to know how to find them quickly and communicate them clearly.



What You'll Do:

Respond to guest inquiries across multiple platforms (Airbnb, VRBO, 
, Marriott, and direct bookings) in a timely, professional, and on-brand manner

Manage reservations, modifications, and special requests through our property management system (Guesty)

Reference and navigate digital guest resources including property Digital Welcome Books (Touchstay), locate property info in our software systems (VRS/Operto Teams), and listing details to accurately answer guest questions

Coordinate with the maintenance and operations teams to report and follow up on guest-reported issues, following established communication workflows

Process and communicate early check-in/late checkout requests, fee collection, and other reservation adjustments

Assist with upsells and guest add-ons as applicable

Flag and escalate documentation gaps (missing property info, outdated listing details) to the operations team

Maintain accurate records and notes within our communications systems for guest interactions and follow-ups



Systems & Tools You'll Work In:

Guesty — primary PMS for reservations, guest messaging, and payment management

Airbnb, VRBO, 
, Marriott — OTA platforms for guest communication and reservation management

Touchstay — digital guest welcome books and property manuals

VRS/Operto Teams (View House Info) — property reference database

Comfort with learning new platforms as the tech stack evolves





What We're Looking For:

Strong written communication — clear, concise, and warm

Ability to navigate multiple systems simultaneously to find accurate information

Detail-oriented with a high standard for accuracy in guest-facing communication

Calm and solution-focused when handling guest concerns or complaints

Self-directed — you don't need hand-holding, but you know when to ask for help

Comfortable with a fast-paced, high-message-volume environment 

Prior hospitality, guest services, or customer support experience preferred

Familiarity with short-term rental platforms a plus





Why Join Us:

Be part of a tight-knit, growing team that genuinely cares about the guest experience

Work with a modern, tech-forward hospitality operation

Opportunity to grow with the company as we scale

Flexible scheduling options

And most of all— we are EPIC and AWESOME! 



To apply, please submit your resume and a brief note with your availability and your experience working with customers or guests.

title: Video Editor
description:
Here’s a quick video sharing why you may want to work with me!  
 



Role Overview:

I’m looking for a reliable and creative Video Editor to join our team and help turn raw footage into engaging videos for platforms like YouTube, social media, and our website. In this role, you’ll edit clips, add simple transitions, graphics, and titles, and make sure the video and audio look and sound great. You’ll also help keep project files organized and export videos in the right format for each platform. You’ll work with our team to make revisions based on feedback and help keep projects moving forward on time.



Requirements:

*Must be able to work 20 hours weekly

*Must be able to work any fixed 4-hour block between 9am to 5pm Central Time (US)

*Must have strong written and verbal communication

*Highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and able to manage multiple priorities independently



What You’ll Do:



Must-Have Experience (Responsibilities You Must Be Proficient In)



These are the tasks you need to handle independently and confidently from day one:



Video Editing & Post Production: 

*Import and organize raw footage 

*Assemble raw footage into polished videos for various platforms (YouTube, social media, websites, etc.)

*Cut, trim, and sequence clips to create cohesive narratives

*Add transitions, effects, motion graphics, and titles

*Color correct and color grade footage to ensure visual consistency

*Edit audio tracks: adjust levels, remove noise, add sound effects or music

*Sync audio and video, including voiceovers and interviews

*Export videos in multiple formats and resolutions optimized for platform requirements

*Create and maintain video templates (intros, outros, bumpers) to ensure consistency across the platform/course videos.



Organization:

*Organize and manage digital media files, project files, and archives

*Maintain proper naming conventions and backup projects regularly

*Ensure all assets are ready for post-production, including graphics, stock footage, and audio.

*Receive feedback and make revisions quickly and efficiently

*Ensure deadlines are met for multiple projects simultaneously



Technical & Software Skills:

*Use Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or something similar

*Work with motion graphics tools such as After Effects or Canva

*Apply compression and encoding for different platforms

*Troubleshoot technical issues with footage, formats, or editing software.



Nice-to-Have Experience (Responsibilities You Can Learn Over Time)



These tasks are valuable but can be trained on the job:

*Create logos and icons

*Create PowerPoint presentation decks

*Use LMS and CRM platforms

*Manage social media

*Support lead generation

*Assist with web design/development



Ready to Apply?

1. Message me with the subject “I’m excited to work with you, Aaron!”

2. Add a link to your resume

3. Indicate your contact
 address



If this doesn’t sound perfect but you love hard work and learning, reach out anyway—there’s likely another chance to join my team!

title: SEO Specialist (WordPress + SEMrush | Local SEO)
description:
About Us:

title: Virtual Assistant for U.S. Cleaning Company, Customer Support, CRM, Scheduling
description:
Virtual Assistant 



Job Title

Virtual Assistant for U.S. Cleaning Company, Customer Support, CRM, Scheduling



Job Overview

*Must be able to speak English Well ** This must be your only full-time job - please do not apply if you work for multiple people at one time. We are looking for someone to grow with our company long-term. 

Way Finder Cleaning is a well established residential and commercial cleaning company based in Colorado, USA. We are looking for a reliable and detail oriented Virtual Assistant to support our team with customer communication, lead management, and job entry inside our scheduling system.



Experience working with a cleaning company, home services business, or CRM platform such as Housecall Pro is strongly preferred.



This role focuses on helping ensure customer inquiries are handled quickly, leads are organized properly, and our scheduling system remains accurate and up to date.



We are looking for someone who is organized, communicates clearly in English, and takes pride in doing things correctly.



Work Schedule

This position works during U.S. Mountain Time business hours.

Typical schedule

**8:00 AM to 4:00 PM USA Colorado Mountain Time**

Night shift Philippines time



Responsibilities

Communication Monitoring

• Monitor the company
 inbox and respond when appropriate or notify the correct tea
mber

• Monitor and reply to Housecall Pro customer messages when appropriate

• Monitor CSRAI call log for incoming calls and messages

• Flag urgent calls or service issues and notify management immediately

• Track missed calls and ensure follow up responses are completed

• Route customer questions or issues to the appropriate manager



Lead Management

• Enter new leads into Housecall Pro from
, website inquiries, or phone calls

• Reply to new lead inquiries using company templates when appropriate

• Assign leads to the correct tea
mber when follow up is required

• Track open leads and notify management if they have not yet received a response

• Send follow up messages to leads who have not responded to estimates or service offers



Job Entry and Scheduling Support

• Enter jobs from
s into Housecall Pro

• Enter service requests into the scheduling system

• Update job notes and customer information inside Housecall Pro

• Tag jobs correctly with service type, notes, and team assignments

• Flag scheduling conflicts or unusual service requests for management review

• Confirm job details when customers send updates or changes



Customer Support

• Respond to basic customer inquiries using approved templates

• Send scheduling confirmations when requested

• Send appointment reminders when appropriate

• Escalate complaints or urgent customer concerns to management immediately

• Ensure customers receive clear communication about their service request



Administrative Support

• Maintain organized digital records of customer communications

• Update customer contact information when new details are received

• Log important communication notes within Housecall Pro jobs

• Assist with organizing incoming service requests by priority

• Maintain a list of unresolved issues that require follow up



Reporting and Daily Updates

• Prepare a short daily summary for management including

• New leads received

• Urgent service requests

• Missed calls requiring follow up

• Open customer issues needing attention



Future Responsibilities

• Send estimate follow up messages to customers who have not responded

• Send review request messages after completed services

• Maintain lead tracking reports if needed



Qualifications

• Excellent written English communication

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow procedures and instructions carefully

• Reliable internet connection and computer

• Ability to work during U.S. business hours

• Experience with CRM software preferred

• Experience with Housecall Pro or similar service industry platforms is a strong plus

• Experience supporting cleaning companies or home service businesses is highly valued



Compensation

Competitive hourly pay based on experience. Opportunities for long term work and growth within the company.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application.

• A short introduction about yourself

• Your previous experience as a Virtual Assistant

• Any experience working with cleaning companies or home service businesses

• Your experience using CRM systems such as Housecall Pro



To confirm that you carefully read this job post, please begin your application with the words

"Mountain Fresh Confirmed I Have Read Application"

Applications that do not include this phrase may not be considered.



We look forward to finding a reliable tea
mber who wants to grow with our company.
