title: HR - Quality Assurance Analyst
description:
We are Looking for a HR - Quality Assurance Analyst to implement compliance protocols and improve business proccess improvement for the whole team: 



Responsibilities:

 

Regular People Support & Communication

- Conduct regular check-ins with remote VAs to ensure satisfaction, clarify concerns, and escalate issues as needed

- Serve as a trusted HR contact for aVAs throughout their tenure, providing ongoing support and guidance

- Drive employee engagement efforts, both actively and passively, to foster retention and morale

 

HR Administration & Documentation

- Maintain accurate HR records, including check-ins, contract changes, attendance logs, and documentation of issues and escalations

- Track and manage changes related to PTO, attendance, bonuses, salary increases, and medical stipends

- Handle Certificate of Employment (COE) requests, process resignations and terminations, and manage all related paperwork



Policy Implementation & Compliance

- Monitor and enforce company and client-specific attendance, PTO, and performance policies

- Support the development and roll-out of updated HR and administrative policies



 Employee Lifecycle & Support

- Process contract adjustments, performance-related escalations, and HR interventions

- Provide support throughout the employee lifecycle, from onboarding handover to exit processes

- Participate in performance check-ins, provide feedback support to clients, and track outcomes

 

Continuous Process Improvement

- Identify opportunities to enhance the employee experience and recommend improvements to HR procedures

- Assist in creating and updating HR materials, templates, and internal documentation

- Stay informed about HR trends and best practices in remote workforce management



Qualifications: 

- Minimum 3 years of experience in HR support or generalist roles, ideally in a VA setting

- Experience creating or improving HR support processes

- Exposure to VA onboarding and offboarding workflows

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills in English

- Familiarity with attendance tracking, policy enforcement, and employee issue resolution and employee engagement

- Proficient in Google Workspace, Slack, Zoom, Microsoft Office

- Strong organizational, time management, and documentation skills

- Ability to work independently in a fast-paced, remote environment

- Must be willing to work full-time during U.S. Pacific Time business hours (with flexibility if needed)

title: VSL Video Editor
description:
Fascial Labs is a fast-growing health supplement brand looking for a hungry, passionate video editor to produce 90-180 second VSL (Video Sales Letter) ads for Meta 
/Instagram) in 9:16 format.



How it works:



We provide the script. You handle voiceover sourcing and all editing. We have an extensive clip library you can pull from, but you're encouraged to find additional footage when it makes the content hit harder.

What we're looking for:



Someone who understands direct response video — pacing, pattern interrupts, text overlays, retention hooks, and how to keep a viewer locked in for 90+ seconds. Experience in health, wellness, or supplement advertising is a plus but not required. What matters most is that you have a sharp eye, care about the craft, and want to get better with every edit.

The opportunity:



This isn't a one-off gig. We test multiple ad angles weekly and can provide as much work as you want. Your schedule is completely flexible — what matters is the output, not when you do it. Pay is per minute of finished VSL content, with significant performance bonuses when your edits drive results. The better you get, the more you earn.



If you're the kind of editor who obsesses over why one cut converts and another doesn't — and you want to grow alongside a brand that's scaling fast — we want to hear from you.

title: Distributor Portal & Deduction Specialist (Remote - Philippines)
description:
About Us:

MarginWiz is a fast-growing AI-powered platform that helps CPG (consumer packaged goods) brands recover money lost to distributor deductions. We work with brands selling through major US distributors including UNFI, KeHE, Kroger, Walmart, and Target. We are a small, high-performance team that moves fast and takes pride in accuracy.

What You Will Do:



Log into distributor portals daily (UNFI, KeHE, Kroger, Target, Walmart) to download deduction backup documents

Upload and organize documents into our system following a detailed runbook

Submit dispute filings into distributor portals on behalf of our clients

Cross-reference deduction reports to identify discrepancies and missing items

Flag anything that looks off before moving forward, we reward people who catch problems early

Communicate clearly with our team via Slack during overlap hours



You Are a Great Fit If:



You have a background in bookkeeping, accounting, or data processing

You have experience working inside web-based portals and following SOPs

You are obsessively detail-oriented, catching errors others miss is your superpower

You take ownership and go the extra mile without being asked

You are available to work at least 4-5 hours overlap with US Pacific time (8am-1pm PST)

Your written English is strong and professional



This Is NOT a Good Fit If:



You need constant supervision to stay on task

You are uncomfortable with repetitive, process-driven work

You prefer creative or open-ended projects over structured systems

title: Meta Ads Video Director / Script Writer (Not Video Editor!)
description:
Job Title: Creative Script Director (Meta Ads & Direct Response Video)



We are a fast-growing Shopify brand, and we are looking for a lethal Creative Script Director to take full ownership of the scripting and concept development behind our Meta and Instagram ad creatives. Your core focus will be engineering high-converting video concepts, discovering untapped emotional angles, and writing direct-response scripts that turn scrollers into buyers. We are not looking for video editors—we need a strategist who understands how to build winning ad concepts and translate them into scripts that editors can execute.



You must have a documented track record of writing and conceptualizing winning ads. We want someone who has proven their worth in the trenches—someone who knows exactly what a high-converting hook, video structure, and logical mechanism look like before production even begins. If you have a strong portfolio of profitable video creatives that you personally scripted and planned, and you understand how to drive ROI through Meta ad creative, we want you leading our scripting pipeline.



You will write the scripts, design the creative direction, and work directly with our video editors to bring those concepts to life. The goal is to consistently produce around 6 new ad creatives per day, based on the scripts and concepts you develop. Your job is to build the ideas, angles, and narratives that turn simple product videos into high-performing ad creatives.

title: Appointment Setter – Warm Inbound Leads | $700–$1,700/mo | Home Security | No Cold Calling
description:
COMPANY: Legacy Alarm – Brinks Home Security Partner

POSITION: Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term

SCHEDULE: Tuesday – Saturday | 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM PST (12:00 AM – 10:00 AM Philippines Time)

BASE PAY: $3.00/hr

PERFORMANCE BONUS: $5 per showed appointment

REALISTIC MONTHLY EARNINGS: $700 – $1,700+/month



WHO THIS IS FOR

This role is for someone who is good on the phone and knows it.

You enjoy real conversations. You know how to handle hesitation without being pushy. You understand that most people need a little guidance before they commit to anything — and you are good at providing that.

If that sounds like you, keep reading.



ABOUT LEGACY ALARM

Legacy Alarm is a U.S.-based home security company and authorized Brinks Home dealer. We serve homeowners across nearly every state in the country and we are growing fast.



We are not a massive call center. We are a small, focused team that takes pride in doing things the right way — for our customers and for the people who work with us. We hire slowly and we invest in the right people for the long term.

If you perform well here, you will be recognized, rewarded, and given a real path forward with us.



ABOUT THE ROLE

Every lead you contact has already requested information about upgrading their home security system. There is zero cold calling.



Your job is simple in concept but requires real skill in execution:



> Call the lead fast

> Build instant rapport

> Qualify them

> Book a confirmed appointment for our closing team



The leads are warm. The scripts and training are provided. What we need from you is the ability to carry a conversation, handle pushback, and get people to show up.



This is not a data entry role. This is not a customer support role. This is a phone sales role and we need someone who is genuinely good at it.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

> Speed to Lead

New leads are contacted immediately by phone, text, and
. First contact speed directly impacts your results and your income.



> Qualify Prospects

Use our proven scripts and training to quickly assess fit and move the conversation forward.



> Handle the Hard 
nts

When a lead says "just send me some information" or "I need to talk to my spouse" or "I'm not really interested anymore" — you don't fold. You know what to say, you keep the conversation alive, and you guide them toward a scheduled appointment.



> Book Confirmed Appointments

Schedule qualified appointments for our sales team with accurate details logged in our CRM.

> Pipeline Management

Update lead statuses and notes in GoHighLevel after every interaction. Clean data is part of the job.



YOUR SCHEDULE

Days: Tuesday – Saturday

Days Off: Sunday and Monday



U.S. Time (PST): 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM

Philippines Time: 12:00 AM – 10:00 AM

Breaks: 11:00 AM – 12:00 PM PST and 2:00 PM – 3:00 PM PST



This is a night shift role. We are upfront about this because we respect your time. Candidates with U.S.-hours remote work experience who are comfortable with this schedule are strongly encouraged to apply. Many strong remote professionals work these hours and find the routine highly rewarding financially.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

We want a sales professional, not a customer support agent. There is a difference and it matters here.

Experience — Minimum 2 years in any of the following:



> Appointment setting

> SDR or BDR roles

> Inbound or outbound phone sales

> High-volume lead follow-up



Communication:



> Excellent spoken English — clear, natural, and confident

> Strong phone presence

> Able to lead a conversation, not just respond to one



Character:



> Punctual and reliable

> Follows process consistently

> Takes ownership of their numbers — not someone who blames the leads





WHY LEGACY ALARM



> Warm leads only — every person you call asked to hear from us first

> Your income grows directly with your performance — no ceiling

> Small professional team — no call center chaos, no micromanagement

> Long-term role — we don't hire to churn, we hire to grow together

> Real advancement — strong performers get noticed and rewarded here





HOW TO APPLY

We receive a high volume of applications. We only review candidates who follow every step below. This is intentional — attention to detail and the ability to follow a process are core requirements of this role.



STEP 1 — MAGIC PHRASE

> Start your application message with the exact phrase: Legacy Growth

***Any application not beginning with this phrase will not be opened.***



STEP 2.1 — VOICE RECORDING SCRIPTED

> Record yourself reading the script below and include the link in your application. This is your phone audition. Speak naturally and confidently as if the lead is actually on the line.



Script:

"Hi, this is [your name] calling for Legacy Alarm. I'm reaching out because you recently requested some information about home security — I just wanted to make sure I connected with you personally. I know you're probably busy so I'll keep it quick. I'd love to learn a little more about what you're looking for and find a time to get you set up with one of our specialists. Does [day] or [day] work better for you?"



STEP 2.2 — VOICE RECORDING ABOUT YOURSELF

> Record a second voice recording. I'd like you to be UNSCRIPTED in this one. I want you to introduce yourself to us. Tell us about your dreams, your goals, what you enjoy, and what you are seeking in your job and career moving forward. Just be natural and like you're talking to your friends or family.



STEP 3 — SCREENING QUESTION

> Answer the following in your application in 3 to 6 sentences:

You call a lead and they say: "I'm not really interested anymore, I was just browsing." What do you say to keep the conversation going?



***Applications missing any of the three steps above will not be reviewed. We appreciate you taking the time and look forward to hearing from strong candidates.***



Thank you for time and interest in Legacy Alarm, we look forward to meeting you!

Jonny, Co-Owner

title: Assistant / Project Manager (AI-assisted)
description:
Overview:

We're a small US-based team building software for the cannabis industry. We're looking for an organized and proactive Assistant / Project Manager who will work directly with the Director of Technology to help coordinate projects, track tasks, and keep development work moving forward. This role focuses on organization, communication, and execution support across engineering, operations, and internal tooling.



Role Description:

You will report directly to the Director of Technology and help manage day-to-day project coordination. Your role is to ensure tasks are organized, specifications are documented, and work progresses smoothly from idea to completion. You will help translate conversations, ideas, and technical discussions into clear documentation and track progress across multiple small projects. We rely heavily on AI-assisted workflows for documentation, research, and operational tasks, so comfort using AI tools to accelerate organization and communication is important. Strong organization, clear communication, and attention to detail matter more than formal project management certifications.



Requirements:

- Reliable internet and 2–4 hours overlap with Pacific Time

- Clear written and spoken English for documentation, updates, and coordination

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

- Ability to follow instructions and maintain structured documentation

- Willingness to learn new tools, workflows, and AI-assisted systems

- Ability to keep multiple small projects organized simultaneously

- Comfortable working directly with technical leadership



Responsibilities:

- Work directly with the Director of Technology to organize priorities and tasks

- Track project progress and follow up on outstanding work

- Organize tickets, notes, and technical specifications

- Convert ideas or conversations into clear written documentation

- Document workflows, systems, and internal processes

- Coordinate between developers, leadership, and operations teams

- Prepare summaries, reports, and project updates

- Assist with research, testing, and operational tasks

- Use AI tools to help write documentation, summarize information, and support project coordination



How We Work:

- Async-first, with occasional sync meetings when needed

- PR-based workflow (GitHub pull requests)

- Small, incremental iterations rather than large rewrites

- AI-assisted workflows for documentation and organization

- Paid trial (3–6 hours) before longer engagement



Interested:

Send a short intro and answers to the following questions:

- Why does this role appeal to you?

- Describe a time you helped organize or coordinate a project

- Describe a time you had to learn a new tool or workflow quickly

title: SALES AND OPERATIONS ASSISTANT FULL-TIME ROLE
description:
Company: Acland Property Services

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full-Time – 8 Hours/Day, 5 Days/Week (Aligned with Australian AEST business hours)

Industry: Construction / Carpentry / Property Services



About Us

Acland Property Services is a Melbourne Australia based carpentry and property services company delivering high-quality residential and light commercial projects. We are growing and looking for a driven, organised, and confident Sales & Operations Assistant to help create/manage leads, schedule jobs, follow up quotes, and support business growth through admin tasks.

This is a long-term full-time role for someone who wants stability, growth, and performance-based bonuses.



Role Overview

You will be the first point of contact for new enquiries and a key driver of sales growth. Your focus will be turning enquiries into booked site visits and confirmed jobs, while also supporting day-to-day admin and scheduling.

This is NOT a passive admin role. This is a results-driven sales support role.



Core Responsibilities

Lead Management & Sales (Primary Focus)

• Monitor and respond to new leads (HiPages, website,
, phone)

• Call all new enquiries within 5–10 minutes

• Qualify leads (budget, timeline, location, job scope)

• Book site visits into calendar

• Follow up all sent quotes (calls + SMS +
)

• Re-engage old leads and past clients

• Maintain and update CRM daily

• Track pipeline and report weekly numbers



Outbound & Business Development

Cold call:

- Real estate agents

- Property managers

- Builders & developers

- Body corporates

- Build and maintain contact lists

- Follow up potential referral partners monthly

- Identify new work opportunities online



Operations & Admin Support

• Managing CRM system

• Job updating

• Answer incoming calls professionally

• Manage shared calendar scheduling

• Prepare basic quote templates (final approval by director)

• Send invoices & payment reminders

• Request Google reviews after completed jobs

• Maintain organised file systems and job records

• Other admin works appointed by the management



Key Performance Expectations (KPIs)

This role is performance-based. Minimum expectations:

• Generate and manage 10+ qualified leads per week

• 100% response to new leads

• All quotes followed up within 24–48 hours

• Calendar booked 1–2 weeks ahead

• Weekly KPI report submitted

• Consistent cold calling activity (minimum daily targets)

Bonuses available based on: your performance within 3 months



Required Skills & Experience

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Confident and professional phone manner

• Previous experience in sales, appointment setting, or construction/trades preferred

• Strong organisational skills

• Experience using CRM or Google Workspace

• High attention to detail

• Self-motivated and proactive

• Reliable internet and quiet workspace



Employment Details

• Full-Time (8 hours/day, 5 days/week)

• Must overlap with Australian business hours (AEST)

• Long-term position – we are looking for someone who will grow with the company for many years to come and get to bigger positions within the company.

• Monthly salary (based on experience)

• Performance bonuses available after probation period



Important: Who This Role Is NOT For

Do NOT apply if:

• You are uncomfortable making phone calls

• You wait for instructions instead of taking initiative

• You dislike sales targets or KPIs

• You are looking for short-term freelance work



Who We’re Looking For

We want someone:

• Hungry to grow with a business

• Comfortable speaking to Australian clients

• Driven by performance results

• Organised and structured

• Interested in long-term stability



How to Apply

Please include:

1. A short video introduction (2–3 minutes)

2. Your previous sales or appointment-setting experience

3. Internet speed test screenshot

4. The word “ACLPS” in your subject line

title: Operations & Growth EA
description:
About Us

The Event Engineer helps entrepreneurs scale to 7-figures and beyond. Led by Lisa Barry, we build high-converting event systems and world-class client experiences. Our mission: helping visionary founders grow wealth that fuels meaningful change.



The Role

We are seeking a high-performance Operations & Growth EA to serve as the "Right Hand" to the founder. You are the bridge between brand exposure and revenue. This is a role for a meticulous, systems-obsessed professional who thrives on organization, logic, and sales conversion. You don't just "manage" tasks; you architect the backend of a 7-figure brand.



Key Responsibilities



1. Sales Conversion & Lead Nurture



DM & Comment Management: Own the DMs and social comments. Nurture leads with high EQ, moving them from followers to booked sales calls.

Pipeline Mastery: Manage the GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM with 100?curacy. Ensure every lead is tagged, tracked, and followed up.

Inbound Sales Support: Identify "Golden Opportunities" in the inbox and DMs to prioritize high-level partnerships for Lisa.



2. Operations, Systems & Cleanup



The "Digital Housekeeper": Organize the Google Drive, clean up the CRM, and ensure all digital assets are easily accessible.

SOP Development: Document every business process into world-class Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).

Project Management: Act as the traffic controller between the Creative Architect, the Tech Guy, and the Developer. Ensure the "Wednesday Drop" happens flawlessly.



3. Executive Support & Calendar Architecture



Zone of Genius Protection: Design Lisa’s schedule to protect her deep-work time. Ensure her calendar is optimized for sales and software development.

Inbox Zen: Triage communication so Lisa only sees what matters. Handle administrative "noise" before it reaches her desk.

Client Onboarding: Support the seamless onboarding of new high-ticket clients to ensure a world-class first impression.



Who You Are



Systems-Minded: You get a dopamine hit from a clean CRM and a perfectly organized folder.

An Owner: You don't wait for a task list. You see a mess and you fix it.

High EQ: You can represent a premium brand to high-level clients with warmth and professionalism.

Proactive: You think three steps ahead. You solve problems before the founder knows they exist.



Qualifications & Skills



Experience: 2–3+ years as an EA or Operations Manager for a high-ticket coach, consultant, or agency.

CRM Proficiency: Experience managing leads and pipelines in GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar high-level CRMs.

Exceptional Communication: Flawless English with a talent for professional, persuasive communication in the DMs.

Project Management: Familiarity with tools like Slack, Trello, or ClickUp to keep a team on track.



Application Requirements



Resume: A professional history of your experience in operations and sales support.

DISC Profile: Please include your results so we can understand your work style.

Portfolio/Case Study: Examples of SOPs you've written or CRMs you've managed.

Growth Example: Tell us about a time you improved a business system or increased lead conversion through better follow-up.



Work Arrangement & Compensation



Remote: 9am – 5pm AEDT

Hours: 40 Hours / Week

Compensation: $1,000 AUD / month (Full-Time)

title: Operations Director
description:
About Zero Interest Mastery



Zero Interest Mastery is a FAST-growing company helping entrepreneurs access funding to launch and scale their businesses. We work with clients across the United States and specialize in innovative funding strategies and delivering a world-class client experience.



This is a FULL TIME role with ability to secure long term employement and growth within a fast growing company. Pay raise will be discussed if performance is satifactory after 90 days.



Join a rapidly growing financial services company currently facilitating over $2M in monthly funding for entrepreneurs across the United States.



Role Overview



We are seeking a highly organized and execution-driven Operations Director to help manage our internal systems, processes, and team performance.



This role is responsible for overseeing daily operations, improving workflows, managing internal systems, and ensuring departments are aligned and operating efficiently as the company grows. The ideal candidate is a systems thinker who thrives in fast-paced environments and can turn strategy into execution.



This role will work directly with the CEO to build and scale the operational infrastructure of the company.



Key Responsibilities



• Oversee and optimize company operations and internal processes

• Manage and improve CRM systems, workflows, and automation (Zoho CRM)

• Lead HR-related operational tasks including new hire onboarding and tea
mber setup

• Oversee employee onboarding, system access, and operational training processes

• Manage internal tools and platforms (CRM, communication tools, scheduling, automation)

• Ensure operational efficiency across departments including sales, fulfillment, and support

• Develop and document SOPs to support team scalability

• Monitor key performance metrics and identify operational bottlenecks

• Lead operational projects and implement systems that improve efficiency and performance



Requirements



• Experience leading operations in a fast-growing company

• Strong understanding of ZOHO CRM and automation tools

• Experience managing systems, workflows, and internal tools

• Exceptional organizational and problem-solving skills

• Ability to build scalable processes and operational infrastructure

• Strong communication and leadership abilities

• Self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced remote environment



Why Join Us



• Work with a fast-growing company helping entrepreneurs succeed

• Be part of a leadership team scaling a high-growth organization

• Flexible remote work environment

• Opportunity to make a significant impact as the company grows



HOW TO APPLY

-Put OPS DIRECTOR in the subject line, attach your resume AND A SAMPLE VIDEO RECORDING of why you should be considered with your specific experience. Make sure I am able to view the resume! Also, please answer the following questions:



Are you able to work full-time?

How old are you?

How many years of experience do you have as an operations director?

What are some big projects you have managed in the past?

What is your greatest strength?

title: Entry-Level Operations Associate / Admin Assistant (No Experience Required | Fresh Graduates | Remote)
description:
Who We Are

We’re (www.storygen.agency/) a rapidly scaling B2B lead generation agency specializing in outbound sales programs powered by cold calling, automation, and AI-driven systems.



Our clients rely on us to build and manage high-performing Business Development Representative (BDR) teams that consistently generate pipeline. While outbound is what we’re known for, strong execution behind the scenes is what makes it all work.



That’s where our Operations team comes in.



The Opportunity

We’re hiring an Operations Associate to help power the systems that keep our client campaigns and BDR teams running seamlessly.



This is a hands-on operations role focused on onboarding, system setup, process execution, and cross-team coordination. You’ll play a critical part in launching new client accounts and ensuring every campaign starts strong.



If you’re highly organized, process-oriented, and excited about systems, automation, and AI tools, this role is for you!



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Campaign & System Setup

- Configure accounts across Google Workspace, Slack, HubSpot, Coda, Nooks, and other platforms

- Set up inboxes, dialers, calendars, and CRM records

- Ensure all outbound tools are fully functional before launch



Client & BDR Onboarding

- Coordinate onboarding timelines with clients and internal teams

- Guide clients through required setup steps

- Prepare and set up accounts for new BDR hires

- Assign BDRs to client accounts and maintain alignment



Operational Execution

- Prepare and QA lead lists for outbound campaigns

- Verify system integrations and data accuracy

- Troubleshoot technical or process-related issues as they arise

- Maintain clean documentation and process checklists



Process & Systems Improvement

- Collaborate with Client Success and BDR Leads on workflow updates

- Support implementation of automation and AI tools

- Identify operational inefficiencies and recommend improvements



What Makes You a Strong Fit

- Extremely detail-oriented with a structured, checklist-driven approach

- Comfortable working across multiple tools and learning new systems quickly

- Organized and capable of managing multiple projects simultaneously

- Strong communicator who can interact professionally with clients

- Proactive problem-solver who takes ownership

- Genuinely interested in operations, automation, and AI systems



This is an entry-level role with real growth potential for someone who wants to build a long-term career in sales operations or systems management.



Work Schedule Details

Full-time (Monday–Friday)

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern Time

Must be available during U.S. business hours

Fully remote



Compensation & Growth

- $1,000 USD/monthly pay

- Structured onboarding and mentorship

- Hands-on training in sales operations, automation, and AI tools

- Clear advancement pathways into senior operations, technical systems, or client-facing roles

- Work with a high-performance, fast-growing team



How to Apply

To maintain a fair and structured hiring process, all candidates must complete the assessment and submit the following in the same link:



- Resume

- Internet speed test result link

- Short Loom audio introduction (questions provided in the link)



Apply here:

title: Part-Time Christian Marketing Assistant & Content Engine - LIFE DAILY
description:

title: SMM, Graphic Design, Video Editing
description:
To apply, please review 
 and send a sample graphic and video from anything on the site.



Social Media Manager, Graphic Designer & Video Editor — The Messaging Lab

We're looking for a creative who can do three things really well... design graphics that stop the scroll, edit video that keeps people watching, and keep our social media running like clockwork.

You won't be writing copy. That's handled. You'll be turning already-written content into scroll-stopping visuals, scheduling it strategically, and making sure everything looks and feels on-brand across every platform.

The Messaging Lab helps conscious creators — coaches, consultants, healers, and course creators — master messaging that connects before it converts. Our brand is warm, direct, and human-first. If you love polished-but-not-sterile design and content that actually says something... keep reading.

What You'll Do

Design on-brand graphics for social posts, carousels, lead magnets, and marketing assets. Edit video content including YouTube videos, short-form clips, and promotional pieces. Schedule and publish pre-written content across LinkedIn, YouTube, and emerging platforms. Repurpose long-form content into platform-specific visual formats. Maintain brand consistency across all visual and video touchpoints. Monitor posting schedules and flag gaps or opportunities. Track performance metrics and report on what's working.

What You Bring

Strong design skills in Canva and/or Adobe Creative Suite. Video editing experience (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar). Experience scheduling and managing social media content calendars. An eye for clean, modern design that feels warm... not corporate. Understanding of platform-specific formatting and best practices — especially LinkedIn and YouTube. Ability to take written copy and translate it into compelling visual content without being told exactly how. You work independently, meet deadlines, and don't need to be micromanaged.

Bonus Points

Experience with YouTube SEO and thumbnail optimization. Familiarity with Adobe Firefly or AI-assisted design tools. Understanding of ethical/conscious marketing spaces. Experience creating visuals for coaches, consultants, or service providers.

About Us

The Messaging Lab is a premium copywriting service built on 14+ years of experience. We combine a private AI copywriter trained on proprietary methodology with personal copy revisions from our founder. Our tagline says it all... "Proving You Can Sell Without Selling Out

title: Automation Specialist
description:
Job Title: Automation Architect – AI & Workflow Systems

Location: Fully Remote

Schedule: Full-Time, Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (No weekends)

Benefits: 13 company holidays aligned with U.S. holiday schedules





Position Overview:

CORE Consulting is seeking an Automation Architect to design and implement automation systems that support both internal operations and client-facing delivery teams. The first project for this role will be to build an AI-powered reporting automation system that converts multiple third-party research reports (e.g., Wood Mackenzie and similar sources) into a structured, client-branded market intelligence report. After this system is implemented, the role will continue building automation across the organization to streamline operations, improve reporting, and reduce manual processes.





Key Responsibilities:

- Design and build automation systems that streamline operational workflows and reporting

- Implement AI-powered document processing and information synthesis workflows

- Build automated reporting pipelines that convert source documents into structured deliverables

- Support internal operations teams and client delivery teams with workflow automation

- Integrate systems across Microsoft 365, AI platforms, and automation tools

- Maintain and improve automation infrastructure over time



Initial Project Scope:

The first assignment will be to develop an automated system that:

- Ingests quarterly research reports (PDF format)

- Extracts insights using AI

- Normalizes data across multiple reports

- Synthesizes cross-source analysis

- Generates a client-branded report automatically



The system will use:

- Microsoft 365 platforms - SharePoint / Microsoft Teams for document intake

- Power Automate for workflow orchestration

- OpenAI APIs for AI extraction and synthesis

- Microsoft Word templates for automated report generation

- Automated Word and PDF output



...The goal is a workflow where users can upload reports and automatically generate a structured draft report.



Required Skills:

- Workflow Automation

- Microsoft Power Automate

- Experience designing multi-step automated workflows

- Microsoft 365

- SharePoint

- Microsoft Teams

- Word template automation

- AI Integration

- Experience integrating AI tools such as OpenAI APIs

- Prompt engineering and structured outputs (JSON)

- AI-assisted document analysis and synthesis

- Document Processing

- Experience extracting structured data from PDF reports

- Building automated document or report generation systems



Requirements:

- Demonstrated experience building automation systems and workflows

- Proven experience working in a fully remote work environment

- Strong problem-solving and systems design skills

- Ability to build reliable automation pipelines with minimal supervision



Ideal Candidate:

- The ideal candidate is an automation engineer or systems integrator who enjoys designing systems that replace manual processes with intelligent automation and can build scalable workflows that support both operations teams and client delivery teams.



Application Requirements:

- Examples of automation systems they have built

- Experience integrating AI tools into workflows

- Examples of document or reporting automation projects

title: Amazon Account Manager
description:
We are seeking an experienced and proactive Amazon Account Manager to oversee the day-to-day operations of our Amazon storefront. The ideal candidate is a problem-solver who understands the behind-the-scenes of Seller Central, from inventory logistics to customer satisfaction and listing health. You will be responsible for ensuring our account remains healthy, our listings stay active, and our stock levels are optimized.



Key Responsibilities

1. Account Health & Case Management

-Monitor daily account health metrics to ensure compliance with Amazon policies.

-Manage and resolve Amazon Cases (SS cases) regarding listing suppressions, brand registry issues, or shipment discrepancies.

-Proactively address any warnings or policy violations.



2. Inventory & Logistics

-Sales Velocity Tracking: Monitor daily/weekly sales trends to forecast future demand.

-Replenishment: Manage FBA shipments and coordinate with our 3PL warehouse to ensure timely stock transfers.

-Stock Monitoring: Maintain a 'Days in Stock' report to prevent stock-outs or excessive long-term storage fees, and track inventory at all 3PLs.



3. Listing Management

-Handle all inventory uploads and flat-file submissions.

-Troubleshoot listing errors (Detail Page Removed, stranded inventory, or hijacked listings).

-Track listing attributes, such as imagery for any potential issues or changes



4. Customer Experience

-Manage all Customer Service inquiries with a high level of professionalism

-Monitor and respond to Feedback and Reviews to maintain a high seller rating.

-Process returns and manage refund claims where necessary.



5. Reporting & Growth

-Provide weekly reports on sales performance, refund rates, and inventory age.

-Identify opportunities for account growth, such as enrolling in new programs (Vine, Small and Light, etc.).

-Monthly Stock Takes



Qualifications

-Experience: 2+ years of experience managing Amazon Seller Central (FBA preferred).

-Tech Savvy: Proficient with Amazon flat files, Helium10 or Jungle Scout, and Excel/Google Sheets/Sellerboard

-Communication: Excellent written English for customer service and case appeals.

-Detail-Oriented: You should be someone who notices a 1% dip in conversion or a stranded unit immediately.



To apply, submit your resume and a short summary of your experience with 3PL-to-FBA workflows and Amazon account management to 
 titled - 'Amazon Account Manager - Location'.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant for Chiropractor
description:
VIRTUAL ASSISTANT — JOB OPPORTUNITY

Davis Family Chiropractic  |  Raleigh, NC  |  Remote Position

Part-Time  |  $4–$6/hr  |  Long-Term Role



About Us

Davis Family Chiropractic is a warm, family-centered chiropractic practice in Raleigh, NC specializing in prenatal care, infant adjustments, the Webster Technique, and tongue-tie support. We are a small but growing practice run by two passionate doctors who care deeply about the families we serve. We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help us grow our online presence and keep our office running smoothly.



The Role

This is a long-term, part-time remote position. You'll work closely with Dr. Davis to handle content creation, digital marketing tasks, and office organization. If you're organized, a strong writer, and genuinely enjoy supporting a mission-driven small business — this role is for you!



Your Responsibilities

You will own the following tasks on an ongoing basis:



Content & Marketing

* Write and send 2–3 patient
 newsletters per month using Flodesk (warm, on-brand copy aligned with our voice)

* Write 2–3 SEO-optimized blog posts per month and publish them on our WordPress website (topics provided or collaboratively chosen)

* Write and schedule 12 Google Business Profile posts per month to boost our local search visibility

* Design supporting graphics and social media visuals using Canva as needed



Organization & Operations

* Label, organize, and maintain our photo library in Dropbox so assets are easy to find and use

* Set up and help implement Notion as an office hub — including building out templates, workflows, and content calendars for our team to use

* Assist with general administrative support tasks as needed (scheduling content, organizing files, light research)



Requirements

Please only apply if you meet ALL of the following:

* Excellent written English — clear, warm, and professional

* Reliable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps)

* Own computer with a working webcam

* Hands-on experience with: Canva, Notion, WordPress, and Flodesk

* Strong attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines consistently

* Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision



Nice to Have

* Experience working with healthcare, wellness, or family-focused brands

* Basic understanding of SEO best practices

* Familiarity with Google Business Profile or local SEO

* Experience with Dropbox or similar file management platforms



Compensation & Details

Pay Rate

$4–$6 per hour (based on experience)



Hours

Part-time, flexible — estimated 10–20 hrs/month to start

Location

Fully remote

Schedule

Flexible, with some availability for check-ins via video call

Start Date

As soon as possible



How to Apply

To be considered, please submit the following with your application:

A brief introduction telling us about yourself and why you're a great fit for this role

Examples of content you've written (blog posts,
s, or social captions preferred)

Screenshots or links showing your experience with Canva, Notion, WordPress, and/or Flodesk

Your availability and current internet speed (please include a screenshot from Speedtest.net)



Along with your writing samples, please answer these three questions in your application:

Which of the tools listed in this job post do you have the most experience with, and how have you used it?

Describe a time you managed multiple tasks or deadlines at once. How did you stay on top of everything?

What is your internet speed, and what is your backup plan if your connection goes down?

To apply,
 your resume and answers to the questions above with the subject line: “YOUR NAME – VA Position – PINEAPPLE”

Applications without “PINEAPPLE” in the subject line will not be reviewed. We look forward to finding our perfect fit!

title: Paralegal
description:
Hello,



We are a U.S.-based legal support company specializing in Service of Process — the formal delivery of legal documents such as Summons, Subpoenas, Eviction filings, Divorce pleadings, and other court-related documents. For more than 30 years, we have supported law firms and legal professionals across the United States.



Our work environment is fast-paced, detail-driven, and accuracy-critical. We work closely with attorneys, paralegals, and court professionals, and precision is essential in everything we do.



We are currently seeking a FULL-TIME remote tea
mber with prior paralegal or legal assistant experience to assist with daily legal operations, document management, and client communications.



This position is intended for applicants with prior experience working in a law firm or legal support environment. 



*** Applications without legal experience will not be reviewed. ***



WORK SCHEDULE (REQUIRED):



Monday–Friday

8:00 AM – 4:30 PM U.S. Central Time (Chicago Time Zone) 



This will require overnight hours in the Philippines, typically:

9:00 PM–5:30 AM or 10:00 PM–6:30 AM depending on U.S. daylight savings adjustments.



Please apply only if you can reliably work these hours long term.



COMPENSATION PROGRESSION:



Month 0–3: $6.00/hr

Month 4–12: $7.00/hr

After 1 year: $8.00–$9.00/hr (performance-based)



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES:



• Reviewing incoming legal service requests and setting up new jobs in our case management database

• Carefully reviewing attorney and paralegal instructions and entering accurate case details

• Updating active cases with service attempts, notes, and status updates

• Assisting with preparation and formatting of Affidavits / Proofs of Service

• Reviewing documents for completeness before filing or delivery

• Updating billing notes and case records

• Monitoring shared
 inboxes and organizing legal communications

• Communicating professionally with process servers, attorneys, and internal staff

• Maintaining strict attention to deadlines and accuracy on active legal matters



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:



• Prior experience working as a Paralegal or Legal Assistant

• Familiarity with legal documents such as summons, subpoenas, affidavits, court filings, or litigation documents

• Strong written English and professional communication skills

• Exceptional attention to detail — accuracy is critical in legal support work

• Comfortable using Gmail, databases, and web-based systems

• Able to follow detailed legal instructions without missing key information

• Professional, dependable, and responsive during scheduled hours



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS:



• Full-time stable position (40 hours/week minimum)

• Hourly pay with performance-based increases

• Paid time off after tenure milestones

• Long-term growth opportunity with a stable U.S. legal services company



IMPORTANT:



This role supports active legal matters where confidentiality, accuracy, and reliability are essential. We are seeking someone who takes pride in precision, consistency, and professional communication.



TO APPLY:



Please include the phrase **AFFIDAVIT OF SERVICE** in the subject line of your application so we know you carefully read the job posting.



Also include:



• Your resume

• Your internet speed details

• Confirmation that you can work the required schedule long term

• In two sentences, briefly describe your experience working with legal documents or supporting attorneys or paralegals



Please do not
 our company directly outside this platform. Our company
 is reserved strictly for client communications and operational matters.



Attention to detail matters: In the final line of your application, include the words **Blue Folder**.



We look forward to finding the right long-term addition to our team.



Thank you.



Troy

title: Director of Technical Delivery / Technical Operations Lead
description:
#Director of Technical Delivery / Technical Operations Lead



**Location:** Fully Remote (U.S. Preferred)

**Type:** Full-Time



## About the Company



We are a fast-growing Managed IT Services Provider (MSP) serving businesses throughout the New York metropolitan region. Our focus is on delivering reliable, secure, and well-managed technology environments for small and mid-sized organizations.



We specialize in Microsoft-first environments, cybersecurity, cloud infrastructure, and responsive IT support that businesses can rely on.



As we continue to grow, we are seeking a **technical leader who can take ownership of technical delivery across the organization**, ensuring that support, projects, and infrastructure standards are executed at a high level.



This is not just another engineering role. This is a **leadership position responsible for driving technical excellence across the company.**



---



# The Role



We are seeking a **Director of Technical Delivery (Technical Operations Lead)** who will oversee the technical execution of services across the organization. This individual will ensure that support tickets, escalations, projects, and infrastructure implementations are delivered efficiently and at a high standard.



You will serve as the **technical backbone of the organization**, mentoring engineers, improving processes, and ensuring clients receive exceptional service.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys **solving complex problems, building systems and processes, mentoring engineers, and ensuring technology environments run smoothly.**



---



# Key Responsibilities



## Technical Leadership



* Serve as the senior technical escalation point for complex client environments

* Provide architectural guidance for Microsoft 365, cloud infrastructure, networking, and security

* Establish and maintain technical standards across client environments

* Ensure cybersecurity best practices are consistently implemented



## Service Delivery Oversight



* Monitor support operations to ensure tickets move efficiently through the system

* Ensure SLAs are met and escalations are handled properly

* Improve support workflows and operational efficiency

* Assist with complex troubleshooting when required



## Project Oversight



* Lead or oversee implementation of IT infrastructure and cloud projects

* Ensure projects are properly scoped, executed, and documented

* Coordinate internal resources to ensure project success

* Ensure projects are delivered on time and within scope



## Technical Team Leadership



* Mentor and develop Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3 engineers

* Assist in building training paths for technicians

* Foster a culture of technical excellence and accountability

* Support hiring and technical evaluation of new engineers



## Documentation & Standards



* Ensure proper documentation of client environments within documentation systems

* Standardize client environments wherever possible

* Create and maintain SOPs for common procedures



## Tool Stack Ownership



Oversee and improve the technical tool stack including:



* SuperOps (PSA/RMM)

* Hudu Documentation

* Ubiquiti Networking

* Duo Security

* Webroot

* IRONSCALES

* Printix

* Blackpoint Cyber SOC

* DropSuite Backup

* Axcient Backup

* Datto Backup

* Untangle / Arista Firewalls

* Microsoft 365 / Azure / Entra ID

* SharePoint / OneDrive / Exchange Online



---



# Required Experience



We are seeking a **strong technical generalist with leadership capability.**



Minimum requirements:



* 7+ years working in IT infrastructure or managed services

* 3+ years working in a senior technical role within an MSP or similar environment

* Strong expertise in **Microsoft 365 administration and security**

* Experience managing **cloud and hybrid infrastructure environments**

* Strong troubleshooting skills across networking, servers, and cloud platforms

* Experience with **PowerShell scripting and automation**

* Experience leading technical projects



---



# Technical Expertise



Candidates should have strong experience with:



### Microsoft Cloud



* Microsoft 365

* Azure / Entra ID

* Intune / Endpoint Management

* Conditional Access

* SharePoint Online

* Exchange Online



### Infrastructure



* Active Directory

* DNS / DHCP

* Backup and disaster recovery systems



### Networking



* VLANs

* Firewalls

* VPNs

* Site-to-site connectivity

* Wireless networks



### Security



* Endpoint security

* Identity protection

*
 security

* MFA

---



# Ideal Candidate Traits



The ideal candidate:



* Thinks like an **owner**, not just an employee

* Can **solve complex problems independently**

* Is highly organized and process-oriented

* Enjoys mentoring and developing engineers

* Is comfortable communicating directly with clients

* Thrives in a **fast-moving MSP environment**



This is a **high-impact role** for someone who wants to shape the technical direction of a growing IT services organization.



---



# Work Environment



* Fully remote position

* Must be available during **U.S. Eastern Time business hours**

* Some flexibility required for project work or escalations



---



# Compensation & Benefits



* Competitive salary based on experience

* Performance-based incentives

* Flexible remote work environment

* Opportunity to grow with a rapidly evolving technology company



---



# Why Join the Team?



This role offers the opportunity to:



* Shape the **technical direction of a growing MSP**

* Lead and mentor a talented engineering team

* Work on **complex and interesting environments**

* Build systems and processes that scale



If you are a **technical leader who enjoys solving difficult problems and building strong teams**, we would love to hear from you.

title: Experienced Full Time Virtual Assistant
description:
# Executive Virtual Assistant

**Forward Deployed** · Full-Time · Remote · PST Hours



---



**Type**: Full-Time (40 hrs/week)

**Hours** | 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST (Mon–Fri)

**Reports To** | Founder / CEO



---



## About the Role



Forward Deployed is a fast-moving operator in the AI/agentic engineering space. We run fireside chats, a practitioner podcast, and build agentic products for PE portfolio companies and enterprise clients. We move fast, expect high-output work, and don't have patience for hand-holding.



We're looking for an experienced Executive Virtual Assistant who has done this before — someone who can own a wide range of operational and administrative tasks without needing to be micromanaged. You'll work directly with the Founder and be one of the most important people keeping the business running.



If you need things spelled out twice, this role is not for you. If you're organized, proactive, and detail-obsessed — read on.



---



## What You'll Own



### Outbound & Lead Management

- Build targeted cold outbound prospect lists using 
 based on ICP criteria

- Write and execute cold outbound
 sequences — you'll own sending, not just list building

- Follow up with leads diligently and track conversation status in our CRM

- Route warm leads appropriately and flag high-priority responses immediately



### Calendar & Schedule Management

- Own the Founder's calendar end-to-end — scheduling, rescheduling, conflicts, prep time blocks

- Send meeting confirmations, reminders, and context briefs before calls

- Protect deep work time and prioritize ruthlessly when the calendar fills up

- Keep the Founder accountable to their task list and weekly priorities



### Events & Graphic Design

- Create event graphics and promotional assets in Canva for fireside chats and hosted events

- Manage Luma event pages: copy, setup, guest management, and updates

- Coordinate logistics for virtual and in-person events



### Finance & Admin

- Assist with paying contractors and vendors on time

- Create and send customer invoices accurately and on schedule

- Track outstanding payments and follow up on overdue invoices

- Flag any billing or payment anomalies immediately



### Video Production Coordination

- Serve as the primary point of contact with video editors

- Track editing timelines, provide feedback relay, and ensure on-time delivery

- Organize raw footage, final cuts, and asset libraries

- Ensure podcast episodes and event recordings are published on schedule



### Travel & Logistics

- Book flights, hotels, and ground transportation for events and business travel

- Optimize for schedule fit, cost, and convenience — don't just book the first option

- Build and maintain detailed itineraries for every trip

- Handle cancellations, changes, and logistics issues as they arise



### General Operations

- Proactively identify things that are slipping before being asked

- Own ad-hoc research, outreach, and coordination tasks as they come up

- Maintain clean documentation and systems for recurring processes

- Be reachable and responsive during PST business hours



---



## What We're Looking For



### Required

- 3+ years of experience as a VA, EA, or Chief of Staff — ideally supporting a founder or executive

- Proven experience with 
 or comparable outbound prospecting tools

- Hands-on Canva experience — you can produce clean, professional event graphics without oversight

- Strong command of Google Workspace (Calendar, Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets)

- Experience managing invoices and payments — QuickBooks, Wave, or similar

- Excellent written English — your
s and follow-ups represent this brand

- Extremely organized with a bias toward proactive communication

- Comfortable operating in a fast-paced, high-autonomy environment



### Strong Advantages

- Experience supporting a podcast or media production workflow

- Familiarity with Luma, Notion, or similar event/project management tools

- Background working with or adjacent to startups, PE, or B2B SaaS companies

- Experience coordinating with creative contractors (editors, designers)

- Comfortable with AI tools — we use them constantly and expect you to as well



---



## What You Won't Get Here



A rigid playbook. This role requires you to figure things out, build processes, and operate without someone holding your hand. We'll give you the tools, access, and context — you bring the judgment and execution.



---



## Compensation & Details



**Compensation**: Competitive — based on experience and location

**Schedule**: Full-time, 40 hrs/week, PST hours (9am–5pm Mon–Fri)

**Contract Type**: Independent Contractor or Full-Time Employment

**Start Date**: ASAP



---



## How to Apply



Send:



- A quick video walking through your experience

- Tools you use daily (be specific)

- Your availability and time zone



*Applications that feel copy-pasted will be ignored. We read everything that shows genuine fit.*

title: Senior AI Systems Architect
description:
Senior AI Systems Architect (Contract-Based)



Build a Private AI Brain for a Knowledge-Driven Organization



We are not looking for a prompt engineer.

We are not looking for someone who “uses ChatGPT well.”



We are looking for a senior AI systems architect who can design and implement a structured, private AI assistant trained strictly on our internal knowledge base.



If you have not built real AI systems before, this role is not for you.



THE MISSION



We are a knowledge-intensive organization with extensive proprietary educational, analytical, and operational materials.



We want to build a private AI assistant that:



-Understands our internal frameworks and methodologies

-Synthesizes information across multiple documents

-Assists in research and structured analysis

-Drafts outputs aligned with our internal logic

-Operates within strict guardrails

-Uses only our curated materials unless explicitly instructed



This is not basic document search.

This is building a controlled AI research and analysis system.



WHAT YOU WILL BUILD



-A structured AI knowledge architecture

-A private internal AI research assistant

-A system capable of synthesis, analysis, and structured output

-Proper retrieval and reasoning workflows

-Guardrails to minimize hallucination and knowledge drift

-Clear documentation so our team can use and maintain the system



If your solution is “just upload everything into ChatGPT,” this role is not for you.



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



You must have real experience with:



-OpenAI API

-Building AI systems for real clients or companies

-Retrieval-based systems (RAG or similar frameworks)

-Working with large structured and unstructured data

-Designing systems, not just writing prompts



Bonus if familiar with:



-Gemini

-NotebookLM

-AI workflow automation

-Knowledge base architecture



We are looking for builders and system thinkers.



WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY



-Prompt engineers without backend experience

-VAs who simply use AI tools

-Applicants without proof of real-world AI systems built



ENGAGEMENT STRUCTURE



-Contract / project-based

-Milestone-driven

-Potential ongoing retainer relationship based on performance



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, you must complete the application form below: 
 [DO NOT CLICK THE LINK. COPY IT AND PASTE IT IN A NEW TAB.]



Important:

-You must submit a Loom video inside the form presenting an AI system you built.

-Applications without a completed form will not be reviewed.

-Do not send direct messages or attachments through OnlineJobs.

title: Data Entry and System Configuration Specialist (Remote for Philippine Contractors, MT Hours)
description:
***Please apply for this position via the provided link. If you do not apply via this link, you will not be considered for this role: 



As a Data Entry and System Configuration Specialist, you will play an important role in helping Redlist customers successfully transition their operational processes into the Redlist platform. Your work will directly support our onboarding and implementation teams by transforming customer documentation-such as inspection forms, maintenance manuals, and operational procedures-into structured digital workflows within our system.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with structured data, has strong attention to detail, and takes pride in building organized systems. You will work closely with our onboarding and customer success teams to help ensure new customer accounts are properly configured, allowing their teams to execute inspections, maintenance tasks, and operational workflows efficiently within Redlist.



Your work will help industrial teams replace paper processes with digital systems that improve reliability, accountability, and operational consistency.





Core Responsibilities



Inspection Form Digitization

 - Convert customer inspection forms, checklists, and operational documentation from paper, PDF, or spreadsheet format into structured digital forms within the Redlist platform.

 - Build and configure forms using the Redlist Form Builder, ensuring clear organization, logical structure, and ease of use for field technicians.

 - Configure form fields, logic, and automation triggers to support operational workflows and accurate data collection.

 - Maintain consistency in formatting, naming conventions, and structure across customer accounts.



Maintenance Work Order Configuration

 - Review equipment manuals and maintenance documentation to identify required preventative maintenance activities.

 - Translate manufacturer maintenance recommendations into structured preventative maintenance tasks using Redlist work order templates.

 - Organize maintenance tasks based on frequency, equipment type, and operational requirements.

 - Ensure maintenance procedures are accurately captured so technicians can execute tasks effectively in the field.



Customer Data Digitization & System Setup

 - Assist in the onboarding of new Redlist customers by organizing and digitizing operational data for import into the system.

 - Structure customer assets, inspection workflows, and preventative maintenance programs within the Redlist platform.

 - Prepare and format customer-provided data for accurate entry and system configuration.

 - Maintain high levels of accuracy and attention to detail to ensure reliable system setup.



Operational Support

 - Collaborate with the onboarding and customer success teams to complete implementation tasks for new customer accounts.

- Identify inconsistencies or missing information in customer documentation and escalate when necessary.

- Follow internal documentation standards and implementation processes to ensure consistency across customer accounts.

- Complete additional administrative or operational tasks as assigned.



Required Qualifications

 - Strong attention to detail and commitment to data accuracy

 - Ability to organize and structure information clearly and consistently

 - Strong written English communication skills

 - Ability to work independently while managing assigned tasks and deadlines

 - Comfort working with spreadsheets, documentation, and structured data

 - Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely



Preferred Qualifications

 - Experience with data entry, data structuring, or system configuration

 - Experience working with SaaS platforms or digital workflow tools

 - Experience reviewing technical documentation or operational manuals

 - Familiarity with industrial maintenance, inspections, or operational processes (helpful but not required)



About Redlist

Redlist is a SaaS company focused on helping industrial teams operate more reliably. Our software supports facilities that work with large, complex equipment by improving maintenance execution, asset health visibility, and operational consistency.



We work with customers in heavy machinery industries-manufacturing, mining, processing plants, and more-helping them reduce downtime, protect institutional knowledge, and get more value out of their equipment and their teams.





Our Values

We Are Spartan: No task is beneath anyone. When something needs to be done, we step in and do it together. We take ownership, support one another, and move forward as a unified team.



We Are Faithful: We believe in continuous improvement. Growth mindset matters here-for our customers, our product, and ourselves.



We Make Impact: We build solutions that matter. Everything we do is focused on delivering real, measurable value to the people who rely on our software.



We Are Doers: We show up. We follow through. We earn trust by delivering consistently-rain or shine.

title: Lighting Designer (US Based Experience Required)
description:
We specialize in commercial lighting solutions, working closely with, architects, engineers, interior designers, and builders across the U.S. We are expanding our design team and looking for a talented lighting designer who can deliver professional, U.S.-standard lighting layouts and specifications.



**Position Overview**



We are seeking a Lighting Designer with proven experience in commercial lighting design. The ideal candidate must have direct experience working with U.S. projects, codes, and design standards. This is a long-term remote position with growth potential.



**Key Responsibilities**



- Create lighting designs for decorative and architectural applications in commercial projects.

- Prepare construction drawings, reflected ceiling plans, lighting layouts, and fixture specifications.

- Develop AutoCAD drawings, 3D models, rendering perspectives, and presentation boards.

- Provide fixture schedules for client approval and vendor coordination.

- Collaborate with U.S.-based sales reps, project managers, and clients to understand requirements.

- Ensure designs meet U.S. building codes, energy standards, and best practices.



**Requirements**



- Minimum 3+ years of professional experience in lighting design (commercial).

- Portfolio of U.S. projects (please include with your application).

- Proficiency in AutoCAD and at least one lighting/visualization software (Dialux or AGi32)

- Strong skills in 3D modeling, renderings, and lighting simulations.

- Knowledge of photometrics, lighting controls, and energy efficiency standards.

- Excellent communication skills in English (written and verbal).

- Ability to work U.S. business hours for part of the day.

- Experience collaborating with U.S. architects, interior designers, engineers and builders

- Knowledge of LEED, Title 24, or other U.S. energy codes.

- Experience with both decorative fixtures and architectural lighting systems.



**Benefits**



- Competitive pay (based on experience and project scope) **When applying please let us know the desired pay in USD**

- Long-term remote work with a U.S. company.

- Opportunity to work on high-profile commercial developments.

- Collaborative team environment with growth opportunities.



**How to Apply**



Please send your resume, portfolio (with U.S. project samples), and a short video introduction about your experience and why you are a good fit for this role.



Bonus Task: Please start your application
 with the phrase “Light it Up” so we know you read the entire posting carefully. Applications without this phrase will not be considered.

title: Lead Generation & CRM Virtual Assistant
description:
01  ABOUT US



We are a vehicle immobilization company launching in Phoenix, Arizona. We place windshield devices on unauthorized vehicles at apartment complexes, HOAs, and retail centers — as an alternative to towing. Drivers pay $150 online to release their vehicle without needing a tow truck.



We are a small, fast-moving team. The COO runs sales and field operations. You will be her support system — making sure she walks into every day with a full, prepped pipeline and zero administrative chaos.



02  THE ROLE



This is a lead generation and CRM management role. You are NOT a caller. You are the person who makes our callers effective.



Your single most important job every day:



Deliver 50 fully researched, tagged, and loaded leads into GoHighLevel CRM before 8:30am Phoenix time (MST) every weekday.

30 leads go into the COO's call queue. 20 leads go into the Ops Supervisor's call queue.

No name found on the property = the lead does not go into the human queue.

Every lead must have: property name, address, manager name, phone number, source tag, and profile tag.



03  DAILY TASKS



BEFORE 8:30AM PHOENIX TIME — Non-Negotiable



• Research and load 50 prepped leads into GoHighLevel CRM

• For each lead: find manager name via LinkedIn or Google, verify phone number, assign correct source profile tag (Profile 1–4), assign queue tag (QUEUE-MARKCHELE or QUEUE-KATIE)

• Any lead without a verified manager name goes into the AI Voice cold pool, not the human call queue



DURING THE DAY — Ongoing Support



• Monitor cold
 inbox for warm replies — flag and escalate within 1 hour

• Log call outcomes in GHL after each calling session (COO will brief you)

• Send 20–30 LinkedIn connection requests per day from the COO's account to property managers in Phoenix

• Mine Google Reviews daily for properties with parking complaints — these become high-priority leads



WEEKLY — AI Voice Pool & Reporting



• Load 300–500 cold contacts into the GHL AI Voice pool every week (name + phone only, no research required)

• Replenish the AI pool when it drops below 200 contacts

• Deliver Jojo's strategic call list (10–15 stalled/high-value contacts) every Wednesday by end of day

• Send Friday pipeline report: leads loaded, pipeline movement, queue status,
 performance



04  WHAT YOU WILL NOT DO



Be clear on your boundaries. This keeps you, the team, and the company safe.



• You do NOT make outbound sales calls (Month 1)

• You do NOT attend or schedule demos on your own

• You do NOT approve refunds or respond to driver disputes

• You do NOT contact properties that are currently in active negotiation unless instructed

• You do NOT make decisions — you flag, log, and escalate



05  REQUIREMENTS



Must-Haves



• GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM experience — you must have used it before, not just heard of it

• LinkedIn research skills — you must be able to find a property manager's name and verify it in under 5 minutes

• Excellent written English — your tagging notes, log entries, and messages to the team must be clear and professional

• Reliable internet and computer — this role requires fast, consistent performance every morning

• Available weekdays during Phoenix morning hours (8:00–9:00am MST minimum overlap)

• Detail-oriented — one wrong tag in the wrong queue costs the team a conversation



Nice-to-Haves



• Experience with Instantly or other cold
 tools

• Familiarity with 
 or similar lead databases

• Background in real estate, property management, or B2B lead generation

• Experience supporting a sales team or SDR function



06  SCHEDULE & COMPENSATION



Item Detail

Pay $300/month (part-time launch)

Hours ~20 hours/week to start

Month 2 Path Full-time ($500–$600/month) if KPIs are met in Month 1

Schedule Weekdays. Must be available for the 8:00–9:00am Phoenix MST window daily.

Payment Weekly or bi-weekly via your preferred method

Start Date As soon as possible — we are ready to move



07  HOW YOU WILL BE MEASURED



These are the numbers we track weekly. They determine your Month 2 path.



KPI Target

Leads delivered before 8:30am 50/day, 5 days/week — no exceptions

Manager name found rate 90%+ of leads in human queues have verified manager names

AI voice pool level Never drops below 200 contacts

Warm reply flag time Within 1 hour of reply hitting inbox

Friday report delivered Every Friday by 5:00pm Phoenix time



08  HOW TO APPLY — READ THIS CAREFULLY



Applications that do not answer all three screening questions will be deleted without review.

Do not send a generic cover letter. Answer the questions below specifically and concisely.

We will respond to qualified applicants within 48 hours.



Answer all three of the following questions in your application:



Question 1: Have you used GoHighLevel CRM before? If yes, describe specifically what you built or managed inside GHL (pipelines, automations, tags, contacts). If no, tell us what CRM you have used and what you did with it.

Question 2: We need 50 researched leads in our CRM before 8:30am Phoenix time every weekday. Walk us through exactly how you would find and verify the name and phone number of the property manager for an apartment complex in Phoenix, Arizona using LinkedIn and Google. Step by step.

Question 3: What time is 8:30am Phoenix, Arizona (MST) in your local time? Are you available and online at that time every weekday?



? Answer all 3 questions specifically — generic answers will be filtered out

? Keep your answers concise and factual — we are not looking for sales pitches

? Do not apply if you cannot be online at 8:30am Phoenix time on weekdays

? Do not apply if you have not used GHL or another CRM in a real work setting

title: Social Media Community Manager (Instagram & TikTok) + Scheduling
description:

Requirements

 • Strong written English

 • Experience managing Instagram and/or TikTok accounts

 • Comfortable following brand voice guidelines

 • Organized and detail-oriented

 • Familiar with scheduling tools (Metricool preferred, others OK)

 • Reliable internet and consistent availability



Nice to Have

 • Community management for multiple brands





How to Apply



Please include:

 1. A short introduction about yourself

 2. Your experience with IG/TikTok community management

 3. 1–2 caption examples you’ve written (or describe your style)

 5. Include the word “ENGAGEMENT” somewhere in your application so we know you read this



Applications that don’t follow instructions will not be considered.

title: Secretary for Commercial Insurance Industry
description:
Hello,



I run Falcon Insurance of Michigan, a boutique commercial insurance brokerage focused on delivering white-glove level service to our clients.



Our business is growing tremendously right now, and we’re looking for a secretary / assistant to add to our team.  We envision growing with this person and seeing them become one of our main customer service leads! 



This person must have a basic understanding of the insurance industry along with passion for providing outrageous customer service.



The winning applicant must absolutely have the following:

- Reliable high-speed Internet access

- Computer and headset suitable for taking phone calls

- Webcam for occasional team calls



The winning applicant must absolutely have the following characteristics:



- At least 2 years Experience with phone based Customer Service

- Comfortable using a CRM & sending
s

- Previous experience in working in Insurance (extra points for commercial P&C insurance)

- Experience using Voip based applications to take calls

- Very detail-oriented, and Deadline-obsessed

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken (We regularly discuss complicated business insurance with our clients on the phone)

- Friendly and great with people

- Comfortable speaking with strangers on the phone

- Comfortable dealing with upset customers

- Tech-comfortable

- Comfortable logging details in spreadsheets

- Trust-worthy, communicative and reliable 





We would like this person to work full-time. It is important to note that the work hours are not limited to 8 hours per day, that is simply the minimum. Your work hours will depend on how efficiently you can work. You will be required to work normal business hours in our time zone. We’re open from 9 am - 5 PM EST every weekday.  



The winning candidate will go through a 30-day trial wherein we’ll further assess if you’re a good fit for the company as well as if it's a good fit for you. 



For our company to grow, everything must run on checklists / working procedures. You will be expected to:

- Follow step-by-step procedures that already exist

- Make suggestions on how to improve checklists (when you see legitimate improvement opportunities - I may say yes or no)

-Be able to grasp how the procedures are done, and be able to compose a procedure when asked to.



Projects you'll be involved in include:





- Answering incoming customer inquiries (Phone calls,
s, and messages via our website) and routing them to the correct department after collecting basic information.

- Working directly to assist our sales & service departments with data validation to input any necessary information into our CRM

-Answer public and private customer questions about our products and company

- Various other customer care/outreach tasks, and administrative tasks

-Updating Spreadsheets

-Other Miscellaneous tasks





Timeline:

- 30-day trial to begin; if we like each other we'll continue
