Please provide an example of your spoken English, either via audio or a video with sound.

Description of previous phone based customer service experience. (3 sentences)

Description of previous insurance experience. (3 sentences)

Reason why you think this job is a fit for you. (3 sentences)

title: Short-Form Video Editor & Viral Content Assistant (Reels & TikTok) Interior Design & Home Renovation Studio
description:
ABOUT US



We are A Couple & A Dream, a U.S.-based interior design and renovation studio located in Clearwater, Florida.



Our mission is to transform homes into spaces that inspire, uplift, and improve people’s daily lives through thoughtful design and meaningful renovations.



We create content around:



Interior design



Home renovation



Before and after transformations



Construction behind the scenes



Design tips and homeowner mistakes



Our goal is to build a strong social media presence and grow a community around beautiful homes, smart upgrades, and inspiring transformations.



ROLE OVERVIEW



We are looking for a creative and trend-aware Short-Form Video Editor who understands how to transform raw footage into engaging short-form content for Instagram Reels and TikTok.



This role is ideal for someone who understands viral video structure and knows how to capture attention in the first few seconds.



You will help us turn real renovation and design footage into videos that capture attention, educate viewers, and grow our audience.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Edit raw footage into engaging Reels and TikTok videos



Add hooks, captions, sound effects, and modern editing styles



Improve viewer retention through fast-paced editing



Repurpose content for multiple social media accounts



Suggest weekly video ideas based on current trends



Organize edited videos in shared folders



Prepare content optimized for vertical platforms (9:16)



CONTENT TYPES YOU WILL EDIT



Before and after home transformations



Interior design inspiration



Renovation progress and behind the scenes



Home improvement tips



Construction insights



Lifestyle storytelling related to home design



REQUIREMENTS



Experience editing Instagram Reels or TikTok videos



Strong understanding of viral short-form content



Ability to create high-retention edits



Knowledge of dynamic captions and trending formats



Good English communication



Organized and reliable with deadlines



TOOLS



Experience with at least one of the following tools:



CapCut



Premiere Pro



Final Cut



After Effects



Other short-form video editing tools



NICE TO HAVE



Experience working with creators or brands



Understanding of storytelling for social media



Familiarity with design, architecture, or lifestyle content



Ability to suggest viral content ideas



WORK SETUP



Part-time position

Approximately 10–15 hours per week

Remote work

Long-term collaboration opportunity



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To apply, please include:



Links to 3 short-form videos you edited



At least one example of a video that achieved strong engagement or high views



A short message explaining why you enjoy creating short-form content



Selected candidates will receive a short editing test to evaluate creativity and style.

Discover Growth LLC

title: Do you love making people feel cared for? Support our CEOs as an Executive Personal Assistant!
description:
Title: Executive Personal Assistant



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Do you love making people feel cared for? Are you the one who remembers everyone’s birthdays, plans amazing gatherings, makes fun plans, and brings warmth into the lives of those around you?



This is NOT your typical assistant job. It’s deeply personal. You’ll work with a kind but intense U.S.-based pair of brothers (proven entrepreneurs working as Co-CEOs of the same business) to support their lives, not the company they are building. From keeping friendships alive and planning meaningful experiences to sending thoughtful gifts and helping them stay on track with personal goals, you’ll be part organizer, part cheerleader, part coach. If you’ve ever been called the “mom” of your group and you’re looking for a decades-long position, this might be your dream job.



Your Role

* Build trust by executing on tasks and communicating clearly, which will lead to taking on more responsibility, which will then lead to increases in pay.

* Keep relationships thriving by managing a personal CRM and helping stay in touch with friends and family.

* Use technology to help automate certain tasks that are repetitive.

* Track habits, support routines, and act as an accountability partner for personal goals.

* Pick out thoughtful, creative gifts for birthdays and other special 
nts.

* Research products, tools, and ideas to make life easier, better, or more fun.

* Plan and book unforgettable travel, great hotels, and the perfect dinner spots.

* Jump in on special personal projects wherever a helping hand is needed.



What’s In It for You

* A Long-Term Role: This is meant to last. The entrepreneurs who you'd be an assistant to are looking for a lifetime assistant.

* Great Place to Work: These entrepreneurs are known to have a super high retention rate of employees and create a great work environment.

* Creative Work: From planning memorable trips to picking out the perfect gift, this role lets you flex your creative muscles and thoughtful side every day.

* Variety: No two days will feel the same. You’ll get to research, plan, coach, organize, and more.

* Paid Leave: You'll get at least 10 days of paid leave plus major holidays.

* Remote Flexibility: Work from the comfort of your home and gain flexibility with hours once trust is built.



Desired Attributes

* Extremely caring, social people-person who will excel in personal tasks

* High attention to detail and organizational skills

* Very strong written and oral English skills

* Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

* Designated office space in your home



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3.  Add the Letters "PA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. PA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 5b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Part-Time Christian Comms RM & Sales Assistant - LIFE DAILY
description:
COMMS RM & SALES ASSISTANT (20 Hrs/Wk)



About Us:

Welcome to LIFE DAILY, a faith-based startup dedicated to building the Kingdom of God. We operate on the principles of servant leadership and strive to exhibit the fruits of the Spirit. Our founder is a Visionary who moves fast and generates big ideas. We are looking for our "Frontline Finisher"—a highly organized, resilient professional to manage founder communications and drive our daily sales 
ntum.



The Role: "The Frontline Finisher"



We are seeking a part-time (20 hours/week, PH Morning Shift) Communications & Sales Assistant. You will act as the bridge between the founders' ideas and the outside world. If you can untangle a disorganized voice memo, keep an inbox at zero, and aren't afraid to send 50 outbound sales messages a day, this is for you.



Responsibilities (20 hrs/week):



Founder Message Flow: Manage the daily communication flow for 2 founders. Translate WhatsApp (WA) personal brain dumps into Step-by-Step (SBS) action items.

Outbound Lead Generation: Research, find, and generate at least 50 outbound lead-generating messages daily to build the pipeline.

Sales 
ntum: Keep 
ntum in communications and fulfillment for all sales leads moving to client status. Build targeted area sales call plans.

Asset Management: Constantly update our standard offer and rate cards. Manage all aspects of inventory and organize Deeply Smart (DS) research.

Compensation & Details:



Salary: $160 - $190 USD per month (paid bi-weekly).

Hours: Part-time (20 hours/week - PH Morning Shift).

Growth: Long-term position with the potential to move to full-time based on performance.

How to Apply:



Do not send a generic cover letter. Reply with the exact subject line: "I am your Comms & Sales Finisher for LIFE DAILY" and complete the questionnaire below.



???? CANDIDATE QUESTIONNAIRE (COMMS/SALES ROLE)



Note: We will review the DISC profile attached to your OnlineJobs.ph account.



Myers-Briggs (MBTI): Take the free test at 
 and provide your 4-letter result.

Enneagram: Take the free test at Truity's Enneagram Test and provide your core Type.

The "Brain Dump" Scenario: The founder sends you a 3-minute WhatsApp audio message with two ideas for a new rate card, a reminder to
 a client, and a random thought about inventory. Walk me step-by-step through exactly how you process this.

Sales Resilience: Sending 50 outbound messages a day means facing rejection. How do you track these leads, and how do you personally stay motivated?

Tech Stack: Which CRM tools (e.g., GoHighLevel, HubSpot) and communication tools (e.g., RingCentral) are you proficient in?

Faith & Culture: LIFE DAILY operates on Christian principles. How do you demonstrate the "fruits of the Spirit" (like patience and gentleness) when dealing with a frustrated sales lead?

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.





What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.





What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.





Pay:

$500/month base pay. We also have a performance bonus structure where you earn extra money when videos you create hit certain view milestones. The better your videos perform, the more you make.





Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. This usually takes about 5 days to complete and covers every tool and skill you need. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one.





To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




 





Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

description:

This role requires excellent written and verbal communication skills with a neutral/minimal accent, as you will be interacting with U.S. medical offices and patients. Communication will primarily be written 
, messaging, documentation), so strong grammar, professionalism, and attention to detail are essential.

Assist U.S. surgery schedulers with patient coordination

Review bowel prep instructions with patients prior to procedures

title: AI Operations Associate
description:
About Avenir Homes

Avenir Homes is a mission-driven affordable shared housing company based in the East Valley, providing stable, dignified housing for working adults across roughly 150 units in the Tempe area. We are in an active growth and improvement phase — rebuilding systems, optimizing operations, and building a team that runs lean and moves fast using the best tools available, including AI.



Role Overview

We are hiring two AI Operations Associates who will work hands-on across leasing, property management, communication, reporting, and process improvement. This is not a traditional admin role. We want people who reach for AI first — who know how to write a prompt, get a useful answer, and turn it into action quickly.



You will work closely with leadership to build and maintain the systems that keep Avenir running — from tracking leads and leasing workflows to automating reports and building dashboards. If you are the kind of person who sees a repetitive task and immediately starts thinking about how to automate it, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

AI-Powered Operations

• Use Claude, ChatGPT, or similar AI tools daily to draft communications, summarize information, research solutions, and solve operational problems quickly

• Write effective prompts to generate reports, templates, SOPs, and data summaries

• Use Claude Cowork and similar tools to automate file and task management workflows

• Identify repetitive tasks across the team and build AI-assisted solutions to reduce manual effort

• Stay current on AI tools and bring relevant new capabilities to the team's attention

Dashboards & Reporting

• Build and maintain operational dashboards in Google Sheets and/or Excel tracking leasing KPIs, occupancy, maintenance, and team activity

• Set up automated scheduled reports (e.g., AppFolio vacancy reports) and connect them to shared team views

• Translate raw data from property management software into clean, readable summaries for leadership

• Create visual trackers and progress reports across hiring, leasing, and systems workstreams

Leasing Operations Support

• Manage inbound lead inquiries across platforms 
 Marketplace, Zillow, etc.) and respond promptly using standardized scripts

• Phone-screen prospective tenants before committing to showings — qualify on budget, move-in timeline, and household composition

• Track leads through the full leasing funnel: inquiry ? phone screen ? tour ? application ? approval ? move-in

• Log all lead activity in AppFolio and maintain accurate occupancy data

• Support lease preparation, move-in coordination, and renewal outreach

Systems & Process Improvement

• Document current workflows (leasing, maintenance, communications) and identify gaps or bottlenecks

• Build and maintain SOPs, checklists, and process guides in ClickUp and Google Drive

• Help implement and manage task workflows in ClickUp — create tasks, set up automations, and track project progress

• Support the mapping and improvement of the end-to-end leasing process in coordination with leadership

Communication & Coordination

• Draft and send professional communications via
 and Slack to residents, vendors, and prospective tenants

• Use AI tools to craft, review, and improve outgoing communications for clarity and professionalism

• Coordinate scheduling, follow-ups, and action items across tea
mbers

• Support partnership outreach to referral organizations (colleges, behavioral health providers, nonprofits)



Qualifications

Required

• Demonstrated experience using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or similar) in a professional or personal capacity

• Ability to write clear, effective prompts and iterate quickly to get useful results

• Proficiency in Google Sheets or Excel — formulas, filters, basic dashboards

• Strong written communication skills — you can write a professional
 from scratch without a template

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail; comfortable managing multiple tasks simultaneously

• Self-starter who identifies problems and acts without waiting to be told

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, lean team environment with shifting priorities

Preferred

• Experience with AppFolio or similar property management software

• Experience with ClickUp, Asana, or another project/task management platform

• Familiarity with Slack as a primary communication tool

• Background in property management, real estate, or housing operations

• Experience building automations (Zapier, Make, or similar)

• Experience working at a startup, nonprofit, or mission-driven organization

• Bilingual (English/Spanish) is a plus but not required



Tools You Will Use

Category Tools

AI Claude, Claude Cowork, ChatGPT, Gemini

Property Management AppFolio

Task Management ClickUp

Communication Slack, Gmail

Spreadsheets / Reporting Google Sheets, Microsoft Excel

Documents Google Drive, Google Docs

Automation Zapier (or similar)

Listing Platforms
 Marketplace, Zillow, Craigslist



Why Join Avenir Homes

• Direct impact on a mission-driven company providing affordable housing to working adults in Tempe

• Work directly with leadership — your ideas will be heard and implemented quickly

• Be at the forefront of AI adoption in property management — we want people who push the tools forward

• Build systems from scratch with real ownership — not just executing someone else's process

• Grow with the company as we scale operations



How to Apply

Send your resume and a brief note (3-5 sentences) telling us about a time you used AI to solve a problem or make your work faster. We want to see how you think, not just what you've done.



Applications without the AI example will not be considered.

title: High Paying Google Ads Expert + Performance Bonuses
description:
We are looking for a skilled Google Ads Specialist to manage, optimize, and scale our paid advertising campaigns across Google's platform.



This is not basic "set it and forget it" ad management. We need someone who understands how to build profitable campaigns from scratch, continuously optimize performance, and deliver clear reporting so we always know what's working and why.

We are a fast-growing company looking for someone who wants a long-term role and the opportunity to grow with our team.





Your Responsibilities:



- Build, launch, and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Performance Max, YouTube, etc.)

- Monitor and optimize campaigns daily for maximum ROI

- Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and competitor analysis

- Write compelling ad copy and test variations through A/B testing

- Manage budgets and bidding strategies effectively

- Create clear performance reports with actionable insights

- Follow and improve our SOPs for campaign setup, optimization, and reporting

- Work with our team to align ad strategy with business goals



Requirements:

We are looking for someone who understands:



- Google Ads platform inside and out (Search, Display, PMax, Remarketing)

- Conversion tracking and Google Tag Manager setup

- Keyword research and negative keyword management

- Ad copywriting and A/B testing

- Budget management and bid strategy optimization

- Google Analytics / GA4

- Building and following SOPs for ad management and reporting



Bonus if you have experience with:



- Landing page optimization

- Meta Ads 
/Instagram)

- Google Merchant Center / Shopping campaigns

- CRM integration with ad platforms



What We Offer:



- Long-term stable position

- Competitive salary based on experience

- Performance bonuses tied to campaign results

- Opportunity to grow with a fast-growing company

- Fully remote work environment



How to Apply:

Please include the following in your application:



- A short introduction about your Google Ads experience. 

- Examples of campaigns you have managed and the results you achieved. 

- The tools you typically use for ad management and reporting.

- Your expected monthly salary.



Qualified applicants will be invited to a short interview call.

title: PART-TIME GHL SPECIALIST — JIREXUS (Remote)
description:
We're JIREXUS — a done-with-you webinar marketing system for independent retirement and annuity advisors. We build automated webinar funnels, AI follow-up systems, and CRM infrastructure on GoHighLevel. We have 17+ paying clients and growing fast.

We need a part-time GHL specialist to handle the technical build and maintenance of advisor sub-accounts. This is NOT a sales role. This is NOT a strategy role. This is a builder role. You clone snapshots, configure workflows, set up integrations, test systems, and make sure everything works flawlessly before we hand it to the advisor.

WHAT YOU'LL DO



Clone our master GHL snapshot to new sub-accounts for each advisor (we onboard 5-10 per month)

Verify custom values auto-populate correctly from intake form submissions

Upload advisor headshots and configure funnel pages with their branding

Make workflow timing adjustments per advisor (webinar day, reset day, re-invite day)

Set up WebinarKit rooms — upload webinar recordings, configure timed CTAs, simulated chat

Configure Zapier zaps (GHL ? WebinarKit ? write-back watch URL)

Set up WebinarKit attendance webhooks back to GHL

Submit A2P 10DLC registrations for SMS compliance

Configure
 sender profiles

Set up
 
 custom audiences

Run full pipeline tests — register a dummy contact, verify every workflow fires correctly, verify Voice AI calls, verify booking flow, verify advisor outcome texts

Troubleshoot when things break — Zapier failures, webhook issues, SMS delivery problems, Voice AI call failures

Handle topic swaps every 8 weeks — update custom values, swap funnel page content, upload new webinar recording

Record short personalized Loom videos showing each advisor their completed system



MUST HAVE



1+ years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience — not just watching tutorials, actually building sub-accounts for clients

Comfortable with GHL workflows, triggers, custom values, pipelines, funnels, forms, calendars, and the conversation AI

Experience with Zapier (building multi-step zaps, testing, troubleshooting)

Experience setting up WebinarKit, EverWebinar, or similar automated webinar platforms

Can follow a detailed SOP checklist and complete every step without being reminded

Reliable internet connection and available during US business hours (CT timezone) at least 4 hours/day

Responsive on Slack/WhatsApp — replies within 1 hour during working hours



NICE TO HAVE



Experience with GHL Voice AI configuration

Experience with A2P 10DLC registration process

Experience with
 Business Manager / ad account setup

Basic video editing (trimming webinar recordings, cutting dead air)

Experience working with financial advisors, insurance agents, or similar professional services clients



THE ROLE



Part-time contractor, 15-20 hours/week, flexible schedule

Must overlap with 10am-4pm CT at least 4 hours/day

$20-30/hr depending on experience, paid weekly

Fully remote, we're based in Austin, TX

Tools: GoHighLevel (SaaS Pro), WebinarKit, Zapier,
 Business Manager, Loom, Slack, Google Drive

Start date: immediately

Growth path: this role grows to full-time as we scale past 30 advisors. Right person could become Head of Tech/Operations.



HOW TO APPLY

Send a message with:



A brief description of your GHL experience — how many sub-accounts have you built? What industries?

A Loom video (under 3 minutes) showing you navigating a GHL sub-account. Show us a workflow you built, a funnel you configured, or a pipeline you set up. We want to see how comfortable you are inside the platform.

Your hourly rate and availability.

One sentence on why this role interests you.



No cover letter. No resume. The Loom video is your interview.

We review applications within 48 hours. If we like your Loom, we'll schedule a 20-minute call and give you a paid test task — clone a snapshot, configure a sub-account, and run a full pipeline test using our SOP. If the test passes, you're in.

What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who:

• Can build pages that rank AND convert



If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

Develop scripts, integrations, and internal tools that eliminate repetitive work

Work directly with a U.S. company

title: Graphic Designer
description:
# Graphic Designer - Join the Visual Revolution at ComfyUI



Are you a graphic designer who thrives on tight deadlines and loves seeing your work impact millions? ComfyUI is seeking a lightning-fast, high quality Graphic Designer with impeccable taste to shape the visual identity of our rapidly scaling platform. This is your chance to be the design voice of a rocket ship startup where your creations will go from concept to production in days, not months.



## About ComfyUI



ComfyUI is a well-funded, VC-backed startup revolutionizing the creative AI workflow space. We're building the future of visual content creation, and our user base is doubling every quarter. Our lean team moves fast, breaks conventions, and ships features that delight creators worldwide. At ComfyUI, your designs won't gather dust in approval chains – they'll be live and making an impact before you know it.



## The Role



As our Graphic Designer, you'll be the visual architect of our brand experience across all marketing touchpoints. Your day might start with designing a product launch campaign and end with creating UI assets for our latest feature release.



**You'll own:**

- Creating stunning marketing materials for product launches and campaigns

- Designing social media assets that stop the scroll

- Developing infographics and visual content that simplify complex AI concepts

- Crafting presentation decks that help close million-dollar deals

- Building and maintaining our visual design system

- Collaborating directly with founders and product teams on high-impact projects



## Must-Have Qualifications



- **3+ years** of professional graphic design experience

- **Portfolio** showcasing exceptional visual taste across digital mediums

- **Speed demon** mentality – you work fast without sacrificing quality

- **Mastery** of Figma, Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, and other modern design tools

- **Available** during US business hours (9 AM - 6 PM PST)

- **Self-starter** who thrives in ambiguous, fast-changing environments



## Nice-to-Have



- Experience with motion graphics and video editing

- Illustration skills



## What We Offer



- **Direct impact** – Your designs will be seen by thousands within days

- **Rapid growth** – Define the visual language of a category-defining product

- **No bureaucracy** – Work directly with founders and ship fast

- **Learning opportunities** – Exposure to cutting-edge AI technology

- **Remote-first** culture with quarterly team meetups



## How to Apply



**Step 1:** Record a quick video including:

- Quick intro and your design background

- Walkthrough of 2-3 portfolio pieces explaining your design thinking



**Step 2:** Submit your application with:

- Link to your video (Loom, YouTube, or Google Drive)

- Portfolio URL

- Brief note on your availability



**Step 3:** Top candidates will receive a paid test project (2-3 hours) to showcase real-world skills



**Timeline:** We move fast! Expect to hear back within 48 hours and complete the full process within one week.



Ready to design at startup speed? Apply now and let's build something extraordinary together.

title: Part-Time Financial Reporting & Systems Coordinator (Multi-Company)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly organized finance professional who is excellent at structuring messy numbers into clean, clear financial reports.

You will work with the founder and the heads of several companies to organize monthly financial data, build reporting templates, and prepare clear financial reports that are easy to read for partners and board discussions.

This role is not about complex accounting. It is about clarity, organization, and strong reporting structure.

Key Responsibilities

1. Financial Structure & Templates

You will help create and maintain a clear financial reporting structure across multiple companies.

This includes:

• Creating standard financial templates for all companies

• Structuring revenue, expenses, debt, taxes, and profit tracking

• Organizing financial categories so reports are consistent and easy to understand

• Improving messy or unclear financial files

2. Monthly Financial Reporting

Each month you will:

• Collect numbers from company managers

• Clean and organize the data

• Prepare clear Profit & Loss reports (P&L)

• Show revenue, expenses, net profit/loss

• Track debts, liabilities, and taxes

• Highlight if the company is making money or losing money

3. Financial Presentation

You will convert raw numbers into clean, professional reports that are easy for partners and leadership to understand.

Each report should include:

• Revenue summary

• Expense breakdown

• Net profit or loss

• Debt and liabilities

• Tax overview

• Short written summary explaining the results

4. Group-Level Overview

Since the founder manages multiple companies, you will also maintain a simple dashboard showing:

• Revenue by company

• Profit/loss by company

• Debt overview

• Key financial highlights

This allows the founder to quickly understand how each company is performing.

What We Are Looking For

You are someone who:

• Is extremely organized and detail-oriented

• Enjoys cleaning up messy numbers

• Can create clear financial structures and templates

• Is excellent with Excel or Google Sheets

• Can turn complicated data into simple, readable reports

Required Skills

• Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills

• Experience with financial reports or bookkeeping

• Ability to create clean and structured templates

• Clear written English

• Comfortable working with multiple companies

Bonus:

• Experience preparing reports for management or investors

• Experience with accounting tools like QuickBooks or Xero



APPLICATION REQUIREMENT (IMPORTANT)

To apply for this role, please include samples of financial reports you have prepared before.

We would like to see how you present numbers clearly to management.

Please send one or two examples of the following:

• A Profit & Loss (P&L) report you prepared

• A financial summary for a CEO or management team

• A monthly financial report or dashboard

• Any Excel / Google Sheets financial template you built

You may remove company names or confidential data, but we want to see:

• How the numbers are organized

• How clean and readable the report is

• How you present profit, expenses, and key financial insights

Candidates without sample reports or templates will not be considered.

title: US Data Tax Preparer
description:

Who we are:

Our company provides expert tax services, delivered by an experienced team.

We offer personalized, strategic support to help clients confidently pay less in

taxes and maximize their financial potential. Through proactive planning and in-

depth knowledge of tax regulations, we ensure each client receives tailored

guidance to meet their unique needs.

Key Responsibilities:

- Label entities, fields, line items, and relationships in tax and financial

documents (e.g., W-2, 1040, K-1, corporate returns, statements, invoices).

taxpayer information, and schedule references.

- Apply bounding boxes for OCR/vision tasks where needed.

Maintain gold-standard datasets for model training and evaluation.

- Prepare individual, corporate, and partnership tax returns, including related

city and state reports and filings

- Enter and analyze previously filed tax returns for optimization or refund

opportunities

- Graduate of Accountancy (CA/CPA required)

- Must have a minimum of 3 years of US Tax experience (technology industry

is preferable) (this requirement is non-negotiable)

- Proficient in on the Google App platform and MS Office applications (high

level of expertise in excel, google spreadsheets)

- High Level of English communication skills

- Quick learner

- Plus - has experience with Data Labelling

Advantages:

- Tax Software : CCH, ProConnect, UltraTax

- Accounting Software : QBO , Xero etc.

Evaluation Criteria

- Quick to learn new technologies

- Startup Experience

- Thorough, well organized

- Responsible, Independent, Ownership

- Quick learner, with “can-do” approach

- Great communication skills

title: Real Estate Lead Generation Specialist (Cold Calling + SMS) – Long Term Role
description:
We are a U.S. real estate investment company that buys properties directly from homeowners.



We are looking for one reliable long-term tea
mber who can help generate motivated seller leads through cold calling and SMS conversations.



This is not a short-term project. We want someone who wants to grow with our company long term.



Your Responsibilities



• Cold call property owners in the United States

• Identify motivated sellers

• Respond to SMS messages from homeowners

• Build rapport with sellers and ask the right questions

• Identify seller motivation, timeline, condition, and price

• Enter clear notes into our CRM

• Tag leads correctly for acquisitions



Your job is simple: find motivated sellers.



Daily Expectations



• 200–300 calls per day

• Respond to SMS conversations

• Identify motivated sellers

• Proper CRM notes and tagging

• Consistent follow-up



We track numbers and consistency.



Requirements



• Strong spoken English

• Comfortable speaking with homeowners

• Friendly, confident phone presence

• Cold calling experience preferred

• Must work US Eastern Time hours



You must be comfortable using:



• Hubstaff time tracking (screenshots enabled)

• CRM for lead notes

• Dialer for cold calling

• SMS messaging platforms



Must have:



• Stable wired internet

• Quiet workspace



You must also be comfortable working in a virtual office environment with your camera on during work hours.



Compensation



Starting pay: $4–$5 per hour



After 30 days performance review, pay increase possible based on performance.



Bonuses paid for strong performance and lead production.



WE PAY BI-WEEKLY.



Important



We are looking for one long-term tea
mber who wants stable work and to grow with the company.



This is not a short-term project. Our goal is to build a long-term working relationship with someone reliable and loyal.



If you perform well, this position can become a stable full-time role for years.



To Apply



Please send:



• Resume

• 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself

• Brief description of your cold calling experience



Start your message with the word LOYALTY so we know you read the full job description.



Applications missing the recording or keyword will not be reviewed.



Interviews



We are scheduling interviews immediately.



If selected, we will conduct a short role-play cold call during the interview.

title: Estimator - Cabinetry
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a detail-oriented and motivated Entry-Level Estimator to join our team. This position is responsible for assisting in the preparation of cost estimates for custom and production cabinetry projects. The estimator will review project drawings, specifications, and customer requirements to calculate material, labor, and production costs. This role works closely with the sales, design, and production teams to ensure accurate and competitive project bids.



Key Responsibilities

• Review architectural drawings, design plans, and specifications for cabinetry projects.

• Perform quantity takeoffs for cabinetry and countertops.

• Assist in preparing accurate cost estimates and project bids.

• Maintain estimating spreadsheets and cost databases.

• Collaborate with the design, engineering, and production teams to verify project scope.

• Identify potential cost-saving opportunities while maintaining quality standards.

• Prepare and organize project documentation for internal use.

• Support senior designers and project managers as needed.



Qualifications

• High school diploma or equivalent required; Associate’s or Bachelor’s degree in Construction Management, Business, Engineering, or a related field preferred.

• Basic understanding of construction drawings and measurements is required.

• Strong math and analytical skills.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and basic office software.

• Ability to read and interpret technical drawings and specifications.

• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

• Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.



Preferred Skills

• Experience with cabinetry, millwork, woodworking, or construction estimating.

• Familiarity with CAD drawings or design software.

• Experience with estimating or takeoff software.

title: Facebook Media Buyer
description:
**SUBMIT YOUR APPLICATION IN THE FORM BELOW**


/
Media Buyer 
 & Google Ads) — Full-Time (40 hrs/week)



Company: AT Media Partners

Location: Remote

Core Hours: 9:00am–5:00pm AEST (Monday–Friday)

Compensation: $700–$1,000 USD/month base + performance bonuses (up to $400/month)

Reporting To: Aaron Tang (Founder & CEO)





About the Role



As a Media Buyer, you will be responsible for launching, managing, and optimising paid advertising campaigns for our clients across
 Ads and Google Ads. Your mission is simple: drive consistent lead volume while hitting strong CPL targets.



This is local lead generation, not complex eCommerce. You’ll be running straightforward campaigns (radius targeting, lead forms, direct response) at scale — typically 40+ active campaigns — so efficiency and organisation matter.





Key Responsibilities



Campaign Setup & Launch

 • Build and launch new campaigns for newly 
 clients across
 & Google Ads

 • Configure targeting, budgets, creatives, lead forms, tracking, and campaign structure



Daily Campaign Management

 • Monitor performance daily and make smart optimisations

 • Adjust budgets, pause underperformers, and scale winning ads

 • Maintain clean account structure and ensure campaigns run smoothly



Cost Per Lead (CPL) Optimisation

 • Continuously optimise to reduce CPL and increase lead volume

 • Identify inefficiencies and implement performance improvements quickly



A/B Testing

 • Test ad creatives, copy, audiences, placements, and campaign angles

 • Use testing insights to improve results and prevent creative fatigue



Reporting

 • Track and report key metrics such as CPL, CTR, CPC, frequency, conversion volume

 • Provide clear updates to the internal team and support client reporting needs



Troubleshooting & Problem Solving

 • Diagnose and fix underperformance (low CTR, high CPL, learning limitations)

 • Resolve ad rejections, policy issues, and technical hiccups efficiently



Collaboration

 • Work closely with the Ad Creative Team (images/videos) and CSMs (client requests + feedback)

 • Collaborate with other media buyers to share insights and improve systems





What Success Looks Like (KPIs)



We measure success by results, not hours. Here’s what “winning” looks like:

 • Average CPL: $11–$17

 • Campaign Load: 40+ campaigns managed

 • Ad Approval Rate: ? 95%

 • Internal Response Time: < 2>

 • Client Retention Support: Contribute to ? 11% churn by delivering consistent performance



If you consistently hit these targets, you can earn $900–$1,400+ per month (base + bonuses).



Who You’ll Work With



You’ll report directly to Aaron Tang (Founder & CEO) and collaborate with:

 • Customer Success Managers (CSMs): handle client communication and relay requests/feedback

 • Ad Creative Team: produces ad images and videos for your campaigns

 • Other Media Buyers: collaborate on performance improvements and best practices



Our Clients



Our clients are:

 • Blue-collar service businesses (plumbers, electricians, HVAC, roofing, etc.)

 • Based in Australia and the USA

 • Spending $2,000–$5,000/month on ads

 • Expecting consistent lead flow (typically 20–50 leads/month)



What Makes This Role Different

 • This is not an eCommerce role — no ROAS obsession, complex funnels, or multi-step conversion paths

 • Local lead gen is straightforward, but you’ll manage it at scale

 • You’ll have full autonomy over campaign management (no micromanagement)

 • You can earn up to $400/month in bonuses for crushing CPL targets



Compensation

 • $700–$1,000 USD/month (based on experience)

Performance Bonuses (Monthly)



To qualify for bonuses, you must manage 40+ campaigns.



Average CPL Monthly Bonus

Top performers consistently earn $1,200–$1,400/month.



Payment Terms

Required Skills & Experience

 Ads and/or Google Ads (local lead gen preferred)

title: Property Operations Manager for short and long term rental
description:
POSITION OVERVIEW We are a growing property management firm managing luxury STRs in Tennessee and an LTR portfolio in Minnesota. We are not looking for a task-doer. We are looking for a proactive project manager who thinks like a system-minded leader.



WHY THIS ROLE:

This isn't just a role for someone who follows a checklist; we're looking for a tea
mber who will take ownership, think creatively, and contribute to refining our systems as we grow. We're excited to build a similar lasting relationship with someone for this role, ensuring you feel supported, trusted, and empowered to make decisions.

Growth-Minded & Solutions-Focused: We don’t dwell on problems; we find solutions. We want people who are hungry to learn, grow, and improve our systems every day.

Positive Energy: Property management sometimes involves surprise challenges. Pipes burst, tenants stop paying. It is critical that we approach our work with a positive attitude. We value collaboration, open communication, and a "can-do" spirit.

A Relationship, Not a Transaction: We want a years-long partnership where you feel supported, trusted, and empowered to make decisions.

Impact Over Activity: We value outcomes. You won't be micromanaged; you will be given clear goals and the freedom to execute, along with the support to be able to succeed.



This role will be 20 hours per week, with the potential to grow to full-time (40 hours/week) as our needs and your familiarity with our processes evolve. We're flexible in increasing hours if the workload justifies it, and your compensation will reflect your experience, contributions, and growth.

Schedule: Starting schedule will be Sunday and Monday 9-5PM, Tuesday-Thursday 9AM- 1PM US East Coast hours. 



YOUR CORE MISSION

Operations (70%)

The "Loop-Closer": When a task comes in, you manage the communication, the schedule, and the reporting in 
 and in daily report-outs to the team. Your job is to make sure work moves from “reported” to “fully completed” as efficiently as possible, and that everyone involved has what they need to do their jobs.

Specifics tasks include: 

Serve as the point of contact for tenant inquiries

Coordinate repairs and maintenance across the portfolio

Manage lease renewals, documentation. Ensure compliance with lease terms

Track rent payments and follow-up for outstanding balances

Coordinate with housing assistance agencies

Processing eviction documents

Update booking information, process upsell payments

Oversee move-in/move-out procedures and inspections

Document tenant interactions and maintenance requests

Identify potential issues before they become problems



Financial Admin and Systems (20%): 

You are confident with numbers, bookkeeping software and general accounting. You receive and pay invoices, track expenses in REIhub, update tenant ledgers, and follow established financial SOPs. You generate professional monthly owner statements for our PM clients, and coordinate with our accountant to ensure they’re delivered accurately and on time.



Guest and tenant communications (10%):

You respond promptly, warmly, and correctly to guest messages, tenant maintenance requests and contractor messages. You like talking with guests, and know how to present yourself in a warm, calm, professional manner no matter the situation.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS: 

3+ Years in US-Based PM: You understand the rhythm of STRs and LTRs.

The "Loop-Closer" DNA: You live by the 24-hour no-update rule. If a project is open, you provide an update before we have to ask.

Financial Rigor: Proven experience with Accounting or bookkeeping, ideally for long or short term rentals. 

Highly Detail-Oriented and Organized: Able to track tasks across multiple properties and follow up on outstanding issues. Skilled at prioritizing tasks based on urgency and importance.

You have a positive growth mindset. 

Strong communication skills: you are a proactive communicator who doesn’t wait to be asked for updates. You’re eager to participate in ongoing discussions about improving communication protocols and systems, and receptive to feedback.



The Tech Stack: While we use OwnerRez, REIhub, and 
, we value your PM and Accounting Experience over your specific software experience. If you are an expert in the industry, and familiar with competitor tools, we can train you on our specific stack.



**MUST HAVE Reliable internet connection with backup***

Proficiency with Google Drive, WhatsApp, and ability to quickly learn 



HOW TO APPLY:



To verify your attention to detail and financial expertise, please follow these steps exactly:

Subject Line: Include the name of the original bass player for the Grateful Dead.

Cover Letter (Paragraph 3): Include the phrase "closing the loop."

In your response, confirm you are available for the days and times described in this position

The Initiative Test: Describe a specific time you solved a contractor or tenant problem without waiting for direction. How did it start, what steps did you take, how was it resolved?

The Financial Filter: Briefly describe your past accounting/bookkeeping work. Specifically:

Which software have you used (REIhub, QBO, Xero)?

In 3–4 sentences, how do you handle a situation where an Airbnb payout for a 5-night stay arrives, but the amount is $200 less than what is shown in our property management system (OwnerRez)? Please list the first three things you would check to 'close the loop' on this discrepancy.

Please include a resume or summary to showcase your background. If you have professional recommendations from previous US-based employers, we encourage you to include those.

title: Real Estate Acquisition Specialist
description:
Real Estate Acquisition Specialist (US Wholesale – KPI Based)

About Us



We are a US-based real estate investment company actively closing 4–6 deals per month and scaling toward 5+ consistent monthly deals.



We are building a serious acquisition team — not a virtual assistant group.



We are looking for a disciplined, experienced real estate cold caller who understands US wholesale real estate and can consistently produce motivated sellers.



This is NOT an entry-level role.

Your Role



You will be responsible for:



Cold calling US property owners



Qualifying motivated sellers



Identifying condition, timeline, motivation, and price



Setting appointments for acquisitions



Properly tagging leads in CRM



Following structured follow-up process



This is a KPI-driven position. Performance is tracked daily.



 Daily Expectations



300+ dials per day



25+ real estate conversations



2+ motivated sellers per day



Proper CRM tagging



Consistent follow-up



We measure numbers, not effort.



 Non-Negotiables



Must have prior US wholesale real estate experience



Must have used a power dialer



Must be comfortable making high-volume calls (250–400 daily)



Must work US EST hours (full 8-hour shift)



Must use Hubstaff (screenshots enabled – required)



Must have stable wired internet and quiet workspace



Must submit Vocaroo voice recording (required or application ignored)



If you are not comfortable with performance tracking, this is not the role for you.



 Compensation



$5–$7 per hour (based on experience)



$100 bonus per closed contract from your lead



Growth opportunity into senior caller / team lead



If you bring value, you will grow with the company.



To Apply



Send:



Resume



Vocaroo recording (2–3 minutes introducing yourself)



Description of your US wholesale experience



Your average daily dial volume



Your average motivated sellers per day



Answer this question:



“How would you respond if a seller says: ‘I want retail.’”



Start your application with the word Discipline so we know you read everything.



Applications without all requirements will not be reviewed.

title: GoHighLevel Funnel & Marketing VA (Community + Podcast Support) – Full Time
description:
Hello! My name is Erica and I run a faith-based online business that helps Christian women launch and grow Kingdom businesses online. 



Our primary offer is a mentorship membership called The Jesus Girl Gang BUILD with Faith Mentorship, where women receive coaching, community support, courses, and access to our GoHighLevel-powered platform to run their businesses. 



We are a small but growing company, and we are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented, and experienced GoHighLevel VA to join our team full-time. 



This role combines GoHighLevel marketing support, community management, podcast production support, and administrative assistance. 



This position is ideal for someone who: 



• Has real experience using GoHighLevel 

• Enjoys helping build online businesses 

• Is organized and detail oriented 

• Communicates clearly and quickly 

• Is comfortable working in a Christian faith-based environment 



Faith and Biblical language are a natural part of everything we do in our business and community, so it is important that you feel comfortable working in that culture. 



In the beginning, we will collaborate closely and I will train you on how I want things done. Over time, the goal is for you to grow into owning projects and helping manage parts of the business. 



This is a long-term team role with room for growth. 



Work Hours 

Full Time – 40 hours per week 



Preferred schedule: 

9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Time (US) 

Core availability needed between 11 AM – 4 PM Eastern Time to assist during meetings and coaching sessions. 



Core Responsibilities 

GoHighLevel / Marketing Operations:

• Create and manage automations and workflows 

• Manage
 marketing campaigns and broadcasts

• Manage contacts, subscriptions, and payments 

• Assist members using our platform with basic troubleshooting 



Membership Community Support:

• Help manage our private 
munity 

• Schedule and post reminders for trainings and events 

• Post replay links and follow-up messages 

• Respond to comments and assist members 

• Co-host Zoom coaching sessions and trainings 

• Take notes during sessions when needed 

• Help track membership metrics 



Current membership size: ~38 members 



Podcast Production Support:

• Download podcast recordings 

• Light editing using Descript 

• Upload episodes to BuzzSprout and YouTube 

• Create episode graphics and thumbnails 

• Draft blog posts and
 newsletters for episodes 

• Create short clips from long-form videos 



Content & Design:

• Create graphics in Canva for social media, trainings, and marketing 

• Help update slides and workbooks for courses and events 

• Support launch campaigns and promotional materials 



Administrative Support:

• Schedule Zoom calls 

• Help manage calendar and communications 

• Maintain metrics trackers for marketing and growth 

• Update digital documents and training materials 

• Assist with special projects and research 



Required Skills 

Applicants must have experience with: 



• GoHighLevel (building funnels, automations, managing contacts) 

• Canva graphic design 

• Descript or similar video editing tools 

• Social media platforms 
, Instagram, YouTube) 

•
 marketing systems 

• Strong written English communication 

• Organization and attention to detail 



Preferred Skills 

Nice but not required: 



• Podcast production experience 

• Community management 

• Funnel marketing 

• Copywriting for
s or social media 

• Experience supporting online course businesses 



Personality & Culture Fit 

This role requires someone who is: 



• Detail-oriented 

• A clear communicator 

• Comfortable asking questions 

• Calm under pressure and able to meet deadlines 

• A problem solver who brings solutions 

• Organized and reliable 

• Invested in being part of a team long-term 



I am a direct communicator, and I value honesty, clarity, and efficiency in communication. We work best with tea
mbers who appreciate open conversations and continuous improvement. 



Faith Alignment 

Our business and community are centered around Christian faith and Biblical principles. 

Scripture, faith-based discussions, and encouragement are part of daily work and communication. 

You do not need to be a theologian, but you must feel comfortable working in a Christian environment and supporting a mission-driven business that serves Christian women. 





Application Instructions (Important):

To make sure you read the entire job post, please follow these instructions exactly: 



Start your application with the phrase: 

“KINGDOM BUILDER VA” 



In your application, answer these questions: 



• What experience do you have using GoHighLevel?

Please include the word “GROWTH” somewhere in your application. 



Please include a 1–2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and explaining your experience with GoHighLevel. 



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered. 





Hiring Process:

Application review 

Short written questions 

Paid test task

We plan to interview no more than 3 final candidates. 





Growth Opportunity:

This role has long-term growth potential. 

As our company grows, there will be opportunities to move into expanded roles such as:

• Launch management 

• Business operations leadership 



We are building a team, not just hiring a task worker.

title: Case Manager
description:
The Case Manager serves as the primary point of contact for clients throughout the tax resolution process. This role is responsible for guiding clients through each stage of their case, gathering required documentation, maintaining consistent communication, and ensuring cases move forward efficiently. The Case Manager works closely with internal teams to help deliver a smooth client experience and support successful case outcomes.



Key Responsibilities

- Serve as the main point of contact for clients regarding their tax resolution case

- Build and maintain strong client relationships through consistent follow-up and clear communication

- Gather and review essential documents needed to resolve tax liabilities with the IRS and/or state tax agencies

- Manage an assigned case pipeline and keep cases moving by proactively contacting clients for missing documents, payments, and status updates

- Educate clients on the resolution process, required documentation, and next steps in their case

- Maintain accurate and detailed case notes in the CRM and ensure all client records are up to date

- Coordinate with enrollment, compliance, sales, and resolution teams to ensure a seamless handoff and case progression

- Monitor case milestones, deadlines, and client responsiveness to avoid delays

- Follow up with clients regarding outstanding balances, required forms, and supporting financial information

- Provide timely updates to clients on case status and escalate urgent issues when needed

- Help ensure all case files are complete, organized, and ready for submission or review



Qualifications

- Experience in tax resolution, tax relief, customer service, case management, or a related field preferred

- Strong communication and relationship-building skills

- Excellent organization and time management abilities

- Ability to manage multiple cases and priorities at once

- Detail-oriented with strong follow-through

- Comfortable handling sensitive financial and personal information

- Experience using CRM systems and document management tools

- Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment

ONLY CANDIDATES WITH COMPLETE PORTFOLIO REQUIREMENTS WILL BE SHORTLISTED. 



About the Role

We are hiring a Graphic Designer specializing in Landing Page Design and Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) to help create high-performing digital experiences that generate leads, drive sales, and increase engagement.

Marketing Knowledge

Design Tools

Landing pages

A/B test design variations

Before/after performance improvements

Conversion rate increases

CRO case studies



To Apply

description:

The team includes 3 Bay Area appraisers and 8 employees in the Philippines. We are rapidly growing and are looking for someone with experience completing the entire report, including commentary, who ideally has experience with managing and leading other appraisal report writers. Your role will effectively be acting as chief operating officer of our company while also being directly involved in reports.



Your role and responsibilities include the following:

1. Ensuring every report is completed to our standards. Either directly or through the processes and procedures you develop, it will be your responsibility to ensure that each and every report created by our report writers is free from errors and submission-ready. While this will start by having you directly review each report written by our team before submission, we are in the process of also hiring quality assurance reviewers, who you will lead and manage.

2. Training and managing residential report writers. It will be your responsibility to ensure that all report writers on our tea
et the criteria and standards in place to ensure high quality reports. 

3. Acting as the liaison between leadership and the report writing staff. If there is too much work for the team, you will be in charge of letting leadership know so that additional tea
mbers can be hired. Or if there are any other issues, you will be in charge of resolving them or bringing it to leadership's attention.

4. Acting as the closer. Ultimately, everything on the report writing side will fall under your responsiblity. We are looking for someone who is proactive at solving problems without getting the leadership team involved, however we are of course readily available to help out when needed. In line with this, if the report writing team doesn't have capacity to complete a residential report, you are expected to directly help out and complete these reports while at the same time working towards a solution to address this issue (hiring more, building better processes for writing reports, involving AI, etc).



To be considered for this role, you must meet the following criteria:

1. You have extensive work history writing reports for a US residential appraiser. Ideally you have done this for California properties. You must have extensive experience completing the entire report, everything from data entry to sketch to adjustments, 1004MC, selecting comparables, and commentary.

2. Ideally you have existing management experience, managing other appraisal report writers.



We are flexible with your work hours and offer Philippine daytime shift hours for your convenience. We would like to start part time but then transition to full time, so ideally you are open to working full time exclusively with us if its a mutual fit.



To be considered for this position, you must do the following in your application message (failure to do all of the following will result in your application being ignored):

1. How many years have you worked for a US residential appraiser? What tasks did you perform for them?

2. How many hours does it take you to complete one report? What parts of the report do you complete?

3. Do you have experience writing commentary for the addendum, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, and creating the 1004MC? Please indicate which ones you have experience with, and how many years for each.

4. Please provide a sample of at least one appraisal report you have fully completed. You can redact any private information from the report. Please let me know what parts exactly you completed on this report(s).

5. Provide a publicly accessible link to your resume.

6. Are you open to starting part time and then transitioning to full time? Once working full time with us, will you be working exclusively with us without any other jobs? When is the earliest you can begin working with us?

7. What are your preferred working hours?

8. Do you have experience managing other residential appraisal report writers? If so, please discuss in detail your job responsibilities.

9. Do you have experience in reviewing other residential reports? If so, please discuss in detail your responsibilities. 



Thank you, and I look forward to the opportunity to work together.

title: Real Estate Team Lead
description:
We are looking for an experienced Real Estate Virtual Assistant who can coach and oversee a team of real estate VAs while also assisting with key real estate operations. This role requires someone with strong U.S. real estate process knowledge, leadership skills, and hands-on experience with transaction coordination, listing management, and inside sales.



If you have experience working with real estate agents, brokerages, or real estate teams and are comfortable training others and managing workflows, we would love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities



Team Leadership & Training



* Provide coaching and training to real estate virtual assistants

* Oversee team workflows and ensure tasks are completed efficiently

* Develop training materials and SOPs for real estate processes

* Monitor team performance and provide feedback for improvement



Real Estate Operations



* Manage and oversee Transaction Coordination

* Assist with Listing Coordination

* Oversee MLS listing input and management

* Monitor contract timelines and compliance

* Coordinate with agents, clients, lenders, and title companies

* Ensure smooth closing processes



Inside Sales / Lead Management

* Help develop follow-up systems and scripts

* Monitor lead management processes

* Ensure proper CRM usage and follow-up systems



Administrative & Process Oversight



* Maintain real estate CRM systems

* Ensure all files, contracts, and documents are organized

* Implement systems to improve workflow efficiency

* Support agents with operational tasks when needed



Requirements



* Strong experience working in U.S. real estate operations

* Knowledge of:



  * Transaction Coordination

  * Listing Coordination

  * MLS Listing

  * ISA / Lead Management

  * Real Estate CRM systems

* Experience training or managing virtual assistants

* Excellent English communication skills

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

* Strong problem-solving and leadership skills



Preferred Experience



* Worked with real estate teams or brokerages

* Familiar with tools such as Follow Up Boss, KVCore, Salesforce, BoomTown, Dotloop, Skyslope, or similar

Position Details

* Long-term opportunity

* Competitive salary based on experience



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:



1. A brief summary of your real estate experience

2. Tools/CRMs you have used

3. Your experience with transaction coordination, listings, and ISA

4. Any experience training or managing VAs

5. Your expected salary



We are looking for someone who can take ownership, lead a team, and help improve our real estate operations.

title: QuickBooks Online Expert Needed to Set Up and Organize Accounting for Real Estate Businesses and Personal Finances
description:
**Job Title:** QuickBooks Online Expert Needed to Set Up and Organize Accounting for Real Estate Businesses and Personal Finances



**Overview**



Please read entire Job otherwise you won't be considered.



I am an active real estate investor and entrepreneur with multiple businesses, rental properties, and renovation projects. I currently use several bank accounts and credit cards across personal and business spending, and I need an experienced QuickBooks professional to help organize everything into a clean, easy-to-manage system.



The goal is to create a **simple and scalable accounting structure using QuickBooks Online Plus** so that I can clearly track expenses and income across my businesses, properties, vehicles, and personal finances.



I want a system that allows me to easily see:



* Profit and loss per business

* Expenses and profitability per property

* Contractor payments and totals

* Vehicle-related expenses

* Personal vs business spending

* Material and renovation costs for properties



This project will include **initial setup, organization, and guidance on how to maintain the system going forward**.



---



**Current Situation**



* Multiple business ventures including real estate investing, lending, and rentals

* Several rental properties and renovation projects

* Personal and business transactions currently mixed across accounts

* Multiple bank accounts and credit cards being used for expenses

* QuickBooks Online Plus will be used as the primary accounting platform



---



**Primary Responsibilities**



The person hired will help design and implement a clean accounting system and organize existing transactions.



Responsibilities include:



1. **QuickBooks Setup and Structure**



   * Set up and optimize QuickBooks Online Plus

   * Create a proper Chart of Accounts

   * Implement tracking systems for businesses, properties, and vehicles

   * Set up classes, locations, projects, and tags where appropriate

   * Ensure everything is structured for easy reporting



2. **Account Integration**



   * Connect and organize multiple bank accounts and credit cards

   * Ensure transactions are importing correctly

   * Create rules for recurring transactions



3. **Transaction Organization**



   * Categorize and clean up existing transactions

   * Assign transactions to the correct business, property, and category

   * Properly track contractor payments and vendor expenses



4. **Real Estate Expense Tracking**



   * Track renovation costs by property

   * Track contractor payments by vendor

   * Track material costs and holding costs

   * Ensure property-level profitability can be viewed easily



5. **Vendor and Contractor Management**



   * Set up contractors as vendors

   * Ensure payments are tracked correctly

   * Prepare the system for 1099 reporting if necessary



6. **Vehicle Expense Tracking**



   * Implement a simple system to track vehicle-related expenses



7. **Reporting Setup**

   Configure reports so I can quickly see:



   * Profit & Loss by business

   * Expenses by property

   * Vendor payment totals

   * Vehicle expenses

   * Overall cash flow



8. **System Simplification**



   * The most important goal is **simplicity and clarity**

   * The system should be easy for me to maintain weekly



9. **Training / Walkthrough**



   * Provide a walkthrough showing how to maintain the system

   * Explain how to categorize future transactions correctly



---



**Ideal Candidate**



Looking for someone who:



* Is highly experienced with **QuickBooks Online Plus**

* Has worked with **real estate investors, landlords, or flippers**

* Understands **property-level expense tracking**

* Has strong knowledge of **chart of accounts design**

* Can simplify complex financial structures

* Is detail-oriented and organized

* Can communicate clearly and explain the system



Bonus if you have experience with:



* Real estate bookkeeping

* Construction or renovation cost tracking

* Multiple business entities

* 1099 contractor tracking



---



**Project Scope**



Initial project includes:



* Reviewing my current financial structure

* Designing a clean QuickBooks structure

* Connecting and organizing accounts

* Categorizing transactions

* Setting up reporting

* Providing a walkthrough and documentation



This may lead to **ongoing monthly bookkeeping work** if the relationship is a good fit.



---



**Please Include in Your Proposal**



* Your experience with QuickBooks Online

* Any experience working with real estate investors

* Examples of similar bookkeeping setups

* Your hourly or project rate

* Estimated time to complete initial setup

* Favorite Color



---



**Goal**



My goal is to build a **simple, organized system that gives clear financial visibility across my businesses and properties without unnecessary complexity.**

title: emote Sales Caller – Work From Home ($3/hr + Commission)
description:
Remote Sales Caller – Work From Home ($3/hr + Commission)



**Company:** TradeTech Automations

**Location:** Remote 

**Job Type:** Remote / Hourly + Commission



---



### About TradeTech Automations



TradeTech Automations is a growing company that helps small businesses improve their online presence using modern AI tools.



We provide a service called an **AI Online Presence Audit**, where we analyze a business’s Google listing, website, reviews, and online visibility to identify ways they can attract more customers.



We are currently looking for **motivated remote callers** who can speak with business owners and introduce them to this service.



---



### What You'll Be Doing



Your main responsibility will be **calling businesses in the United States** and briefly introducing our service using a simple script we provide.



If the business owner is interested, you will **send them a payment link to purchase the audit**.



Daily tasks include:



• Calling businesses from our lead list

• Speaking with the business owner or manager

• Explaining the service using a simple script

• Sending the payment link to interested customers

• Updating the call results in a CRM



We provide the **leads, script, training, and phone system**.



---



### Compensation



This role includes **both hourly pay and commissions**.



• **$3 USD per hour**

• **$4 USD commission per completed sale**



Example earnings:



Working 8 hours per day:



Hourly Pay: $24



If you close:

5 sales ? $20 commission

10 sales ? $40 commission

20 sales ? $80 commission



There is **no limit to commissions**, so strong performers can significantly increase their earnings.



---



### Requirements



We are looking for candidates who are:



• Comfortable speaking in English

• Confident talking with business owners

• Reliable and able to work consistently

• Equipped with a laptop/computer and headset

• Have stable internet connection



Cold calling or call center experience is a **plus but not required**.



---



### Why Join Our Team



This is a great opportunity for people who:



• Want flexible remote work

• Want steady hourly pay plus performance bonuses

• Enjoy speaking with people and learning sales skills

• Want to grow with a small but expanding company



We are building a team and looking for individuals who want to be part of something that has strong growth potential.



---



### How To Apply



If you're interested, please send:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your previous sales or call center experience (if any)

3. Your internet speed test result

4. Your available working hours



Qualified applicants will be contacted for the next step.



---



**TradeTech Automations**

Helping businesses discover growth opportunities through AI.
