title: GRAPHIC DESIGNER (Apparel Mockups + Reels Editing)
description:
IMPORTANT – PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING



To confirm you carefully read this job post, please include the word CREATIVE as the first word in your application message.



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be reviewed.



To be considered for this role you must submit:



A short video introduction (2 minutes or less)



A portfolio showing examples of your work



Your portfolio must include:



• Apparel mockups

• Social media graphics

• Reels or short-form video edits

• Shirt or merch designs if available



Applications without a video introduction and portfolio will not be reviewed.



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are hiring a creative tea
mber to support two growing brands:



Knotted Threads

Buffalo Mentality



This role combines graphic design, apparel mockups, reels editing, and social media campaign execution.



Graphic design is the most important skill for this role. You will also help produce content and collaborate on campaigns that grow our brands online.



We are looking for someone who can take direction, think strategically, and turn ideas into polished designs and engaging content.



This position starts at 20 hours per week with opportunity to grow long term.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Graphic Design (Primary Responsibility)



• Create apparel mockups for incoming quote requests

• Apply logos to shirts, hats, hoodies, and other garments

• Prepare artwork files for production once designs are approved

• Create social media graphics and marketing visuals

• Design marketing materials and occasional pitch decks

• Occasionally design shirt graphics as our product offerings expand



Typical weekly volume:



• 10–20 apparel mockups

• Mockups should typically be completed within 24 hours



Content Creation



• Edit reels and short-form video using CapCut

• Follow brand guidelines and maintain visual consistency

• Produce engaging social content for Instagram and other platforms

• Suggest improvements to increase engagement and reach



Typical weekly output:



• 5–10 reels edited

• 7–10 social posts



Campaign Collaboration



• Work with the owner to develop social media campaigns

• Help organize campaign content and posting schedules

• Turn ideas into structured content plans

• Assist with scheduling and organizing content using Go High Level



TOOLS WE USE



Photoshop

Illustrator

CapCut

Canva

Go High Level

Google Workspace

ClickUp



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



• Strong graphic design skills (Photoshop and Illustrator)

• Ability to create clean apparel mockups quickly and accurately

• Experience editing reels or short-form video

• Ability to take direction and turn ideas into polished visuals

• Organized and detail oriented

• Strong communication during work hours

• Someone who takes initiative and produces high quality work



APPLICATION QUESTIONS



Please answer the following when applying:



Walk us through your process for creating an apparel mockup from a logo and garment.



What elements do you focus on when editing reels to keep them engaging?



How do you stay organized when managing multiple creative projects?



Tell us about a design you created from a client’s idea or direction.



VIDEO INTRODUCTION REQUIREMENT



Your video should include:



• Your name and background

• Your graphic design experience

• Your experience creating social content or reels

• Why you believe you are a strong fit for this role



Keep your video under 2 minutes.

title: Support Specialist
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING:



ONLY APPLICANTS WITH HANDS-ON EXPERIENCE SUPPORTING SCHEDULING SOFTWARE WILL BE CONSIDERED.





HOW TO APPLY:

• Subject line of your application - “SCHEDULE.” 

• Cover letter - Write a brief cover letter introducing yourself and your relevant experience.

• Resume/CV - Make sure to include a link to your Resume/CV.



NOTE: APPLICATIONS THAT DO NOT INCLUDE A RESUME/CV LINK WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.





About the Role

We are seeking a Support Specialist who will serve as the first point of contact for customers using our platform. The role involves assisting users with navigation, troubleshooting issues, and providing timely support. You will also collaborate with the CSM Team during implementations and help improve the customer experience by identifying recurring issues and sharing insights with the Product and Engineering teams.



What You’ll Do

• Handle incoming support tickets related to our platform and provide clear, accurate, and timely responses

• Work closely with CS Managers to triage and resolve implementation-related support requests

title: Notion Systems Builder (LifeOS + Business Operations Dashboard)
description:
About the Role

I am looking for a Notion specialist to help build a structured Notion workspace that functions as both a personal LifeOS and a business operations dashboard.

The system will support:

• task and project management

• workflow/SOP documentation

• habit tracking

• knowledge management

• operational oversight for a small professional services business

This is not a simple template installation. I need someone who can design and implement a clean, well-organised system based on an existing operational structure.

You will work with me to translate my workflows and planning systems into a clear, visually pleasing Notion dashboard that I can use daily.



About the Business

I run a specialist psychology practice providing:

• trauma-informed therapy

• forensic psychological assessments

• institutional consulting and training

The Notion workspace will support both personal organisation and business operations.

The system will be used primarily by me and my executive VA.



What You Will Build

The Notion workspace will include the following components:

1. Main Dashboard

A clean, aesthetic home dashboard showing:

• priority tasks

• active projects

• active reports

• habit tracker

• key metrics overview

• quick links to key areas



2. Task Management System

A central task database including:

• personal and business tasks

• task ownership (me or VA)

• deadlines and priority levels

• project linkage

• weekly task views

• overdue and priority alerts



3. Project Management

Projects will be separate from tasks.

Examples include:

• digital product development

• financial system setup

• operational improvements

• personal projects

Each project should connect to relevant tasks.



4. Workflow / SOP Library

The system should include a structured library for operational workflows such as:

• client onboarding workflows

• expert witness report workflows

• administrative processes

• marketing workflows

Some workflows should be able to generate standard task lists automatically when a new project is created.



5. 12-Week Planning System

The system should support planning in 12-week cycles, including:

• cycle goals

• linked projects

• review templates



6. Habit Tracking

A simple habit tracking system integrated into the dashboard.

Examples:

• journaling

• exercise

• meditation

• reading

• CPD



7. Knowledge Library

A structured second brain for:

• book notes

• reading lists

• research notes

• article ideas

• learning topics



8. Metrics Dashboard

A simple KPI dashboard where key metrics can be updated weekly.

Examples include:

• revenue

• enquiries

• social media growth

• SEO metrics

These metrics will be manually updated using data from Google Sheets.



Important Requirements

You must:

• have strong experience building custom Notion systems

• understand databases and relational structures

• know how to connect tasks, projects, and workflows

• be able to create clean and aesthetically pleasing layouts

• be comfortable following an existing operational structure



Nice to Have

• experience building founder dashboards

• experience building operations systems in Notion

• understanding of workflow automation inside Notion



Deliverables

By the end of the project I would like:

• a fully functional Notion workspace

• clearly structured databases

• templates for recurring workflows

• a clean, intuitive dashboard layout

• brief documentation or walkthrough video explaining the structure



Working Style

You should be:

• organised

• detail-oriented

• comfortable asking clarifying questions

• able to translate ideas into structured systems

Communication will primarily be through written messages and occasional calls.



To Apply

Please include:

1. Examples of Notion systems you have built

2. A short description of how you approach building a system from scratch

3. Your hourly rate

4. Estimated time to build a system like this

Applications without examples of previous Notion work will not be considered.



Please include the word "Structure" at the beginning of your application so I know you have read the full job post.

title: Web Designer / Web Developer (Remote – Full Time)
description:
About Us



Ashoori Law is a fast-growing U.S. immigration law firm helping individuals and businesses worldwide navigate the U.S. immigration process. Our team serves clients across the globe and is committed to delivering exceptional legal services and client experiences.

You will work closely with our marketing and content teams to ensure brand consistency, high conversion rates, and optimal website functionality.



Key Responsibilities

Design and develop visually engaging websites using WordPress (Beaver Builder) and Webflow

Build wireframes, mockups, and prototypes using Figma

Ensure all websites load in under 2 seconds on desktop and mobile

Create SEO-friendly website structures (metadata, schema markup, headings, URL preservation)

Collaborate with marketing and content teams to maintain brand consistency

Continuously update, troubleshoot, and maintain website performance

Apply UX, UI, and CRO best practices to improve user engagement and conversions

Stay updated with the latest web design trends, tools, and technologies



Requirements

Proven experience designing websites using WordPress, Webflow, and Beaver Builder

Strong portfolio of modern, high-performing website designs

Advanced skills in Figma

Expertise in speed optimization (CDN, caching, minification, lazy loading)

Strong understanding of typography, layout, responsive design, and accessibility

Knowledge of HTML/CSS for advanced styling and troubleshooting

Understanding of SEO fundamentals and technical requirements

Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate with a team



Preferred Qualifications

Experience designing conversion-focused landing pages

Knowledge of WCAG accessibility standards

Experience using PageSpeed Insights, GTmetrix, and WebPageTest

Ability to create subtle animations and interactive elements



What We Offer

Competitive monthly compensation

Full-time remote position

Long-term role with ongoing design projects

Supportive and collaborative remote work environment

Opportunity to work on multiple websites and brands



How to Apply

If you are interested in this opportunity, please complete the application form below:

title: Telemarketers/Cold Callers
description:
Your skills and time are needed by my company to help me reach potential clients at an affordable rate.



Please let me know if you are available to work 4-8-12 hour shifts from Monday - Friday



When hospices do not have nurses available to take care of their dying patient's they call companies like mine to ask us to send nurses 24 hours a day for a few days while their patient's are dying. We then send nurses for 8 hour shifts to the patient's and the nurses alternate so that we can provide the hospice patients with 24 hours of continuous care for the few days at the end of a patient's life.



The right candidate will be able to cold call Hospices in Southern California (United States) from a list of hospices I have, and attempt to get them to sign a contract so that my company can provide them with nursing services.

title: Instagram Cold DM Setter / VA for Fitness Coaching Business
description:
Instagram Cold DM Setter / VA for Fitness Coaching Business



I am looking for a motivated, reliable, and skilled VA to help assist me with Instagram cold outreach for my fitness coaching business.



What you will be doing:

You will be sending 80–100 cold DMs per day to potential clients using my outreach framework and following up with leads consistently.



This role is not just about copying and pasting messages. I need someone who knows how to start natural conversations, keep them going, ask probing questions, build rapport, and help move the conversation in the right direction.



What I’m looking for:



Previous Instagram cold outreach / DM setting experience



Experience in the fitness industry or strong familiarity with fitness coaching offers, fitness clients, and the types of struggles they deal with



Experience with sending completely cold DM's with an end without ads organically



Strong understanding of how to identify quality prospective clients



Someone who is an excellent conversationalist and can make interactions feel natural, engaging, and genuine



Ability to ask the right follow-up and probing questions to keep conversations moving



Hardworking, dependable, and able to consistently meet daily outreach requirements



Strong written communication skills



Someone who can follow instruction, stay organized, and represent my brand well



Compensation:



$300/month base pay



Bonus structure with the opportunity to make $1,500+ per month



Bi-weekly pay via PayPal or Wise



To apply:

To demonstrate your seriousness, please apply with the word “FIT” at the top of your application.



I will not review your application if you do not include this.



Please also attach in your portfolio or application any previous Instagram DM cold outreach experience, especially anything related to the fitness industry, if applicable.



I’m looking for someone who can come in, learn quickly, connect with people well, and become a valuable part of the team.



I look forward to hearing from you soon.??

title: Construction project coordinator
description:

Who is Team RRE?

We are team players who prioritize open communication while exercising emotional control. We do the right thing and are dedicated to winning. We are not perfect—we learn from our mistakes in the process of being great.



Team RRE Core Values

We Are Team Players

We Prioritize Open Communication

We Exercise Emotional Control

We Do the Right Thing

We Are Dedicated to Winning



Vision

To be the greatest nationwide, relationship-based electrical contractor with the best culture for our tea
mbers.



Purpose

Permanent, full-time position

Growth opportunities as we expand locally and nationwide

Access to company health plan (Kaiser Permanente)

Dental and vision coverage

Retirement plan

Six paid holidays per year



Position Overview

The Project Coordinator is a critical support role responsible for relieving Project Managers of coordination, documentation, tracking, and field-support responsibilities so projects are executed efficiently, profitably, and professionally.

This role serves as a central communication hub between Project Managers, field tea
mbers, vendors, clients, and general contractors. Extreme organization, proactive communication, emotional control, and a strong desire to help Team RRE win are required.



Key Responsibilities & Tasks

Project Setup

Prepare job folders upon contract award and ensure all documents are properly organized in Google Drive.

Coordinate and distribute startup documentation, including:

Certificates of Insurance (including additional insured)

Business licenses

Joint Check Agreements

Team Introduction Letters

Assist Project Managers with job costing worksheets and ensure Accounting loads projects into QuickBooks.

Prepare Statements of Values and load them into Google Sheets and Contractor Foreman.

Address and track all required submittals.



Tracking & Documentation

Track schedules and coordinate all active work.

Receive incoming job-related
s and route critical requests to the Project Manager per direction.

Generate a Weekly Job Team Talk (WJTT) Google Doc for every active job, serving as the official weekly update.

Prepare, distribute, and track WJTTs for every job, every week.

Ensure WJTTs clearly communicate:

Job progress

Schedule status

Labor hours and production

Material status and deliveries

Risks, constraints, and next steps

Coordinate WJTTs with jobsite Leads and GC on-site supervisors as required.

Store all WJTT documentation in Google Drive per Team RRE standards.



Contractor Foreman Tasks

Load jobs into Contractor Foreman, including plans, documents, and communications.

Ensure Daily Logs are completed and tracked.

Load new field tea
mbers, assign roles, and verify system access.

Support onboarding by ensuring field tea
mbers can access the app and locate assigned jobs.

Keep Contractor Foreman clean and current as jobs close out.

Ensure end-of-month job inspections and percentage-of-completion updates are completed and posted.





Field Support, Materials & Equipment

Order and coordinate materials and equipment per approved job budgets.

Track material deliveries and equipment usage to support field productivity.

Monitor equipment rentals and usage to minimize unnecessary costs.

Assist Purchasing with large material orders, equipment vendors, pricing, approvals, and follow-ups.

Coordinate lodging and per diem requirements for field tea
mbers.

Assist with weekly mileage tracking and verification for payroll.

Receive and reconcile tooling lists; track missing tools, ladders, and equipment.



Change Orders & Financial Support

Prepare change orders for:

Time & Material work

Scope changes or additions

Overtime work

Equipment-driven requirements

Assist with retainage tracking, invoicing, collections, and Schedule of Values.

Prepare monthly progress billings (manager approval required).

Receive, review, and process payment applications.

Log and track all change orders from initiation through invoicing.



Training & Development

Demonstrates self-awareness of strengths and development needs.

Owns and actively manages a career path toward maximum potential.

Self-motivated, lifelong learner committed to continuous improvement.

Continuously upgrades job knowledge and emotional control.

Asks questions, communicates clearly, takes ownershipand dedicated to winning.



Knowledge, Skills & Abilities

Strong organizational and multitasking skills with attention to detail.

Proficient in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail) and Contractor Foreman.

Great written and verbal communication skills.

Take massive action to get things done.

Professional, tactful, and service-oriented client interaction.

Ability to build and maintain strong professional relationships with clients.

Emotional Control: Ability to manage personal emotions and positively influence others.



Education & Experience

Construction or electrical industry experience preferred; formal education not required.



Core Competencies

Very high productivity

Understands massive action

Strong ownership mentality

Great financial accountability

Calm under pressure

Organized and detail-oriented

Clear communicator

Team-first, solutions-driven mindset



Why Join Team RRE

Strong culture built on values, not ego

Growing company with a long-term vision

Leadership that cares about people—not just numbers

Opportunity to grow into senior leadership as the company scales

title: Custom Software Developer for Booking/Scheduling Platform
description:
Hello, please read as any applications not answering the details will not be responded to.



I am looking for one or a couple of software developers that can create a software for us to streamline our online booking and our staff scheduling. I am also hoping that we can incorporate some sort of CRM features if possible such as
 automations and mass communications, as well as a content library for our clients. Looking to incorporate an app for this as well, most likely a PWA but open to suggestions. Also would like there to be a widget or some way to embed the booking process on our website and have a staff portal separate from a client portal for logins and management.



Some examples of software that we have found that are almost what we are looking for but has some sort of limitation is WellnessLiving, TeamUp, and GymDesk to give an idea.



This would be mostly a gig job with the potential for ongoing monitoring at a lesser hours/week after. This can be discussed as we go.



If you are interested in this, I would like you to respond with a rough estimate on total hours for a timeline to build it, what you are looking for as a per hour salary, and please send a portfolio of previous work. This opportunity may also lead to other work opportunities down the road.



Thank you!

title: IT Engineer
description:
We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a skilled and motivated IT Engineer to join our dynamic team. This role offers a unique blend of IT project implementation and day-to-day technical support responsibilities, providing an excellent opportunity to grow your skills in a supportive and collaborative environment.



As an IT Engineer, you will play a key role in maintaining and improving our clients’ IT environments, troubleshooting issues, and contributing to exciting IT projects. If you’re passionate about technology, problem-solving, and delivering exceptional service, we’d love to hear from you!

*Plan and implement IT projects, ensuring timely and successful delivery.

*Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to desktops, servers, and networks.

*Perform PC maintenance, upgrades, and installations.

*Manage and support user equipment, software, and services remotely.

*Document work thoroughly and update the ticketing system to ensure transparency and efficiency.



Technologies You’ll Work With:

*Operating Systems: Windows and Mac desktop environments, Windows Server.

*Networking: Cisco, Ubiquiti, Fortinet, and general networking concepts.

*Cloud Platforms: Microsoft 365 and Azure.



What We’re Looking For:

**Experienced L2 IT Support role

*Strong troubleshooting skills for hardware, software, and networks.

*Familiarity with Microsoft 365, Windows Server, and networking concepts.

*Excellent communication and customer service skills.

*A proactive, problem-solving mindset with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.



Preferred but Not Required:

*Certifications such as Network+, Microsoft Certified, or CCNA.

*Experience with firewalls, VPNs, and virtual environments.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (3136) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.

title: App Launch & Growth Specialist
description:
About Us

We’re a solo-founder Australian tech company building a portfolio of consumer and B2B apps. Our first product, Labeebee (a personalised AI-powered children’s bedtime story app), is currently launching on both the Apple App Store and Google Play. We have several more apps in the pipeline and need a reliable, detail-oriented person to help us get them across the finish line and growing. This isn’t a task-following role — we want someone who can take ownership of the launch and post-launch process. You’ll likely have more experience in some of these areas than us, and that’s exactly what we’re looking for. Help us build the SOPs, not just follow them.



The Role

You’ll be responsible for everything that happens between “the app works on my machine” and “users are downloading and loving it.” Specifically:



1. App Testing & QA - Manage and run cross-device testing using BrowserStack (we’ll provide the subscription)

Create and maintain test plans for each app and release

Document bugs with clear reproduction steps, device info, and screenshots/recordings

Verify fixes and manage regression testing before submissions



2. App Store Management - Set up and manage App Store Connect and Google Play Console accounts

Handle app submissions, review responses, and compliance requirements

Manage privacy declarations, content ratings, and platform-specific policies

Configure in-app purchases and subscriptions (we use RevenueCat)

Monitor review feedback and respond to user reviews on both platforms



3. App Store Optimisation (ASO) & Growth - Keyword research and listing optimisation for both stores

A/B test store listing elements (screenshots, descriptions, titles)

Track rankings and conversion metrics, suggest improvements

Competitor analysis and category positioning



4. Visual Assets & Design Support - Create and update App Store and Google Play screenshots (phone + tablet)

Design feature graphics, promotional banners, and store imagery

Produce social media assets for app launches and updates

Light graphic design work 



What We’re Looking For



Must-Haves

- Direct experience submitting and managing apps on both the Apple App Store and Google Play

- Familiarity with app review processes, rejection reasons, and how to resolve them

- Experience with cross-device/cross-platform QA testing (BrowserStack experience a plus)

- Strong attention to detail and ability to document processes clearly

- Excellent written English — you’ll be writing store listings and responding to reviews

- Self-starter mindset — you can identify what needs doing without being told



Nice-to-Haves

- Graphic design skills (Figma, Canva, or similar)

- ASO experience with tools like AppTweak, Sensor Tower, or AppFollow

- Experience with RevenueCat or similar subscription management platforms

- Basic understanding of mobile app development (React Native/Expo is a plus)

- Experience with analytics tools (Firebase, Amplitude, Mixpanel)



Hours & Compensation

- Hours: 10–20 hours per week (flexible)

- Type: Ongoing / long-term retainer

- Rate: Competitive — based on experience

- Timezone: Flexible, with some overlap with AEST

- Bonuses: Milestone-based bonuses (see below)



Milestone Bonuses

We offer milestone-based bonuses tied to key outcomes like successful app approvals, download targets, and store ratings. Specific amounts will be discussed and agreed upon together during onboarding.



Tools We Use

You don’t need to know all of these on day one, but familiarity with any of them is a plus: BrowserStack (QA testing), App Store Connect & Google Play Console, RevenueCat (subscriptions), Expo / EAS CLI (React Native builds), GitHub (version control), Figma / Canva (design), Firebase / analytics platforms.



How to Apply

Send us a message that includes:

- Must include: “EGB App Launch Specialist” exactly in the subject.

- A brief summary of your experience with app store submissions (how many apps, which platforms, any notable outcomes)

- An example of a challenge you faced during an app review/submission and how you resolved it

- Your experience with QA testing — tools used, how you document and track bugs

- Any design portfolio or examples of store screenshots/assets you’ve created

- Your available hours per week and preferred working schedule

- Your expected hourly or monthly rate



We’re building something exciting and want you to grow with us.

If you’re the kind of person who takes pride in a perfectly polished app listing and a clean bug report, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Content Manager
description:
As a content manager, you will lead our team in creating, editing, and publishing high-quality content across our website, ensuring all material aligns with company standards for accuracy, relevance, and style. You will optimize content for search engines to enhance organic traffic and engagement, leveraging your expertise to drive interest and elevate our digital marketing efforts. 



Key Responsibilities

Develop, edit, and update content.

Manage and update the content calendar.

Oversee the publication of blogs, articles, and web content.

Ensure consistency and alignment with the company’s voice, editorial standards, and formatting guidelines.

Ensure all published content meets the company’s standards for journalistic integrity and production quality.

Review and refine copies for accuracy, grammar, and punctuation.



Qualifications And Skills

Degree in Journalism or a related field or equivalent work-related experience

Prior experience as a content manager

Minimum 2 to 3 years experience in content writing

Exceptional oral and written communication skills

Expertise in writing stories for the web and other digital platforms

Highly motivated, with the ability to work independently as part of a collaborative team

Ability to prioritize assignments, manage deadlines, and handle multiple tasks simultaneously in a fast-paced environment

Proficiency in content management systems (CMS), specifically WordPress

Knowledge of SEO tools, such as Semrush and Ahrefs

In-depth understanding of SEO principles and techniques to enhance content visibility and performance



Basic Requirements

Device Specifications: Intel i5 processor or higher with a minimum of 8GB RAM

Equipment: Webcam, speakers, and a microphone or headphones

Internet Speed: Minimum of 100Mbps with a backup connection for outages



Work Details

Working Hours: Monday to Friday, 9 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time | Tuesday to Saturday, 12 AM to 8:30 AM Manila Time

Location: Anywhere in the Philippines



Why Join Us?

Stable employment

Competitive salary

Bi-monthly salary

A-Z benefits, including bonuses and annual raises

Work-life balance 

Work-from-home opportunity



Virtual Office Setup: We ask tea
mbers to maintain a virtual office via Google Meet with cameras on during work hours. This helps us simulate an in-office environment, encourages collaboration, and ensures everyone is present and engaged throughout the day, even while working remotely.

Note: The company uses a time tracker to ensure productivity and accountability.



Direct Hire

This is a direct hire position — you will be employed and managed directly by our company, not through an agency or third party.

For interested applicants kindly send your CV to 



(Note: DO NOT SEND YOUR APPLICATION through our websites or social media platforms. FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THIS INSTRUCTION may result in DISQUALIFICATION)

description:

• Supporting website updates, basic SEO tasks, and digital marketing campaigns

• Creating and editing simple graphics or short-form content when needed

Who We're Looking For:

Apply by

title: Performance Marketing Asst. Manager (with a Speciality in Google Search Ads)
description:
We are a small but growing automotive service center based in Rockland County, NY, offering end-to-end automobile services for all vehicle types.

We are looking for a Paid Media Assistant Manager with strong hands-on experience managing performance-driven advertising campaigns across digital channels, with particular expertise in Google Search Ads.

While Google Search will be the primary acquisition channel, the ideal candidate understands the broader paid media ecosystem and can contribute to strategy, optimization, and insights across multiple platforms.

The focus of this role is to drive measurable results — calls, inquiries, and service bookings — through structured, well-managed paid media campaigns.



What You’ll Do



Paid Media Strategy & Planning

1. Evaluate the current paid media landscape and identify growth opportunities.

2. Develop campaign strategies focused on lead generation, calls, and service bookings.

3. Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and audience insights relevant to automotive services.



Campaign Deployment & Management

1. lan, launch, and manage paid media campaigns, with Google Search Ads as the core channel.

2. Structure campaigns, ad groups, keywords, and bidding strategies for performance.

3. Write and test high-converting ad copy tailored to local service searches.



Optimization & Performance Management

1. Continuously optimize keywords, bidding strategies, targeting, and budgets.

2. Run A/B tests on ads, campaign structures, and landing pages.

3. Improve campaign performance across CTR, Quality Score, and cost-per-lead.



Tracking, Reporting & Insights

1. Ensure accurate conversion tracking (calls, form submissions, bookings).

2. Generate structured weekly performance reports for management.

3. Translate campaign data into clear business insights and recommendations.



Local Market Targeting

1. Build campaigns targeting Rockland County and surrounding areas.

2. Optimize campaigns around local service intent searches.



Paid Media Channel Awareness

1. Provide insights on additional paid channels such as Display, YouTube, or Meta Ads when relevant to growth.







What We’re Looking For



1. Must-Have Skills & Experience

2. Strong Paid Media experience managing performance campaigns

3. Advanced experience with Google Search Ads

4. Experience managing campaigns targeting the North American market

5. Fluent English (written and spoken)

6. Ability to work 5-6 hours per day (Eastern Time)

7. Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving ability

8. Experience with campaign reporting, data analysis, and optimization

9. Strong organization, attention to detail, and communication skills



Nice-to-Haves

1. Experience running paid campaigns for local service businesses

2. Familiarity with automotive services or lead-generation businesses

3. Experience with Google Analytics, Tag Manager, and conversion tracking

4. Familiarity with Rockland County areas (Spring Valley, Nanuet, Monsey, etc.)

title: Full-Time Virtual Assistant
description:
VIRTUAL ASSISTANT – RESEARCH, MARKETING & OPERATIONS (FULL-TIME)



Company: EntreHouse

Job Type: Full-Time (Remote)

Hours: 40 hours per week

Salary: Based on experience



JOB OVERVIEW

EntreHouse is looking for a reliable and tech-savvy virtual assistant to support research, marketing, and operational tasks.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with digital tools. This role involves conducting online research, organizing information, supporting marketing activities, and assisting with day-to-day business operations.



Strong English communication (C1 level) and the ability to work independently are required.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Research & Data

• Conduct online research on companies, industries, and opportunities

• Build and maintain organized spreadsheets and databases

• Collect and organize business contacts and leads



Marketing Support

• Research competitors and market trends

• Assist with lead generation efforts

• Help prepare marketing materials or content outlines



Administrative & Operational Support

• Organize documents, files, and internal information

• Update CRM systems and maintain accurate data

• Assist with task coordination and internal workflows



REQUIREMENTS



• English proficiency: C1 level or higher

• Strong online research skills

• Excellent attention to detail

• Strong organizational skills

• Comfortable using digital tools and learning new software

• Ability to work independently and manage tasks



TOOLS & PLATFORMS

Experience with the following is helpful but not required:

• Google Docs & spreadsheets

• Asana or other project management tools

• CRM platforms

• AI tools (ChatGPT or similar)



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

• Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant

• Lead generation or data research experience

• Basic understanding of marketing or digital marketing



APPLICATION PROCESS

1. Submit your application through this job post

2. Selected applicants will receive a JotForm application where you will:

   * Attach your resume

   * Submit a short video introduction explaining your background and work experience

3. Final candidates will be invited to a 1:1 online interview

title: Real Estate Assistant
description:
Realtor looking for a reliable, proactive Virtual Assistant to handle a mix of administrative and marketing tasks. This is a remote, part-time (10–30 hours/week, depending on your availability and performance).  



The ideal candidate will be tech-savvy, creative, and organized, with a strong focus on YouTube video production and
 marketing. You will help us attract more leads, build our audience, and streamline day-to-day real estate operations.





YouTube Content 

- Edit raw footage into polished, engaging real estate videos (property tours, market updates, buyer/seller tips, neighborhood guides, etc.)  

- Create thumbnails, titles, descriptions, tags, end screens, and chapters optimized for YouTube SEO  

- Schedule and publish videos on our channel(s)  

- Monitor analytics, suggest content ideas, and help grow subscribers and views  

- Maintain a consistent upload schedule (1–3 videos per week)

 Marketing 

- Build, segment, and manage
s

- Write and design monthly newsletters, drip campaigns, market reports, and lead-nurturing sequences  

- Create compelling subject lines and copy that converts (open rates & click-through rates are key metrics)  

- Automate follow-ups for new leads, past clients, and sphere of influence  

Miscellaneous Real Estate Support  

- Research properties, comps, neighborhoods, and market data  

- Update MLS listings, create property flyers, and manage CRM  (Follow up Boss)

- Assist with social media posts (Instagram,
, TikTok) tied to YouTube content  

- Lead generation tasks

Required Skills & Qualifications 

- Experience as a Virtual Assistant, preferably in real estate, content creation, or digital marketing  

- Proficiency with video editing software (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)  

- Excellent written and verbal communication (professional, friendly, persuasive tone)  

- Organized, self-motivated, and able to work independently with minimal supervision  

- Fast learner who can adapt to new tools quickly  

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace for video editing calls  

Preferred 

- Experience in real estate (knowing terminology like MLS, comps, staging, etc.)  

- Knowledge of YouTube SEO and algorithm best practices  

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva or Photoshop)  

- Portfolio of previous YouTube videos or
 campaigns you’ve created



What We Offer

- Flexible hours (set your own schedule around core deadlines)  

- Opportunity to grow with the business (more hours and responsibility as we scale)

title: Entry-Level Admin Assistant / Associate Account Manager (Fresh Graduates, No Experience Required)
description:
About Us

StoryGen (www.storygen.agency) is a rapidly growing B2B lead generation agency specializing in building and managing outbound sales teams for our clients. Cold calling is our strength, but what truly drives our results is the operational engine behind it: organized systems, clear communication, and smart use of automation and AI tools.



Our campaigns succeed because they’re structured, tracked, and continuously improved. That’s where this role makes a real impact.



The Opportunity

We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Admin Assistant / Associate Account Manager to help coordinate and support client campaigns behind the scenes.



This is an entry-level opportunity ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, tech-comfortable, and curious about sales, operations, and client management. You don’t need prior experience in account management, we’ll train you. What matters most is your ability to stay organized, communicate clearly, and take initiative.



You’ll work closely with Account Managers and our BDR team to ensure campaigns are properly set up, aligned, and running smoothly.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Campaign Setup & Coordination

- Assist in launching outbound campaigns (scripts, ICP definitions, call lists)

- Help organize and maintain campaign documentation

- Ensure all messaging and instructions are clear and up to date



Content & Messaging Support

- Draft and refine cold call scripts and follow-up
s

- Edit outreach messaging for clarity and effectiveness

- Use AI tools to streamline copywriting and administrative tasks



Client & Team Support

- Join onboarding and weekly client calls to take structured notes

- Track action items and follow-ups fro
etings

- Support Account Managers in preparing client updates and reports



Performance Tracking

- Monitor weekly KPIs (meetings booked, held, show rates)

- Flag inconsistencies or performance issues

- Help maintain organized performance dashboards



Systems & Tools

- Assist with basic setup and troubleshooting in platforms like HubSpot or Nooks

- Use tools like ChatGPT to summarize calls, generate drafts, and improve efficiency

- Keep internal trackers and client folders structured and accurate



What We're Looking For

- Strong written and verbal communicator

- Highly organized and process-driven

- Comfortable learning and using new tech tools

- Curious about sales, outbound strategy, or account management

- Familiar with AI tools or willing to learn

- Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple tasks

- Independent problem-solver who asks smart questions

- Reliable and consistent in follow-through

- Positive team player with a growth mindset



Work Schedule

- Monday to Friday

- 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern Time



Compensation & Growth

- USD 1,000 monthly pay

- Fully remote

- Structured onboarding and hands-on mentorship

- Training in outbound strategy, account management, and AI tools

- Clear progression path:

Admin Assistant / Associate Account Manager ? Account Manager ? Senior Account Manager

- Opportunities to grow into strategic, client-facing, or operations-focused roles



Why Join StoryGen?



You’ll be part of a scaling agency where systems matter, execution is valued, and strong operators are recognized. If you enjoy bringing order to moving pieces and want exposure to modern outbound sales powered by AI, this role is a strong starting point.



How to Apply

To ensure fairness and reduce bias, we use an assessment-based hiring process.

Please complete the assessment and submit the following within the same link:



- Your resume

- A link to your internet speed test result

- A short Loom audio introduction (guide questions provided in the link)



Apply here:

title: System Engineer – Remote (US Business Hours)
description:
System Engineer – Remote (US Business Hours)

DevOps • System Reliability • Linux Infrastructure



We're looking for a System Engineer who can take charge of keeping our systems running smoothly, securely, and reliably. In this role, you'll be working closely with the Director of Infrastructure and Platforms, managing DevOps pipelines, maintaining Linux servers, and helping ensure our systems are resilient and secure.



If you're self-motivated, proactive, and thrive in a fast-paced, remote environment, we'd love to connect.



What You'll Be Doing:

• Manage and maintain Linux-based servers and infrastructure

• Own and improve DevOps workflows, including CI/CD pipelines and automation

• Monitor system health and ensure high availability and reliability

• Act as one of the emergency contacts for system-related issues and outages

• Collaborate directly with the Director on architecture, security, and scaling plans

• Document processes, setups, and contribute to internal runbooks



What We're Looking For:

• Solid hands-on experience with Linux system administration

• Understanding of DevOps practices and modern deployment pipelines

• Willingness to learn, experiment, and improve systems continuously

• Strong sense of ownership and accountability

• Able to work US business hours, Monday through Friday

• Comfortable being on-call for emergencies on a rotating basis

• Familiarity with Kubernetes and container orchestration



Bonus Points For:

• Knowledge of Terraform or other Infrastructure-as-Code tools

• Understanding of cybersecurity principles and best practices

• Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, or Azure)

• Scripting experience (Bash, Python, etc.)



What We Offer:

• A remote-first work environment with structured collaboration

• Direct mentorship from the Director of Infrastructure

• Opportunities to shape infrastructure strategy and processes

• Exposure to modern tools and evolving architecture

• Growth path into senior or architecture roles



Sound like a good fit?

Send your resume, a brief intro, and any relevant GitHub or project links.



Starting Offer: 50K PHP

title: Remote Sales Development Representative (SDR | BDR | Appointment Setter | Cold Caller)
description:
Who We Are

StoryGen (www.storygen.agency/) is a performance-focused B2B outbound agency helping companies generate consistent, qualified sales opportunities through strategic cold outreach. We specialize in building reliable pipelines and cold calling is a core part of how we deliver measurable growth for our clients.



Our clients range from high-growth SaaS startups to established service providers in industries such as digital marketing, IT services, fintech, staffing, and consulting. When you join StoryGen, you don’t just work on one produc, you gain exposure to multiple industries, decision-makers, and proven outbound systems.



We are expanding our remote sales team and are hiring driven, phone-confident Sales Development Representative to execute outbound campaigns and consistently book qualified meetings.



The Opportunity

This is a metrics-driven outbound role focused heavily on cold calling. You’ll be the first point of contact between our clients and their ideal prospects , responsible for starting meaningful conversations and converting them into qualified sales meetings.



If you enjoy structured execution, measurable performance, and being accountable for real results, this role is built for you.



Key Responsibilities

- Execute high-volume outbound cold calls to B2B decision-makers

- Use structured call frameworks and objection-handling techniques

- Qualify prospects and schedule meetings that meet campaign criteria

- Maintain accurate and organized CRM records

- Send follow-ups and meeting confirmations to increase show rates

- Reconnect with warm leads to improve conversion performance

- Provide feedback and insights to improve targeting and messaging

- Collaborate with Account Managers to optimize campaign outcomes



What Makes You a Strong Fit

- Previous experience as an SDR, BDR, cold caller, or appointment setter

- Proven ability to meet call activity and booking targets

- Confident and professional communicator on the phone

- Comfortable handling objections and navigating gatekeepers

- Highly organized and disciplined with CRM updates and reporting

- Coachable and adaptable across different industries

- Reliable, consistent, and performance-oriented

- Experience with HubSpot, Slack, Coda, Calendly, or Nooks is a plus.



Compensation & Work Structure

- Base Salary: USD 1,000 per month

- Commission: Uncapped, paid per qualified meeting held

- Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM (Eastern Time)



Location: Fully Remote



Work across multiple B2B industries and client campaigns

Defined advancement path to Senior SDR, Team Lead, and management roles

Collaborative, high-performance remote team environment



How to Apply

We use a skills-based assessment process to ensure a fair hiring experience. Please complete the assessment and submit the following in the same link:



- Your resume

- A screenshot or link to your internet speed test result

- A short Loom audio recording (questions provided in the link)



Apply here:

title: Senior Microsoft Cloud & Identity Administrator
description:
The Senior Microsoft Cloud & Identity Administrator will be responsible for the architecture, administration, and security of the organization's Microsoft 365, Azure, and Entra environments. This role involves managing identity governance, conditional access, and endpoint management, including macOS devices. The administrator will also serve as a Tier-3 escalation point for complex cloud, identity, and endpoint issues.



Key Responsibilities



• Architect, administer, and secure Microsoft 365, Azure, and Entra environments

• Manage identity governance and conditional access

• Oversee endpoint management and tenant configuration

• Support a hybrid endpoint environment, including macOS devices via Apple Business Manager and Addigy MDM

• Serve as a Tier-3 escalation point for complex cloud, identity, and endpoint issues

• Troubleshoot complex cloud environments



Key Qualifications



• 5–10 years IT experience

• 3–5 years Microsoft cloud administration experience

• Experience supporting hybrid Windows/Mac environments

• Experience with MDM platforms

• Proficiency in PowerShell

• macOS administration skills

• Windows administration skills

• Identity management expertise

• Endpoint security knowledge

• Familiarity with Microsoft security tools

title: Creative Content QA Specialist
description:
Remote | Part-Time (12–15 hours/week) | Ruah Creative House



Ruah Creative House is a purpose-driven creative agency that partners with churches, nonprofits, and mission-focused leaders to create meaningful media and storytelling.



As we continue to grow, we are looking for a Video & Creative Content Quality Reviewer (QA) to serve as the final internal review before content is delivered to clients.



Your role will be to ensure that everything we produce meets a high standard of clarity, grammar, tone, and overall quality.



This position requires excellent English, strong attention to detail, and good creative judgment.



You do not need to be a video editor. However, you should be able to recognize when something feels off in pacing, captions, or presentation.



This role requires reviewing small details carefully. If you enjoy spotting mistakes and improving clarity, you will enjoy this work.



Your Responsibilities

You will review content before it is delivered to clients. 



This includes:

Video Review

Review video captions and subtitles for grammar, spelling, punctuation, and readability

Ensure captions match what is actually being said in the video

Check timing and formatting of captions

Flag 
nts where a video edit feels awkward, rushed, or unclear

Verify names, scripture references, and quotes are written correctly



Content Review

Review carousel posts for grammar and clarity

Review written captions for social media

Review website copy for readability and proper English

Ensure content matches the intended tone and message



Quality Control

Catch spelling mistakes and grammar issues

Ensure formatting is consistent

Ensure captions read naturally and not robotic

Provide clear feedback for editors and designers

Maintain a checklist so that no details are missed before delivery

Your job is to help ensure that everything we deliver reflects excellence.



What We're Looking For

The ideal candidate:

Has near-native English proficiency

Has strong grammar and writing ability

Has exceptional attention to detail

Can spot mistakes quickly

Has good judgment about whether content feels polished

Communicates clearly and respectfully with the team

Is organized and dependable



Backgrounds that work well for this role include:

Copy editors

English majors

Journalists

Social media managers

Content editors

Communications professionals



Required Skills

Excellent written English

Strong grammar and proofreading ability

Ability to give clear and helpful feedback

Attention to detail

Organized and reliable

Comfortable reviewing creative content



Bonus (not required):

Experience with social media content

Experience reviewing video captions

Familiarity with Christian or faith-based content



Schedule

Part-time role

Approximately 12–15 hours per week

Flexible schedule

Opportunity to grow as the team expands



Important Application Instructions

To help us identify applicants who have strong attention to detail, please follow these steps carefully.



Step 1

At the top of your application, write this exact phrase:

"Quality matters in the small details."

Applications that do not include this line will not be considered.



Step 2

Below that sentence, correct the grammar in the following paragraph:

the message in this video really spoke to me it remind me that god is always faithful even when we dont see what he is doing in the 
nt sometimes we just need to trust the process and keep walking forward

Rewrite it so that it reads clear, natural, and grammatically correct.



Step 3

Tell us in 2–3 sentences why attention to detail matters when reviewing content before it is sent to a client.

About Ruah Creative House

Ruah Creative House is a creative studio that partners with churches, ministries, and purpose-driven organizations to produce meaningful media that serves people and tells impactful stories.

Our goal is not just to create content, but to create content that reflects excellence and integrity.



---

If you're someone who loves details, clarity, and helping creative work reach its highest quality, we would love to hear from you.

title: Elementor Pro Website Designer
description:
We are looking for an experienced WordPress + Elementor Pro designer to help convert an existing fitness website into a clean, fully functional Elementor-based site.



Currently, much of the site content exists in PDFs and some hard-coded pages, and we want it rebuilt properly in Elementor Pro so it is easier to maintain, edit, and expand.



This is for a fitness organization website, so strong design sense, clean layouts, and good mobile responsiveness are important.



What You’ll Do:



Rebuild existing website pages using Elementor Pro



Convert PDF content and hard-coded pages into editable Elementor layouts



Ensure the site is fully responsive (desktop, tablet, mobile)



Improve layout, spacing, and overall design where appropriate



Set up reusable Elementor sections/templates where useful



Maintain fast page load speed and clean structure



Requirements:



Strong experience with WordPress and Elementor Pro



Good understanding of responsive design



Ability to recreate layouts from PDFs or existing pages



Clean design sense (preferably with experience in fitness/health websites)



Reliable communication and quick turnaround



Nice to Have:



Experience with fitness or health websites

title: Account Manager / Campaign Strategist (Client Success & Growth)
description:
About StoryGen

StoryGen (www.storygen.agency/) is a B2B lead generation agency that builds and manages outbound sales programs for companies across multiple industries. We specialize in cold calling, supported by structured systems, performance tracking, and AI-powered tools to drive consistent results.



We partner closely with our clients to create scalable outbound systems that generate qualified opportunities and measurable growth.



The Opportunity

We’re hiring a Remote Account Manager / Campaign Strategist to take full ownership of client campaigns, from initial strategy to ongoing optimization and growth.



This is not a passive account management role. You’ll act as a strategic partner, performance driver, and internal team leader, ensuring every campaign is aligned, continuously improving, and delivering measurable ROI.



If you understand outbound deeply, think in systems, and enjoy turning data into direction, this role is for you.



What You’ll Do

Client Strategy & Leadership

- Lead onboarding calls and campaign kickoffs with clarity and structure

- Translate client goals into actionable outbound strategies

- Run performance reviews and guide clients through data-backed decisions

- Build strong, long-term client relationships rooted in trust and results



Campaign Development & Optimization

- Develop Ideal Customer Profiles (ICPs) and outbound targeting strategies

- Build and refine cold call scripts and
 sequences

- Use BDR feedback and campaign metrics to iterate messaging

- Identify performance gaps and implement optimization plans



Execution Alignment

- Brief BDR teams clearly on targeting, scripts, and expectations

- Partner with List Building to ensure high-quality prospect data

- Work with Operations to improve systems, workflows, and tooling

- Monitor performance daily and adjust quickly when needed



Performance & Reporting

- Analyze KPIs and campaign metrics

- Deliver concise, strategic client updates

- Turn insights into next-step recommendations



What Makes You a Strong Fit

- 1–2 years of real B2B cold calling experience (you’ve been on the phone and know objections firsthand)

- 2+ years in Account Management, Client Success, or Campaign Management within B2B services, lead gen, or sales outsourcing

- Strong scripting and copywriting skills for outbound campaigns

- Deep understanding of ICP development and outbound prospecting strategy

- Excellent communication skills, you can lead calls and guide conversations confidently

- Organized and detail-oriented, capable of managing multiple accounts simultaneously

- Comfortable working remotely with tools like HubSpot, Slack, Coda, Calendly, Nooks, Aircall, and similar platforms

- Tech-savvy and comfortable leveraging AI tools to increase efficiency



What We Offer

- Base Salary: USD 1,500/month

- On-Target Earnings: Up to USD 2,000/month (performance-based bonuses)

- Fully remote role with a global team

- Clear systems, structured processes, and operational support

- Real growth opportunities as StoryGen scales



Work Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:30 AM–6:00 PM Eastern Time



How to Apply

We use structured assessments in our hiring process to promote fairness and reduce bias.

To apply, complete the assessment and upload the following within the same link:



- Your resume

- A link to your internet speed test result

- A short Loom audio introduction (questions provided in the link)



Apply here:

title: Senior AWS DevOps Engineer – AWS Cost Optimization & Kubernetes
description:
Job Description:

About the Role

We're a blockchain/DeFi company running production infrastructure that's bleeding money unnecessarily. Our AWS bill is sitting at $4,500/month – and we know it shouldn't be anywhere near that. We need someone who can come in, audit the whole setup, and actually fix it. Not just give us a report that sits in a folder.



We've already been through a few candidates who talked a big game but couldn't execute. We're done with that. If you're the type who needs handholding or can't work independently, this isn't for you.





What You'll Actually Do

- Audit our entire AWS infrastructure and identify exactly where we're wasting money (we expect significant savings)

- Optimize our Kubernetes clusters – right-size nodes, fix resource requests/limits, implement autoscaling that actually works

- Implement cost controls: Reserved Instances, Savings Plans, spot instances where appropriate, and cleanup of orphaned resources

- Set up monitoring and alerts so costs don't creep back up without us knowing

- Document everything you do so the team can maintain it





Hard Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- 3+ years hands-on Kubernetes experience in production environments – EKS specifically preferred

- Deep AWS knowledge: EC2, EKS, RDS, S3, CloudWatch, Cost Explorer, Trusted Advisor

- Proven track record of actually reducing AWS costs (be ready to share numbers/percentages)

- Strong scripting skills (Python, Bash) for automation

- Infrastructure as Code: Terraform or CloudFormation (Terraform preferred)

- Self-starter who can take ownership and execute without constant oversight





!!!!CRITICAL: This Role Requires Surgical Precision

This is production infrastructure running live systems. Think of this like surgery – one wrong move can take everything down.

- NO cowboy moves. You don't delete, modify, or remove anything without a clear plan first.

- Every change must be planned out, documented, and confirmed with the CEO before execution.

- Extreme attention to detail. You double-check and triple-check before touching anything.

- If you're not 100% sure what something does, you ask first. You don't assume.

- Methodical execution only. We value careful and correct over fast and reckless.





Strong Plus

- Experience with blockchain/Web3 infrastructure

- Karpenter, Cluster Autoscaler, or KEDA experience

-  AWS certifications (Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer)

- Experience with FinOps tools (Kubecost, CloudHealth, 
)





What We Need In Your Application

Don't send a generic application. We will ignore it. Include:

- Specific examples of AWS cost optimization you've done – what was the setup, what did you change, what % did you save?

- Your Kubernetes experience – cluster sizes you've managed, scaling strategies you've implemented

- Your availability and timezone (we need someone who can overlap with US business hours for some calls)





Compensation & Structure

- $20-25/hour based on experience and proven results

- 20 hours/week to start – potential for more hours for the right person

- Fully remote

- Initial project: Comprehensive audit + implementation plan with clear cost reduction targets





If you're someone who can actually deliver results and not just talk about them – we want to hear from you. Show us what you've done.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Energi

Energi (NRG) is a scalable and secure blockchain ecosystem, designed to power the next generation of Web3 applications, DeFi protocols, and NFT marketplaces. Built on a robust Proof of Stake (PoS) infrastructure, Energi combines Ethereum compatibility, on-chain governance, a self-funding treasury, and a Layer 2 masternode network to drive innovation in decentralized technology.

Our remote-first team spans the Americas, Europe, Africa, Asia, and Oceania, working together to push the boundaries of blockchain scalability and security. With a growing network of global contributors, we are committed to building a blockchain that is not only secure but also developer-friendly and highly scalable.

Energi is engineered to support millions of users, making it an ideal platform for high-performance dApps, NFT marketplaces, and decentralized finance solutions. Our ecosystem is designed for fast, cost-effective transactions with a focus on long-term sustainability.

By fostering collaboration, innovation, and a forward-thinking culture, Energi is redefining the Web3 landscape. Explore our vision and mission at 
.





WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU:

-Work flexible hours from anywhere as part of a globally distributed team driven by innovation and shared values.

-Directly shape the future of blockchain technology in NFT development.

-Enhance your skills and creativity with cutting-edge blockchain, smart contract, and Web3 technologies.

-Be part of an advanced blockchain ecosystem and contribute to building next-gen NFT platforms.

-Competitive pay structure in a 50/50 split of ETH and NRG tokens.



Front-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We seek a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer specializing in NFT platforms to drive the front-end development of our decentralized applications. You’ll create immersive Web3 experiences while integrating blockchain-based features like Metamask and smart contracts.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Work closely with UX designers to create seamless NFT marketplaces and dApps.

-Develop interactive front-end features integrating Web3.js and smart contracts.

-Optimize UI performance and ensure mobile responsiveness.

-Maintain existing applications and introduce new blockchain features.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of experience in front-end development.

-Proficient in React, Gatsby, and Web3 frameworks.

-Experience integrating blockchain wallets like Metamask.

-Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.

-Fluent English communicator with a passion for blockchain.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Experience with Web3, Infura, and The Graph.

-Familiarity with NFT metadata standards and ERC-721/ERC-1155.

-SEO optimization skills.



Back-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We’re looking for a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer to build the backend for NFT applications. You’ll be responsible for designing, maintaining, and optimizing APIs that connect blockchain smart contracts with scalable Web3 applications.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Develop secure APIs that interact with NFT smart contracts.

-Optimize backend infrastructure for high-traffic NFT transactions.

-Implement blockchain indexing solutions for NFT metadata retrieval.

-Write unit tests to ensure security and efficiency.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of back-end development experience.

-Proficiency in Golang, NodeJS, and GraphQL.

-Experience with blockchain data structures and decentralized storage.

-Passionate about blockchain innovation and fluent in English.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Knowledge of smart contract security best practices.

-Prior experience with NFT minting platforms.

-Remote work experience.



This role is not open to 3rd party organizations or agencies. Any candidates sent will be considered free of any charges



Energi is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, pregnancy, disability, age, veteran status, or other characteristics.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (After Effects) — AI, Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor (After Effects) — AI, Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $1,100 USD/month

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver overlap (PST) for feedback



---



THE MISSION



Prismiera is a luxury jewelry brand with a short-form video series already producing cinematic content on YouTube — mythology, history, goddess archetypes, and Dark Academia aesthetics.



We need someone to own the Instagram and TikTok side.



This is NOT repurposing YouTube content into different aspect ratios. This is building platform-native content that makes a woman feel powerful in under 20 seconds. You'll create original short-form edits and cinematic skits using AI-generated footage, voiceovers, and atmospheric visuals — designed from the ground up for how Instagram and TikTok audiences actually consume.



The other half of this role: you'll be working with our AI-generated personas who serve as the visual anchor across our short-form content. You'll generate, composite, integrate, and stylize AI character visuals into edits that feel striking and intentional, not gimmicky. If the idea of building a visual identity around an AI persona excites you, keep reading!



---



THE STYLE



The content mix you'll produce:



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The kind of reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption because the vid speaks for itself. 



25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end, visually stunning executions of viral formats and humor. The premise can be slightly unhinged or ironic, but the visuals never break brand/luxury canon. 



10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. Visual overload with mythological texture. The algorithmic wildcard.



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Content that feels like a luxury car reel meets ancient mythology. Cinematic skits using our AI personas — high-production value, deadpan, surreal, or darkly ironic.



NO: CapCut presets. Generic motivational quote reels. Low-effort vlog-style acting. Slapstick comedy. Anything that looks like it was made in Canva. Anything that cheapens a demi-luxury product.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Create & Adapt: Produce original Instagram/TikTok-native content using AI-generated visuals, trending audio, and our brand's mythology. Some pieces you'll build from scratch. Others you'll adapt from assets in our YouTube production pipeline. Either way, you're not resizing — you're crafting content shaped for how each platform rewards engagement.



Cinematic Skits: Build short-form skits around our AI personas that use trending formats, dark humor, or deadpan irony — executed at a visual level that never drops below luxury. People share it for the joke, follow the page for the aesthetic.



AI Persona Integration: Composite and stylize our AI-generated characters into edits as a visual anchor. She's not a narrator in your content — she's the presence. The face the eye locks onto while mythology and music layers move around her.



AI Content Generation: You won't just receive AI assets — you'll create them. Using tools like Seedance 2.0 and Seedream5, you'll generate goddess visuals, atmospheric environments, and character footage that feed directly into your edits. You're both the director and the editor.



Music-Sync Editing: Your cuts, transitions, and visual reveals are married to the beat. You understand rhythm as a storytelling tool. Swells, drops, silence, impact — all intentional.



Platform Instinct: You understand what Instagram rewards vs. what TikTok rewards. You know what gets saved on IG. You know what gets looped on TikTok. You design for those behaviors, not just for visual quality.



Instagram Packaging: Beyond the Reel itself — you contribute to grid cohesion, caption strategy, and Story sequencing. The profile should make someone think "I want to be part of this" within 2 seconds of landing.



Volume at Speed: Once your templates and aesthetic are locked, your turnaround per piece should be significantly faster than building from zero. We expect high output.



---



CORE REQUIREMENTS



After Effects (Mandatory). Compositing, layering, motion graphics, light/shadow matching. This is your primary tool. You build visual experiences, not just cuts.



Premiere Pro. For project handoffs and consistency with the rest of the team.



AI Generation Fluency. You'll be using frontier AI tools daily — not just editing AI output, but generating it. You'll learn to prompt, iterate, select, and refine AI-generated visuals as a core part of your production workflow. We provide paid accounts for all tools (Seedance 2.0, Seedream, and whatever launches next). What we need is someone who treats these tools as creative instruments, not novelties.



The Aesthetic Eye. You instinctively know the difference between aspirational and try-hard. Between elegant and overproduced. Between powerful and loud. Your edits make people feel something before they consciously understand what they're looking at.



Music & Rhythm. You've made edits where the music drives the visuals — AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits, whatever. You understand pacing as a weapon. You know what "the drop" means and you know when NOT to use it.



Loop Thinking. You design edits that reward rewatching. The cut that lands on beat, the detail you only catch the second time, the seamless loop point. You think in circles, not lines.



Strong English. Daily async communication — clear, direct, professional.



Reliable & Coachable. You hit deadlines or warn early. You take direct feedback and iterate fast. You flag problems with options, not excuses.



---



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, But We'll Notice)



- Color grading — pushing AI output and mixed footage into a consistent luxury palette

- Typography sense — text overlays that feel intentional and premium

- Sound design — SFX layering beyond just music (risers, hits, atmospheric texture)

- Carousel / static design for Instagram companion posts

- Understanding of Instagram analytics — saves, shares, completion rates, and what drives them

- Experience building visual identities for brands or personas on social media



---



WEEKLY OUTPUT



Ramp-up (first 2–3 weeks): 3–5 pieces as you learn the brand aesthetic, lock your AE templates, learn the AI generation tools, and calibrate with the team.



Steady state: 10–15 pieces per week across Instagram and TikTok — a mix of original productions and asset-based adaptations depending on the content calendar.



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production and visual effects — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run After Effects, Premiere Pro, and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



PAID TRIAL (Shortlisted Candidates)



Before any full-time commitment, we run a weekly paid trial. We provide real assets from our production pipeline, style references, and the AI persona visuals. You deliver content. Trial is compensated at $250 USD at the end of each week. If it's a mutual fit after 30 days, we transition to regular bi-weekly payments.



This protects both sides — you see whether the work fits your strengths, we see whether the output fits our brand.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Paid accounts for all frontier AI tools — Seedance 2.0, Seedream, and whatever launches next

- Creative ownership — you're defining how a luxury brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok from day one

- An AI persona to build around — not a hypothetical, an active visual identity you'll shape and evolve

- A role that evolves as the tools evolve — this job will look different in six months, and that's the point

- Clear briefs — asset libraries, mood references, and specific direction for every batch

- Direct feedback — specific, constructive notes on every edit

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon. A second AI-native brand is incubating behind it. You're not joining a finished machine. You're helping build one.



---



COMPENSATION



$1,100 USD/month. Paid trial at $250 USD/week, transitioning to bi-weekly payments of $550 after 30 days.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic cover letter.

Use 7 apply points or more when applying.



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your favorite anime]



Send the following (in this order):



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit you've made that is aspirational, aesthetic, or fashion-adjacent, or a skit that demonstrates platform-native virality instinct. Format doesn't matter. The feeling and execution does.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE edit where the music drives the visuals. Show us your beat-sync instinct. (Can overlap with #1 if one video demonstrates both.)



Portfolio link (optional). If you have a reel, channel, or portfolio beyond the two links above, drop it here.



3. The Creative Instinct Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given a 45-second cinematic video about a queen who poisoned her entire court, a folder of our AI Goddess visuals, and a dark atmospheric beat. Pitch two reworks: (A) a 15-second Instagram Reel designed to get saved — tell us your audio choice, pacing, and what the first 2 seconds look like; and (B) a 15-second cinematic skit that uses dark or deadpan humor without losing the luxury feel.



4. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). What is your experience level with generative AI tools? If none, say so — we'll evaluate the rest on its own merits.



5. Hardware. Your PC specs: CPU / GPU / RAM. Plus your internet upload speed.



6. Turnaround Estimate. Given existing footage, a music track, and an established AE template — how long would a 15–20 second piece take you?



7. The Rewrite. Rewrite this sentence to sound dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: Customer Service Admin Assistant
description:
